authors_text: Luca Clemente,Octavio Villarreal,Angelo Bratta,Michele Focchi,Victor Barasuol,Giovanni Gerardo Muscolo,Claudio Semini
title: Foothold Evaluation Criterion for Dynamic Transition Feasibility for Quadruped Robots
title_zh: 四足机器人动态转移可行性的立足点评价标准
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: 9 pages, 7 figures, accepted for presentation at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: To traverse complex scenarios reliably a legged robot needs to move its base aided by the ground reaction forces, which can only be generated by the legs that are momentarily in contact with the ground. A proper selection of footholds is crucial for maintaining balance. In this paper, we propose a foothold evaluation criterion that considers the transition feasibility for both linear and angular dynamics to overcome complex scenarios. We devise convex and nonlinear formulations as a direct extension of the Continuous Convex Resolution of Centroidal Dynamic Trajectories (C-CROC) in a receding-horizon fashion to grant dynamic feasibility for future behaviours. The criterion is integrated with a Vision-based Foothold Adaptation (VFA) strategy that takes into account the robot kinematics, leg collisions and terrain morphology. We verify the validity of the selected footholds and the generated trajectories in simulation and experiments with the 90kg quadruped robot HyQ.
summary: To traverse complex scenarios reliably a legged robot needs to move its base aided by the ground reaction forces, which can only be generated by the legs that are momentarily in contact with the ground. A proper selection of footholds is crucial for maintaining balance. In this paper, we propose a foothold evaluation criterion that considers the transition feasibility for both linear and angular dynamics to overcome complex scenarios. We devise convex and nonlinear formulations as a direct extension of the Continuous Convex Resolution of Centroidal Dynamic Trajectories (C-CROC) in a receding-horizon fashion to grant dynamic feasibility for future behaviours. The criterion is integrated with a Vision-based Foothold Adaptation (VFA) strategy that takes into account the robot kinematics, leg collisions and terrain morphology. We verify the validity of the selected footholds and the generated trajectories in simulation and experiments with the 90kg quadruped robot HyQ.
abstract_zh: 为了可靠地穿越复杂的场景，腿式机器人需要在地面反作用力的帮助下移动其底座，而地面反作用力只能由暂时与地面接触的腿产生。正确选择立足点对于保持平衡至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种立足点评估标准，该标准考虑了线性和角度动力学的过渡可行性，以克服复杂的场景。我们设计了凸和非线性公式，作为质心动态轨迹连续凸分辨率（C-CROC）的直接扩展，以后退的方式为未来行为提供动态可行性。该标准与基于视觉的立足点适应（VFA）策略相结合，该策略考虑了机器人运动学、腿部碰撞和地形形态。我们通过 90kg 四足机器人 HyQ 进行仿真和实验验证了所选立足点和生成轨迹的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种四足机器人动态过渡可行性的 foothold 评估标准，结合视觉策略与动态模型以提升复杂地形下的移动稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以在复杂地形中确保四足机器人动态移动的平衡性与过渡可行性，需更精确的 foothold 选择标准。
AI.method: 基于C-CROC框架扩展凸与非线性公式，采用滚动时域方法，并融合视觉引导的 foothold 适应策略，综合考虑运动学、腿部碰撞及地形特征。
AI.result: 通过仿真与90kg四足机器人HyQ实验验证，所选 foothold 及轨迹在复杂场景中表现出动态可行性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了四足机器人在未知复杂地形中的动态过渡能力，为实际应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

We devise convex and nonlinear formulations as a direct extension of the Continuous Convex Resolution of Centroidal Dynamic Trajectories (C-CROC) in a receding-horizon fashion to grant dynamic feasibility for future behaviours. The criterion is integrated with a Vision-based Foothold Adaptation (VFA) strategy that takes into account the robot kinematics, leg collisions and terrain morphology. We verify the validity of the selected footholds and the generated trajectories in simulation and experiments with the 90kg quadruped robot HyQ. 为了可靠地穿越复杂的场景，腿式机器人需要在地面反作用力的帮助下移动其底座，而地面反作用力只能由暂时与地面接触的腿产生。正确选择立足点对于保持平衡至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种立足点评估标准，该标准考虑了线性和角度动力学的过渡可行性，以克服复杂的场景。我们设计了凸和非线性公式，作为质心动态轨迹连续凸分辨率（C-CROC）的直接扩展，以后退的方式为未来行为提供动态可行性。该标准与基于视觉的立足点适应（VFA）策略相结合，该策略考虑了机器人运动学、腿部碰撞和地形形态。我们通过 90kg 四足机器人 HyQ 进行仿真和实验验证了所选立足点和生成轨迹的有效性。 本文提出一种四足机器人动态过渡可行性的 foothold 评估标准，结合视觉策略与动态模型以提升复杂地形下的移动稳定性。 Luca Clemente,Octavio Villarreal,Angelo Bratta,Michele Focchi,Victor Barasuol,Giovanni Gerardo Muscolo,Claudio Semini cs.RO

authors_text: Rossana Damiano,Cristina Gena,Andrea Maieli,Claudio Mattutino,Alessandro Mazzei,Elisabetta Miraglio,Giulia Ricciardiello
title: UX Personas for defining robot's character and personality
title_zh: 用于定义机器人性格和个性的用户体验角色
abstract: This paper describes the use of UX Personas for defining a stable character for the Pepper robot. This approach generated from the first analysis of the social interactions that occurred between Pepper and a group of children with autism working with the robot in a therapeutic laboratory on autonomy.
summary: This paper describes the use of UX Personas for defining a stable character for the Pepper robot. This approach generated from the first analysis of the social interactions that occurred between Pepper and a group of children with autism working with the robot in a therapeutic laboratory on autonomy.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了如何使用 UX 角色来定义 Pepper 机器人的稳定角色。这种方法源于对 Pepper 和一群自闭症儿童之间发生的社交互动的首次分析，这些儿童在自主治疗实验室中与机器人一起工作。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过UX人物模型为Pepper机器人定义稳定的性格特征，以增强其与自闭症儿童的互动效果。
AI.motivation: 自闭症儿童在治疗中需要与机器人建立稳定且可预测的互动关系，传统方法难以有效定义机器人性格。
AI.method: 基于Pepper机器人与自闭症儿童在自主性治疗实验室中的社交互动数据，分析并构建UX人物模型以定义机器人性格。
AI.result: 成功创建了稳定的机器人性格模型，提升了Pepper与自闭症儿童的互动质量与治疗效果。
AI.conclusion: UX人物模型为机器人性格设计提供了有效框架，可优化人机交互在特殊教育场景中的应用。

authors_text: Ziqi Lu,Yihao Zhang,Kevin Doherty,Odin Severinsen,Ethan Yang,John Leonard
title: SLAM-Supported Self-Training for 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 支持 SLAM 的 6D 物体姿态估计自训练
abstract: Recent progress in object pose prediction provides a promising path for robots to build object-level scene representations during navigation. However, as we deploy a robot in novel environments, the out-of-distribution data can degrade the prediction performance. To mitigate the domain gap, we can potentially perform self-training in the target domain, using predictions on robot-captured images as pseudo labels to fine-tune the object pose estimator. Unfortunately, the pose predictions are typically outlier-corrupted, and it is hard to quantify their uncertainties, which can result in low-quality pseudo-labeled data. To address the problem, we propose a SLAM-supported self-training method, leveraging robot understanding of the 3D scene geometry to enhance the object pose inference performance. Combining the pose predictions with robot odometry, we formulate and solve pose graph optimization to refine the object pose estimates and make pseudo labels more consistent across frames. We incorporate the pose prediction covariances as variables into the optimization to automatically model their uncertainties. This automatic covariance tuning (ACT) process can fit 6D pose prediction noise at the component level, leading to higher-quality pseudo training data. We test our method with the deep object pose estimator (DOPE) on the YCB video dataset and in real robot experiments. It achieves respectively 34.3% and 17.8% accuracy enhancements in pose prediction on the two tests. Our code is available at https://github.com/520xyxyzq/slam-super-6d.
summary: Recent progress in object pose prediction provides a promising path for robots to build object-level scene representations during navigation. However, as we deploy a robot in novel environments, the out-of-distribution data can degrade the prediction performance. To mitigate the domain gap, we can potentially perform self-training in the target domain, using predictions on robot-captured images as pseudo labels to fine-tune the object pose estimator. Unfortunately, the pose predictions are typically outlier-corrupted, and it is hard to quantify their uncertainties, which can result in low-quality pseudo-labeled data. To address the problem, we propose a SLAM-supported self-training method, leveraging robot understanding of the 3D scene geometry to enhance the object pose inference performance. Combining the pose predictions with robot odometry, we formulate and solve pose graph optimization to refine the object pose estimates and make pseudo labels more consistent across frames. We incorporate the pose prediction covariances as variables into the optimization to automatically model their uncertainties. This automatic covariance tuning (ACT) process can fit 6D pose prediction noise at the component level, leading to higher-quality pseudo training data. We test our method with the deep object pose estimator (DOPE) on the YCB video dataset and in real robot experiments. It achieves respectively 34.3% and 17.8% accuracy enhancements in pose prediction on the two tests. Our code is available at https://github.com/520xyxyzq/slam-super-6d.
abstract_zh: 物体姿态预测的最新进展为机器人在导航过程中构建物体级场景表示提供了一条有希望的途径。然而，当我们在新环境中部署机器人时，分布外的数据可能会降低预测性能。为了缩小域差距，我们可以在目标域中进行自我训练，使用机器人捕获图像的预测作为伪标签来微调对象姿态估计器。不幸的是，姿势预测通常会受到异常值的影响，并且很难量化其不确定性，这可能会导致低质量的伪标记数据。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种支持 SLAM 的自训练方法，利用机器人对 3D 场景几何的理解来增强物体姿态推理性能。将姿态预测与机器人里程计相结合，我们制定并解决姿态图优化，以细化对象姿态估计并使伪标签在帧之间更加一致。我们将姿态预测协方差作为变量纳入优化中，以自动对其不确定性进行建模。这种自动协方差调整 (ACT) 过程可以在组件级别拟合 6D 姿态预测噪声，从而产生更高质量的伪训练数据。我们使用深度物体姿态估计器（DOPE）在 YCB 视频数据集和真实的机器人实验中测试我们的方法。在两项测试中，它的姿态预测准确率分别提高了 34.3% 和 17.8%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/520xyxyzq/slam-super-6d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SLAM的自训练方法，用于提升6D物体位姿估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在新型环境中因分布外数据导致位姿预测性能下降，伪标签质量难以保证。
AI.method: 结合SLAM的3D场景理解与自训练，通过位姿图优化和协方差自动调节（ACT）提升伪标签一致性与准确性。
AI.result: 在YCB视频数据集和真实机器人实验中分别提升34.3%和17.8%的位姿预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: SLAM支持的自训练方法能有效建模预测不确定性，生成高质量伪标签以优化6D位姿估计。

authors_text: Zhangjie Cao,Erdem Bıyık,Guy Rosman,Dorsa Sadigh
title: Leveraging Smooth Attention Prior for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 利用平滑注意力先验进行多智能体轨迹预测
abstract: Multi-agent interactions are important to model for forecasting other agents' behaviors and trajectories. At a certain time, to forecast a reasonable future trajectory, each agent needs to pay attention to the interactions with only a small group of most relevant agents instead of unnecessarily paying attention to all the other agents. However, existing attention modeling works ignore that human attention in driving does not change rapidly, and may introduce fluctuating attention across time steps. In this paper, we formulate an attention model for multi-agent interactions based on a total variation temporal smoothness prior and propose a trajectory prediction architecture that leverages the knowledge of these attended interactions. We demonstrate how the total variation attention prior along with the new sequence prediction loss terms leads to smoother attention and more sample-efficient learning of multi-agent trajectory prediction, and show its advantages in terms of prediction accuracy by comparing it with the state-of-the-art approaches on both synthetic and naturalistic driving data. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm for trajectory prediction on the INTERACTION dataset on our website.
summary: Multi-agent interactions are important to model for forecasting other agents' behaviors and trajectories. At a certain time, to forecast a reasonable future trajectory, each agent needs to pay attention to the interactions with only a small group of most relevant agents instead of unnecessarily paying attention to all the other agents. However, existing attention modeling works ignore that human attention in driving does not change rapidly, and may introduce fluctuating attention across time steps. In this paper, we formulate an attention model for multi-agent interactions based on a total variation temporal smoothness prior and propose a trajectory prediction architecture that leverages the knowledge of these attended interactions. We demonstrate how the total variation attention prior along with the new sequence prediction loss terms leads to smoother attention and more sample-efficient learning of multi-agent trajectory prediction, and show its advantages in terms of prediction accuracy by comparing it with the state-of-the-art approaches on both synthetic and naturalistic driving data. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm for trajectory prediction on the INTERACTION dataset on our website.
abstract_zh: 多智能体交互对于预测其他智能体的行为和轨迹的模型非常重要。在某个时间，为了预测合理的未来轨迹，每个智能体只需要关注与一小部分最相关的智能体的交互，而不是不必要地关注所有其他智能体。然而，现有的注意力建模工作忽略了人类在驾驶中的注意力不会快速变化，并且可能会引入跨时间步长的注意力波动。在本文中，我们基于总变分时间平滑先验制定了多智能体交互的注意力模型，并提出了一种利用这些参与交互的知识的轨迹预测架构。我们展示了全变化注意先验以及新的序列预测损失项如何导致更平滑的注意和更高效的多智能体轨迹预测学习，并通过将其与合成和自然驾驶数据的最先进方法进行比较，展示了其在预测准确性方面的优势。我们在我们网站上的 INTERACTION 数据集上展示了我们的轨迹预测算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于平滑注意力先验的多智能体轨迹预测方法，通过引入时间总变分平滑性先验来优化注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力模型在多智能体轨迹预测中忽略了人类注意力随时间变化的平滑特性，导致注意力波动影响预测稳定性。
AI.method: 构建基于总变分时间平滑先验的注意力模型，并设计新的序列预测损失项，结合交互信息进行轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在合成数据和自然驾驶数据集（如INTERACTION）上验证了方法有效性，预测精度优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入平滑注意力先验，显著提升了多智能体轨迹预测的样本效率和预测准确性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于平滑注意力先验的多智能体轨迹预测方法，通过引入时间总变分平滑性先验来优化注意力机制。
motivation: 现有注意力模型在多智能体轨迹预测中忽略了人类注意力随时间变化的平滑特性，导致注意力波动影响预测稳定性。
method: 构建基于总变分时间平滑先验的注意力模型，并设计新的序列预测损失项，结合交互信息进行轨迹预测。
result: 在合成数据和自然驾驶数据集（如INTERACTION）上验证了方法有效性，预测精度优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过引入平滑注意力先验，显著提升了多智能体轨迹预测的样本效率和预测准确性。
search_text: Leveraging Smooth Attention Prior for Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction 利用平滑注意力先验进行多智能体轨迹预测 Multi-agent interactions are important to model for forecasting other agents' behaviors and trajectories. At a certain time, to forecast a reasonable future trajectory, each agent needs to pay attention to the interactions with only a small group of most relevant agents instead of unnecessarily paying attention to all the other agents. However, existing attention modeling works ignore that human attention in driving does not change rapidly, and may introduce fluctuating attention across time steps. In this paper, we formulate an attention model for multi-agent interactions based on a total variation temporal smoothness prior and propose a trajectory prediction architecture that leverages the knowledge of these attended interactions. We demonstrate how the total variation attention prior along with the new sequence prediction loss terms leads to smoother attention and more sample-efficient learning of multi-agent trajectory prediction, and show its advantages in terms of prediction accuracy by comparing it with the state-of-the-art approaches on both synthetic and naturalistic driving data. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm for trajectory prediction on the INTERACTION dataset on our website. 多智能体交互对于预测其他智能体的行为和轨迹的模型非常重要。在某个时间，为了预测合理的未来轨迹，每个智能体只需要关注与一小部分最相关的智能体的交互，而不是不必要地关注所有其他智能体。然而，现有的注意力建模工作忽略了人类在驾驶中的注意力不会快速变化，并且可能会引入跨时间步长的注意力波动。在本文中，我们基于总变分时间平滑先验制定了多智能体交互的注意力模型，并提出了一种利用这些参与交互的知识的轨迹预测架构。我们展示了全变化注意先验以及新的序列预测损失项如何导致更平滑的注意和更高效的多智能体轨迹预测学习，并通过将其与合成和自然驾驶数据的最先进方法进行比较，展示了其在预测准确性方面的优势。我们在我们网站上的 INTERACTION 数据集上展示了我们的轨迹预测算法的性能。 本文提出了一种基于平滑注意力先验的多智能体轨迹预测方法，通过引入时间总变分平滑性先验来优化注意力机制。 Zhangjie Cao,Erdem Bıyık,Guy Rosman,Dorsa Sadigh cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Rahil Parikh,Ilya Kavalerov,Carol Espy-Wilson,Shihab Shamma
title: Harmonicity Plays a Critical Role in DNN Based Versus in Biologically-Inspired Monaural Speech Segregation Systems
title_zh: 和谐性在基于 DNN 的系统与受生物启发的单耳语音分离系统中发挥着关键作用
comment: 5 pages, IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, & Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2022
comments: 5 pages, IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, & Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2022
abstract: Recent advancements in deep learning have led to drastic improvements in speech segregation models. Despite their success and growing applicability, few efforts have been made to analyze the underlying principles that these networks learn to perform segregation. Here we analyze the role of harmonicity on two state-of-the-art Deep Neural Networks (DNN)-based models- Conv-TasNet and DPT-Net. We evaluate their performance with mixtures of natural speech versus slightly manipulated inharmonic speech, where harmonics are slightly frequency jittered. We find that performance deteriorates significantly if one source is even slightly harmonically jittered, e.g., an imperceptible 3% harmonic jitter degrades performance of Conv-TasNet from 15.4 dB to 0.70 dB. Training the model on inharmonic speech does not remedy this sensitivity, instead resulting in worse performance on natural speech mixtures, making inharmonicity a powerful adversarial factor in DNN models. Furthermore, additional analyses reveal that DNN algorithms deviate markedly from biologically inspired algorithms that rely primarily on timing cues and not harmonicity to segregate speech.
summary: Recent advancements in deep learning have led to drastic improvements in speech segregation models. Despite their success and growing applicability, few efforts have been made to analyze the underlying principles that these networks learn to perform segregation. Here we analyze the role of harmonicity on two state-of-the-art Deep Neural Networks (DNN)-based models- Conv-TasNet and DPT-Net. We evaluate their performance with mixtures of natural speech versus slightly manipulated inharmonic speech, where harmonics are slightly frequency jittered. We find that performance deteriorates significantly if one source is even slightly harmonically jittered, e.g., an imperceptible 3% harmonic jitter degrades performance of Conv-TasNet from 15.4 dB to 0.70 dB. Training the model on inharmonic speech does not remedy this sensitivity, instead resulting in worse performance on natural speech mixtures, making inharmonicity a powerful adversarial factor in DNN models. Furthermore, additional analyses reveal that DNN algorithms deviate markedly from biologically inspired algorithms that rely primarily on timing cues and not harmonicity to segregate speech.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展导致了语音隔离模型的巨大改进。尽管它们取得了成功并且适用性不断增强，但很少有人努力分析这些网络学习执行隔离的基本原理。在这里，我们分析了和谐性在两种最先进的基于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的模型（Conv-TasNet 和 DPT-Net）中的作用。我们通过自然语音与稍微操纵的不和谐语音的混合来评估它们的性能，其中谐波有轻微的频率抖动。我们发现，如果一个源出现轻微的谐波抖动，性能就会显着恶化，例如，难以察觉的 3% 谐波抖动会使 Conv-TasNet 的性能从 15.4 dB 降低到 0.70 dB。在不和谐语音上训练模型并不能弥补这种敏感性，反而会导致自然语音混合的性能更差，从而使不和谐成为 DNN 模型中强大的对抗因素。此外，额外的分析表明，DNN 算法明显偏离受生物学启发的算法，后者主要依赖于时间线索而不是和谐性来分离语音。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了和谐性在基于深度神经网络（DNN）和生物启发的单耳语音分离系统中的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在语音分离模型中取得了显著进展，但很少有研究分析这些网络学习分离语音所依赖的基本原理。
AI.method: 作者评估了两种最先进的DNN模型（Conv-TasNet和DPT-Net）在自然语音与略微不和谐语音混合情况下的性能，并通过引入轻微的谐波抖动来测试模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 发现即使轻微的谐波抖动（如3%）也会显著降低模型性能，且在不和谐语音上训练的模型在自然语音混合上表现更差。此外，DNN方法与依赖时间线索的生物启发方法存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 和谐性在DNN语音分离模型中起着关键作用，而不和谐性可作为对抗因素影响模型性能，DNN方法与生物启发方法在分离机制上存在显著差异。

authors_text: Mahroo Bahreinian,Marc Mitjans,Roy Xing,Roberto Tron
title: Sample-Based Output-Feedback Navigation with Bearing Measurements
title_zh: 基于样本的输出反馈导航和方位测量
comment: This work is submitted to the IROS 2022 conference
comments: This work is submitted to the IROS 2022 conference
abstract: We consider the problem of sample-based feedback-based motion planning from bearing (direction-only) measurements. We build on our previous work that defines a cell decomposition of the environment using RRT*, and finds an output feedback controller to navigate through each cell toward a goal location using duality, Control Lyapunov and Barrier Functions (CLF, CBF), and Linear Programming. In this paper, we propose a novel strategy that uses relative bearing measurements with respect to a set of landmarks in the environment, as opposed to full relative displacements. The main advantage is then that the measurements can be obtained using a simple monocular camera. We test the proposed algorithm in the simulation, and then in an experimental environment to evaluate the performance of our approach with respect to practical issues such as mismatches in the dynamical model of the robot, and measurements acquired with a camera with a limited field of view.
summary: We consider the problem of sample-based feedback-based motion planning from bearing (direction-only) measurements. We build on our previous work that defines a cell decomposition of the environment using RRT*, and finds an output feedback controller to navigate through each cell toward a goal location using duality, Control Lyapunov and Barrier Functions (CLF, CBF), and Linear Programming. In this paper, we propose a novel strategy that uses relative bearing measurements with respect to a set of landmarks in the environment, as opposed to full relative displacements. The main advantage is then that the measurements can be obtained using a simple monocular camera. We test the proposed algorithm in the simulation, and then in an experimental environment to evaluate the performance of our approach with respect to practical issues such as mismatches in the dynamical model of the robot, and measurements acquired with a camera with a limited field of view.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑来自方位（仅方向）测量的基于样本的基于反馈的运动规划问题。我们以之前的工作为基础，使用 RRT* 定义环境的单元分解，并找到一个输出反馈控制器，使用对偶性、控制李雅普诺夫和势垒函数（CLF、CBF）以及线性规划，在每个单元中导航至目标位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的策略，该策略使用相对于环境中一组地标的相对方位测量，而不是完全相对位移。主要优点是可以使用简单的单目相机获得测量结果。我们在模拟中测试所提出的算法，然后在实验环境中评估我们的方法在实际问题方面的性能，例如机器人动态模型的不匹配以及使用有限视场的相机获取的测量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于样本的输出反馈导航方法，利用环境中的地标相对方位测量进行路径规划。
AI.motivation: 传统导航依赖完整位移信息，但实际中仅能获取方向信息。本文旨在通过单目相机等简单传感器实现有效导航，降低硬件要求。
AI.method: 结合RRT*细胞分解、控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）、控制屏障函数（CBF）及线性规划，利用地标相对方位测量构建输出反馈控制器。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证了算法在模型失配和有限相机视野下的有效性，证明方法在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过方位测量实现导航，兼顾理论严谨性与工程实用性，为低成本自主导航提供新思路。

authors_text: Reza Lotfidereshgi,Philippe Gournay
title: Practical cognitive speech compression
title_zh: 实用认知语音压缩
abstract: This paper presents a new neural speech compression method that is practical in the sense that it operates at low bitrate, introduces a low latency, is compatible in computational complexity with current mobile devices, and provides a subjective quality that is comparable to that of standard mobile-telephony codecs. Other recently proposed neural vocoders also have the ability to operate at low bitrate. However, they do not produce the same level of subjective quality as standard codecs. On the other hand, standard codecs rely on objective and short-term metrics such as the segmental signal-to-noise ratio that correlate only weakly with perception. Furthermore, standard codecs are less efficient than unsupervised neural networks at capturing speech attributes, especially long-term ones. The proposed method combines a cognitive-coding encoder that extracts an interpretable unsupervised hierarchical representation with a multi stage decoder that has a GAN-based architecture. We observe that this method is very robust to the quantization of representation features. An AB test was conducted on a subset of the Harvard sentences that are commonly used to evaluate standard mobile-telephony codecs. The results show that the proposed method outperforms the standard AMR-WB codec in terms of delay, bitrate and subjective quality.
summary: This paper presents a new neural speech compression method that is practical in the sense that it operates at low bitrate, introduces a low latency, is compatible in computational complexity with current mobile devices, and provides a subjective quality that is comparable to that of standard mobile-telephony codecs. Other recently proposed neural vocoders also have the ability to operate at low bitrate. However, they do not produce the same level of subjective quality as standard codecs. On the other hand, standard codecs rely on objective and short-term metrics such as the segmental signal-to-noise ratio that correlate only weakly with perception. Furthermore, standard codecs are less efficient than unsupervised neural networks at capturing speech attributes, especially long-term ones. The proposed method combines a cognitive-coding encoder that extracts an interpretable unsupervised hierarchical representation with a multi stage decoder that has a GAN-based architecture. We observe that this method is very robust to the quantization of representation features. An AB test was conducted on a subset of the Harvard sentences that are commonly used to evaluate standard mobile-telephony codecs. The results show that the proposed method outperforms the standard AMR-WB codec in terms of delay, bitrate and subjective quality.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的神经语音压缩方法，该方法在低比特率下运行、引入低延迟、在计算复杂性上与当前移动设备兼容、并提供与标准移动电话编解码器相当的主观质量方面是实用的。其他最近提出的神经声码器也能够以低比特率运行。然而，它们无法产生与标准编解码器相同水平的主观质量。另一方面，标准编解码器依赖于客观和短期指标，例如与感知相关性较弱的分段信噪比。此外，标准编解码器在捕获语音属性（尤其是长期语音属性）方面的效率低于无监督神经网络。所提出的方法将提取可解释的无监督分层表示的认知编码编码器与具有基于 GAN 架构的多级解码器相结合。我们观察到该方法对于表示特征的量化非常稳健。对哈佛句子的子集进行了 AB 测试，这些句子通常用于评估标准移动电话编解码器。结果表明，该方法在延迟、比特率和主观质量方面优于标准 AMR-WB 编解码器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实用的神经语音压缩方法，能够在低比特率、低延迟和与当前移动设备计算复杂度兼容的情况下，提供与标准移动电话编解码器相当的主观质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经语音编解码器虽然能在低比特率下运行，但其主观质量不如标准编解码器，而标准编解码器则依赖于与感知相关性较弱的客观和短期指标，且在捕捉语音属性（尤其是长期属性）方面效率较低。
AI.method: 本文方法结合了认知编码器和多阶段解码器，其中编码器提取可解释的无监督分层表示，解码器采用基于GAN的架构。该方法对表示特征的量化具有很强的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在哈佛句子子集上进行AB测试的结果表明，该方法在延迟、比特率和主观质量方面优于标准AMR-WB编解码器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在低比特率、低延迟和计算复杂度方面表现良好，同时在主观质量上优于传统标准编解码器，为语音压缩提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Maura Pintor,Daniele Angioni,Angelo Sotgiu,Luca Demetrio,Ambra Demontis,Battista Biggio,Fabio Roli
title: ImageNet-Patch: A Dataset for Benchmarking Machine Learning Robustness against Adversarial Patches
title_zh: ImageNet-Patch：用于针对对抗性补丁进行机器学习鲁棒性基准测试的数据集
abstract: Adversarial patches are optimized contiguous pixel blocks in an input image that cause a machine-learning model to misclassify it. However, their optimization is computationally demanding, and requires careful hyperparameter tuning, potentially leading to suboptimal robustness evaluations. To overcome these issues, we propose ImageNet-Patch, a dataset to benchmark machine-learning models against adversarial patches. It consists of a set of patches, optimized to generalize across different models, and readily applicable to ImageNet data after preprocessing them with affine transformations. This process enables an approximate yet faster robustness evaluation, leveraging the transferability of adversarial perturbations. We showcase the usefulness of this dataset by testing the effectiveness of the computed patches against 127 models. We conclude by discussing how our dataset could be used as a benchmark for robustness, and how our methodology can be generalized to other domains. We open source our dataset and evaluation code at https://github.com/pralab/ImageNet-Patch.
summary: Adversarial patches are optimized contiguous pixel blocks in an input image that cause a machine-learning model to misclassify it. However, their optimization is computationally demanding, and requires careful hyperparameter tuning, potentially leading to suboptimal robustness evaluations. To overcome these issues, we propose ImageNet-Patch, a dataset to benchmark machine-learning models against adversarial patches. It consists of a set of patches, optimized to generalize across different models, and readily applicable to ImageNet data after preprocessing them with affine transformations. This process enables an approximate yet faster robustness evaluation, leveraging the transferability of adversarial perturbations. We showcase the usefulness of this dataset by testing the effectiveness of the computed patches against 127 models. We conclude by discussing how our dataset could be used as a benchmark for robustness, and how our methodology can be generalized to other domains. We open source our dataset and evaluation code at https://github.com/pralab/ImageNet-Patch.
abstract_zh: 对抗性补丁是输入图像中优化的连续像素块，导致机器学习模型对其进行错误分类。然而，它们的优化对计算要求很高，并且需要仔细的超参数调整，可能导致鲁棒性评估不理想。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了 ImageNet-Patch，这是一个用于针对对抗性补丁对机器学习模型进行基准测试的数据集。它由一组补丁组成，经过优化以泛化不同的模型，并且在使用仿射变换对 ImageNet 数据进行预处理后可以轻松应用于 ImageNet 数据。该过程利用对抗性扰动的可转移性，实现近似但更快的鲁棒性评估。我们通过针对 127 个模型测试计算补丁的有效性来展示该数据集的实用性。最后，我们讨论了如何将我们的数据集用作稳健性的基准，以及如何将我们的方法推广到其他领域。我们在 https://github.com/pralab/ImageNet-Patch 开源了我们的数据集和评估代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImageNet-Patch数据集，用于评估机器学习模型对对抗性补丁的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗性补丁的优化过程计算量大且需要精细调参，导致鲁棒性评估效率低下且结果可能不准确。
AI.method: 构建包含跨模型优化补丁的数据集，通过仿射变换预处理ImageNet数据，利用对抗扰动的可迁移性实现快速评估。
AI.result: 测试了127个模型验证补丁有效性，并展示数据集作为鲁棒性基准的潜力及方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可作为标准基准，其方法论可扩展至其他领域，代码已开源。

authors_text: Rayan El Helou,Kiyeob Lee,Dongqi Wu,Le Xie,Srinivas Shakkottai,Vijay Subramanian
title: OpenGridGym: An Open-Source AI-Friendly Toolkit for Distribution Market Simulation
title_zh: OpenGridGym：用于分销市场模拟的开源人工智能友好工具包
abstract: This paper presents OpenGridGym, an open-source Python-based package that allows for seamless integration of distribution market simulation with state-of-the-art artificial intelligence (AI) decision-making algorithms. We present the architecture and design choice for the proposed framework, elaborate on how users interact with OpenGridGym, and highlight its value by providing multiple cases to demonstrate its use. Four modules are used in any simulation: (1) the physical grid, (2) market mechanisms, (3) a set of trainable agents which interact with the former two modules, and (4) environment module that connects and coordinates the above three. We provide templates for each of those four, but they are easily interchangeable with custom alternatives. Several case studies are presented to illustrate the capability and potential of this toolkit in helping researchers address key design and operational questions in distribution electricity markets.
summary: This paper presents OpenGridGym, an open-source Python-based package that allows for seamless integration of distribution market simulation with state-of-the-art artificial intelligence (AI) decision-making algorithms. We present the architecture and design choice for the proposed framework, elaborate on how users interact with OpenGridGym, and highlight its value by providing multiple cases to demonstrate its use. Four modules are used in any simulation: (1) the physical grid, (2) market mechanisms, (3) a set of trainable agents which interact with the former two modules, and (4) environment module that connects and coordinates the above three. We provide templates for each of those four, but they are easily interchangeable with custom alternatives. Several case studies are presented to illustrate the capability and potential of this toolkit in helping researchers address key design and operational questions in distribution electricity markets.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 OpenGridGym，这是一个基于 Python 的开源软件包，可以将分销市场模拟与最先进的人工智能 (AI) 决策算法无缝集成。我们展示了所提出的框架的架构和设计选择，详细说明了用户如何与 OpenGridGym 交互，并通过提供多个案例来展示其使用来强调其价值。任何模拟中都会使用四个模块：（1）物理网格，（2）市场机制，（3）一组与前两个模块交互的可训练代理，以及（4）连接和协调上述三个模块的环境模块。我们为这四个中的每一个提供了模板，但它们可以轻松地与自定义替代方案互换。提供了几个案例研究来说明该工具包在帮助研究人员解决配电电力市场的关键设计和运营问题方面的能力和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenGridGym，一个开源的Python工具包，旨在将配电市场模拟与先进的人工智能决策算法无缝集成。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏一个灵活且模块化的平台来支持AI算法在配电市场中的应用，需通过开源工具促进AI与电力市场仿真技术的结合。
AI.method: 设计包含物理电网、市场机制、可训练智能体及环境协调模块的四层架构，提供可替换模板以支持定制化需求。
AI.result: 通过多个案例验证了OpenGridGym在解决配电市场设计与运营问题中的有效性，展示了其灵活性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: OpenGridGym为研究者提供了一个开放、可扩展的平台，推动AI技术在电力市场领域的深入探索与应用。

search_text: OpenGridGym: An Open-Source AI-Friendly Toolkit for Distribution Market Simulation OpenGridGym：用于分销市场模拟的开源人工智能友好工具包 This paper presents OpenGridGym, an open-source Python-based package that allows for seamless integration of distribution market simulation with state-of-the-art artificial intelligence (AI) decision-making algorithms. We present the architecture and design choice for the proposed framework, elaborate on how users interact with OpenGridGym, and highlight its value by providing multiple cases to demonstrate its use. Four modules are used in any simulation: (1) the physical grid, (2) market mechanisms, (3) a set of trainable agents which interact with the former two modules, and (4) environment module that connects and coordinates the above three. We provide templates for each of those four, but they are easily interchangeable with custom alternatives. Several case studies are presented to illustrate the capability and potential of this toolkit in helping researchers address key design and operational questions in distribution electricity markets. 本文介绍了 OpenGridGym，这是一个基于 Python 的开源软件包，可以将分销市场模拟与最先进的人工智能 (AI) 决策算法无缝集成。我们展示了所提出的框架的架构和设计选择，详细说明了用户如何与 OpenGridGym 交互，并通过提供多个案例来展示其使用来强调其价值。任何模拟中都会使用四个模块：（1）物理网格，（2）市场机制，（3）一组与前两个模块交互的可训练代理，以及（4）连接和协调上述三个模块的环境模块。我们为这四个中的每一个提供了模板，但它们可以轻松地与自定义替代方案互换。提供了几个案例研究来说明该工具包在帮助研究人员解决配电电力市场的关键设计和运营问题方面的能力和潜力。 本文提出OpenGridGym，一个开源的Python工具包，旨在将配电市场模拟与先进的人工智能决策算法无缝集成。 Rayan El Helou,Kiyeob Lee,Dongqi Wu,Le Xie,Srinivas Shakkottai,Vijay Subramanian cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Jun Yuan,Jesse Vig,Nazneen Rajani
title: iSEA: An Interactive Pipeline for Semantic Error Analysis of NLP Models
title_zh: iSEA：用于 NLP 模型语义错误分析的交互式管道
abstract: Error analysis in NLP models is essential to successful model development and deployment. One common approach for diagnosing errors is to identify subpopulations in the dataset where the model produces the most errors. However, existing approaches typically define subpopulations based on pre-defined features, which requires users to form hypotheses of errors in advance. To complement these approaches, we propose iSEA, an Interactive Pipeline for Semantic Error Analysis in NLP Models, which automatically discovers semantically-grounded subpopulations with high error rates in the context of a human-in-the-loop interactive system. iSEA enables model developers to learn more about their model errors through discovered subpopulations, validate the sources of errors through interactive analysis on the discovered subpopulations, and test hypotheses about model errors by defining custom subpopulations. The tool supports semantic descriptions of error-prone subpopulations at the token and concept level, as well as pre-defined higher-level features. Through use cases and expert interviews, we demonstrate how iSEA can assist error understanding and analysis.
summary: Error analysis in NLP models is essential to successful model development and deployment. One common approach for diagnosing errors is to identify subpopulations in the dataset where the model produces the most errors. However, existing approaches typically define subpopulations based on pre-defined features, which requires users to form hypotheses of errors in advance. To complement these approaches, we propose iSEA, an Interactive Pipeline for Semantic Error Analysis in NLP Models, which automatically discovers semantically-grounded subpopulations with high error rates in the context of a human-in-the-loop interactive system. iSEA enables model developers to learn more about their model errors through discovered subpopulations, validate the sources of errors through interactive analysis on the discovered subpopulations, and test hypotheses about model errors by defining custom subpopulations. The tool supports semantic descriptions of error-prone subpopulations at the token and concept level, as well as pre-defined higher-level features. Through use cases and expert interviews, we demonstrate how iSEA can assist error understanding and analysis.
abstract_zh: NLP 模型中的错误分析对于成功的模型开发和部署至关重要。诊断错误的一种常见方法是识别数据集中模型产生最多错误的子群体。然而，现有的方法通常基于预定义的特征来定义子群，这需要用户提前形成错误假设。为了补充这些方法，我们提出了 iSEA，一种用于 NLP 模型中语义错误分析的交互式管道，它可以在人机交互系统的背景下自动发现具有高错误率的基于语义的子群。 iSEA 使模型开发人员能够通过发现的子群体了解有关模型错误的更多信息，通过对发现的子群体进行交互式分析来验证错误来源，并通过定义自定义子群体来测试有关模型错误的假设。该工具支持在令牌和概念级别上容易出错的子群体的语义描述，以及预定义的更高级别的功能。通过用例和专家访谈，我们展示了 iSEA 如何帮助错误理解和分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iSEA工具，通过交互式系统自动发现语义相关的高错误率子群体，辅助NLP模型错误分析。
AI.motivation: 现有错误分析方法依赖预定义特征，需用户预先假设错误来源，限制了分析灵活性和深度。
AI.method: 构建交互式流水线iSEA，结合语义描述与用户反馈，自动识别token/概念级语义子群体并支持自定义分析。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和专家访谈验证，iSEA有效提升模型错误理解效率及错误根源定位准确性。
AI.conclusion: iSEA通过语义驱动的交互分析，为NLP模型开发提供了更高效、灵活的错误诊断解决方案。

authors_text: Phoenix Williams,Ke Li
title: Art-Attack: Black-Box Adversarial Attack via Evolutionary Art
title_zh: 艺术攻击：通过进化艺术进行黑盒对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks but have shown extreme vulnerabilities to attacks generated by adversarial examples. Many works go with a white-box attack that assumes total access to the targeted model including its architecture and gradients. A more realistic assumption is the black-box scenario where an attacker only has access to the targeted model by querying some input and observing its predicted class probabilities. Different from most prevalent black-box attacks that make use of substitute models or gradient estimation, this paper proposes a gradient-free attack by using a concept of evolutionary art to generate adversarial examples that iteratively evolves a set of overlapping transparent shapes. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we attack three state-of-the-art image classification models trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset in a targeted manner. We conduct a parameter study outlining the impact the number and type of shapes have on the proposed attack's performance. In comparison to state-of-the-art black-box attacks, our attack is more effective at generating adversarial examples and achieves a higher attack success rate on all three baseline models.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many tasks but have shown extreme vulnerabilities to attacks generated by adversarial examples. Many works go with a white-box attack that assumes total access to the targeted model including its architecture and gradients. A more realistic assumption is the black-box scenario where an attacker only has access to the targeted model by querying some input and observing its predicted class probabilities. Different from most prevalent black-box attacks that make use of substitute models or gradient estimation, this paper proposes a gradient-free attack by using a concept of evolutionary art to generate adversarial examples that iteratively evolves a set of overlapping transparent shapes. To evaluate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we attack three state-of-the-art image classification models trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset in a targeted manner. We conduct a parameter study outlining the impact the number and type of shapes have on the proposed attack's performance. In comparison to state-of-the-art black-box attacks, our attack is more effective at generating adversarial examples and achieves a higher attack success rate on all three baseline models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在许多任务中都取得了最先进的性能，但在对抗性示例生成的攻击面前却表现出了极端的脆弱性。许多作品都采用白盒攻击，假设可以完全访问目标模型，包括其架构和梯度。更现实的假设是黑盒场景，其中攻击者只能通过查询某些输入并观察其预测的类别概率来访问目标模型。与最流行的利用替代模型或梯度估计的黑盒攻击不同，本文提出了一种无梯度攻击，通过使用进化艺术的概念来生成对抗性示例，迭代地进化出一组重叠的透明形状。为了评估我们提出的方法的有效性，我们有针对性地攻击在 CIFAR-10 数据集上训练的三个最先进的图像分类模型。我们进行了参数研究，概述了形状的数量和类型对拟议攻击性能的影响。与最先进的黑盒攻击相比，我们的攻击在生成对抗性示例方面更有效，并且在所有三个基线模型上实现了更高的攻击成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化艺术的黑盒对抗攻击方法Art-Attack，通过迭代生成重叠透明形状生成对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击依赖替代模型或梯度估计，而实际场景中攻击者难以获取模型内部信息，需更现实的无梯度攻击方法。
AI.method: 利用进化艺术概念，通过迭代进化机制生成并优化重叠透明形状，无需梯度估计直接生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上的三个主流模型攻击实验显示，该方法成功率优于现有黑盒攻击技术。
AI.conclusion: Art-Attack通过创新的形状进化机制，在黑盒场景下实现了更高效的对抗样本生成。

authors_text: Alessio Burrello,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Pierangelo Maria Rapa,Matilde Semilia,Matteo Risso,Tommaso Polonelli,Massimo Poncino,Luca Benini,Simone Benatti
title: Embedding Temporal Convolutional Networks for Energy-Efficient PPG-Based Heart Rate Monitoring
title_zh: 嵌入时间卷积网络以实现基于 PPG 的节能心率监测
abstract: Photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors allow for non-invasive and comfortable heart-rate (HR) monitoring, suitable for compact wrist-worn devices. Unfortunately, Motion Artifacts (MAs) severely impact the monitoring accuracy, causing high variability in the skin-to-sensor interface. Several data fusion techniques have been introduced to cope with this problem, based on combining PPG signals with inertial sensor data. Until know, both commercial and reasearch solutions are computationally efficient but not very robust, or strongly dependent on hand-tuned parameters, which leads to poor generalization performance. % In this work, we tackle these limitations by proposing a computationally lightweight yet robust deep learning-based approach for PPG-based HR estimation. Specifically, we derive a diverse set of Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN) for HR estimation, leveraging Neural Architecture Search (NAS). Moreover, we also introduce ActPPG, an adaptive algorithm that selects among multiple HR estimators depending on the amount of MAs, to improve energy efficiency. We validate our approaches on two benchmark datasets, achieving as low as 3.84 Beats per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE) on PPGDalia, which outperforms the previous state-of-the-art. Moreover, we deploy our models on a low-power commercial microcontroller (STM32L4), obtaining a rich set of Pareto optimal solutions in the complexity vs. accuracy space.
summary: Photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors allow for non-invasive and comfortable heart-rate (HR) monitoring, suitable for compact wrist-worn devices. Unfortunately, Motion Artifacts (MAs) severely impact the monitoring accuracy, causing high variability in the skin-to-sensor interface. Several data fusion techniques have been introduced to cope with this problem, based on combining PPG signals with inertial sensor data. Until know, both commercial and reasearch solutions are computationally efficient but not very robust, or strongly dependent on hand-tuned parameters, which leads to poor generalization performance. % In this work, we tackle these limitations by proposing a computationally lightweight yet robust deep learning-based approach for PPG-based HR estimation. Specifically, we derive a diverse set of Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN) for HR estimation, leveraging Neural Architecture Search (NAS). Moreover, we also introduce ActPPG, an adaptive algorithm that selects among multiple HR estimators depending on the amount of MAs, to improve energy efficiency. We validate our approaches on two benchmark datasets, achieving as low as 3.84 Beats per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE) on PPGDalia, which outperforms the previous state-of-the-art. Moreover, we deploy our models on a low-power commercial microcontroller (STM32L4), obtaining a rich set of Pareto optimal solutions in the complexity vs. accuracy space.
abstract_zh: 光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器可实现无创且舒适的心率 (HR) 监测，适用于紧凑型腕戴设备。不幸的是，运动伪影（MA）严重影响监测精度，导致皮肤与传感器界面的高度可变性。为了解决这个问题，人们引入了几种基于 PPG 信号与惯性传感器数据相结合的数据融合技术。到目前为止，商业和研究解决方案的计算效率都很高，但不是很稳健，或者强烈依赖于手动调整的参数，从而导致泛化性能较差。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种计算量轻但稳健的基于深度学习的方法来解决这些限制，该方法用于基于 PPG 的 HR 估计。具体来说，我们利用神经架构搜索 (NAS) 推导出一组不同的时间卷积网络 (TCN) 用于 HR 估计。此外，我们还引入了 ActPPG，一种自适应算法，可根据 MA​​ 的数量在多个 HR 估计器中进行选择，以提高能源效率。我们在两个基准数据集上验证了我们的方法，在 PPGDalia 上实现了低至 3.84 节拍每分钟 (BPM) 的平均绝对误差 (MAE)，这优于之前的最先进技术。此外，我们将模型部署在低功耗商用微控制器（STM32L4）上，在复杂性与准确性空间中获得丰富的帕累托最优解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的轻量级算法，用于提高PPG信号心率监测的鲁棒性和能效。
AI.motivation: 现有PPG心率监测方案在运动伪影干扰下精度不足，且依赖手工调参导致泛化性差。
AI.method: 通过神经架构搜索设计多组时序卷积网络（TCN），并提出自适应算法ActPPG根据运动伪影动态选择最优估计器。
AI.result: 在PPGDalia数据集上实现3.84 BPM的MAE，优于现有最佳方法，并在STM32L4微控制器上验证了能效优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在复杂度与精度间取得帕累托最优解，为可穿戴设备提供了高效可靠的心率监测方案。

search_text: Embedding Temporal Convolutional Networks for Energy-Efficient PPG-Based Heart Rate Monitoring 嵌入时间卷积网络以实现基于 PPG 的节能心率监测 Photoplethysmography (PPG) sensors allow for non-invasive and comfortable heart-rate (HR) monitoring, suitable for compact wrist-worn devices. Unfortunately, Motion Artifacts (MAs) severely impact the monitoring accuracy, causing high variability in the skin-to-sensor interface. Several data fusion techniques have been introduced to cope with this problem, based on combining PPG signals with inertial sensor data. Until know, both commercial and reasearch solutions are computationally efficient but not very robust, or strongly dependent on hand-tuned parameters, which leads to poor generalization performance. % In this work, we tackle these limitations by proposing a computationally lightweight yet robust deep learning-based approach for PPG-based HR estimation. Specifically, we derive a diverse set of Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN) for HR estimation, leveraging Neural Architecture Search (NAS). Moreover, we also introduce ActPPG, an adaptive algorithm that selects among multiple HR estimators depending on the amount of MAs, to improve energy efficiency. We validate our approaches on two benchmark datasets, achieving as low as 3.84 Beats per Minute (BPM) of Mean Absolute Error (MAE) on PPGDalia, which outperforms the previous state-of-the-art. Moreover, we deploy our models on a low-power commercial microcontroller (STM32L4), obtaining a rich set of Pareto optimal solutions in the complexity vs. accuracy space. 光电体积描记法 (PPG) 传感器可实现无创且舒适的心率 (HR) 监测，适用于紧凑型腕戴设备。不幸的是，运动伪影（MA）严重影响监测精度，导致皮肤与传感器界面的高度可变性。为了解决这个问题，人们引入了几种基于 PPG 信号与惯性传感器数据相结合的数据融合技术。到目前为止，商业和研究解决方案的计算效率都很高，但不是很稳健，或者强烈依赖于手动调整的参数，从而导致泛化性能较差。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种计算量轻但稳健的基于深度学习的方法来解决这些限制，该方法用于基于 PPG 的 HR 估计。具体来说，我们利用神经架构搜索 (NAS) 推导出一组不同的时间卷积网络 (TCN) 用于 HR 估计。此外，我们还引入了 ActPPG，一种自适应算法，可根据 MA​​ 的数量在多个 HR 估计器中进行选择，以提高能源效率。我们在两个基准数据集上验证了我们的方法，在 PPGDalia 上实现了低至 3.84 节拍每分钟 (BPM) 的平均绝对误差 (MAE)，这优于之前的最先进技术。此外，我们将模型部署在低功耗商用微控制器（STM32L4）上，在复杂性与准确性空间中获得丰富的帕累托最优解决方案。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的轻量级算法，用于提高PPG信号心率监测的鲁棒性和能效。 Alessio Burrello,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Pierangelo Maria Rapa,Matilde Semilia,Matteo Risso,Tommaso Polonelli,Massimo Poncino,Luca Benini,Simone Benatti eess.SP,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Girmaw Abebe Tadesse,William Ogallo,Celia Cintas,Skyler Speakman
title: Model-free feature selection to facilitate automatic discovery of divergent subgroups in tabular data
title_zh: 无模型特征选择有助于自动发现表格数据中的不同子组
abstract: Data-centric AI encourages the need of cleaning and understanding of data in order to achieve trustworthy AI. Existing technologies, such as AutoML, make it easier to design and train models automatically, but there is a lack of a similar level of capabilities to extract data-centric insights. Manual stratification of tabular data per a feature (e.g., gender) is limited to scale up for higher feature dimension, which could be addressed using automatic discovery of divergent subgroups. Nonetheless, these automatic discovery techniques often search across potentially exponential combinations of features that could be simplified using a preceding feature selection step. Existing feature selection techniques for tabular data often involve fitting a particular model in order to select important features. However, such model-based selection is prone to model-bias and spurious correlations in addition to requiring extra resource to design, fine-tune and train a model. In this paper, we propose a model-free and sparsity-based automatic feature selection (SAFS) framework to facilitate automatic discovery of divergent subgroups. Different from filter-based selection techniques, we exploit the sparsity of objective measures among feature values to rank and select features. We validated SAFS across two publicly available datasets (MIMIC-III and Allstate Claims) and compared it with six existing feature selection methods. SAFS achieves a reduction of feature selection time by a factor of 81x and 104x, averaged cross the existing methods in the MIMIC-III and Claims datasets respectively. SAFS-selected features are also shown to achieve competitive detection performance, e.g., 18.3% of features selected by SAFS in the Claims dataset detected divergent samples similar to those detected by using the whole features with a Jaccard similarity of 0.95 but with a 16x reduction in detection time.

Existing technologies, such as AutoML, make it easier to design and train models automatically, but there is a lack of a similar level of capabilities to extract data-centric insights. Manual stratification of tabular data per a feature (e.g., gender) is limited to scale up for higher feature dimension, which could be addressed using automatic discovery of divergent subgroups. Nonetheless, these automatic discovery techniques often search across potentially exponential combinations of features that could be simplified using a preceding feature selection step. Existing feature selection techniques for tabular data often involve fitting a particular model in order to select important features. However, such model-based selection is prone to model-bias and spurious correlations in addition to requiring extra resource to design, fine-tune and train a model. In this paper, we propose a model-free and sparsity-based automatic feature selection (SAFS) framework to facilitate automatic discovery of divergent subgroups. Different from filter-based selection techniques, we exploit the sparsity of objective measures among feature values to rank and select features. We validated SAFS across two publicly available datasets (MIMIC-III and Allstate Claims) and compared it with six existing feature selection methods. SAFS achieves a reduction of feature selection time by a factor of 81x and 104x, averaged cross the existing methods in the MIMIC-III and Claims datasets respectively. SAFS-selected features are also shown to achieve competitive detection performance, e.g., 18.3% of features selected by SAFS in the Claims dataset detected divergent samples similar to those detected by using the whole features with a Jaccard similarity of 0.95 but with a 16x reduction in detection time.
abstract_zh: 以数据为中心的人工智能鼓励需要清理和理解数据，以实现值得信赖的人工智能。 AutoML 等现有技术可以更轻松地自动设计和训练模型，但缺乏类似水平的功能来提取以数据为中心的见解。每个特征（例如性别）的表格数据的手动分层仅限于扩大到更高的特征维度，这可以通过自动发现不同的子组来解决。尽管如此，这些自动发现技术通常会搜索潜在的指数特征组合，这些特征组合可以使用前面的特征选择步骤进行简化。现有的表格数据特征选择技术通常涉及拟合特定模型以选择重要特征。然而，这种基于模型的选择除了需要额外的资源来设计、微调和训练模型外，还容易出现模型偏差和虚假相关性。在本文中，我们提出了一种无模型且基于稀疏性的自动特征选择（SAFS）框架，以促进不同子组的自动发现。与基于过滤器的选择技术不同，我们利用特征值之间客观度量的稀疏性来排序和选择特征。我们在两个公开可用的数据集（MIMIC-III 和 Allstate Claims）上验证了 SAFS，并将其与六种现有的特征选择方法进行了比较。 SAFS 将特征选择时间缩短了 81 倍和 104 倍，分别是 MIMIC-III 和 Claims 数据集中现有方法的平均值。 SAFS 选择的特征还显示出具有竞争性的检测性能，例如，SAFS 在索赔数据集中选择的特征中有 18.3% 检测到了与使用整个特征检测到的发散样本相似的样本，Jaccard 相似度为 0.95，但检测时间缩短了 16 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需模型的稀疏性特征选择框架（SAFS），用于加速表格数据中分歧子群的自动发现。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择方法依赖模型训练易产生偏差且耗时，而手动分层方法难以扩展至高维数据，需开发高效自动化的特征选择技术。
AI.method: 基于特征值稀疏性度量进行排序选择，通过稀疏性分析直接筛选关键特征，无需拟合特定模型。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III和Allstate Claims数据集上，SAFS分别比现有方法快81倍和104倍，且使用18.3%特征即可达到95% Jaccard相似度的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: SAFS通过稀疏性分析实现了高效特征选择，在保持检测性能的同时显著降低计算成本，为数据驱动型AI提供了可扩展解决方案。

authors_text: Sean Gunn,Jorio Cocola,Paul Hand
title: Regularized Training of Intermediate Layers for Generative Models for Inverse Problems
title_zh: 反问题生成模型中间层的正则化训练
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been shown to be powerful and flexible priors when solving inverse problems. One challenge of using them is overcoming representation error, the fundamental limitation of the network in representing any particular signal. Recently, multiple proposed inversion algorithms reduce representation error by optimizing over intermediate layer representations. These methods are typically applied to generative models that were trained agnostic of the downstream inversion algorithm. In our work, we introduce a principle that if a generative model is intended for inversion using an algorithm based on optimization of intermediate layers, it should be trained in a way that regularizes those intermediate layers. We instantiate this principle for two notable recent inversion algorithms: Intermediate Layer Optimization and the Multi-Code GAN prior. For both of these inversion algorithms, we introduce a new regularized GAN training algorithm and demonstrate that the learned generative model results in lower reconstruction errors across a wide range of under sampling ratios when solving compressed sensing, inpainting, and super-resolution problems.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been shown to be powerful and flexible priors when solving inverse problems. One challenge of using them is overcoming representation error, the fundamental limitation of the network in representing any particular signal. Recently, multiple proposed inversion algorithms reduce representation error by optimizing over intermediate layer representations. These methods are typically applied to generative models that were trained agnostic of the downstream inversion algorithm. In our work, we introduce a principle that if a generative model is intended for inversion using an algorithm based on optimization of intermediate layers, it should be trained in a way that regularizes those intermediate layers. We instantiate this principle for two notable recent inversion algorithms: Intermediate Layer Optimization and the Multi-Code GAN prior. For both of these inversion algorithms, we introduce a new regularized GAN training algorithm and demonstrate that the learned generative model results in lower reconstruction errors across a wide range of under sampling ratios when solving compressed sensing, inpainting, and super-resolution problems.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）已被证明在解决逆问题时具有强大且灵活的先验能力。使用它们的一个挑战是克服表示错误，这是网络在表示任何特定信号时的基本限制。最近，提出的多种反演算法通过优化中间层表示来减少表示误差。这些方法通常应用于与下游反演算法无关的训练生成模型。在我们的工作中，我们引入了一个原则，如果生成模型打算使用基于中间层优化的算法进行反演，则应该以规范这些中间层的方式对其进行训练。我们用最近两个著名的反演算法实例化了这一原理：中间层优化和多代码 GAN 先验。对于这两种反演算法，我们引入了一种新的正则化 GAN 训练算法，并证明了在解决压缩感知、修复和超分辨率问题时，学习的生成模型可以在各种欠采样率下实现较低的重建误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对逆问题的生成模型中间层正则化训练方法，以降低表示误差并提升重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在训练时未考虑下游逆算法需求，导致中间层表示误差难以克服，限制了逆问题求解性能。
AI.method: 针对两种主流逆算法（中间层优化与多码GAN先验），设计正则化GAN训练方案，通过约束中间层特征提升模型表达能力。
AI.result: 在压缩感知、修复和超分任务中，新方法在不同欠采样比下均取得更低的重建误差，验证了正则化训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 中间层正则化训练可显著提升生成模型在逆问题中的鲁棒性，为相关应用提供了新的训练范式。

search_text: Regularized Training of Intermediate Layers for Generative Models for Inverse Problems 反问题生成模型中间层的正则化训练 Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have been shown to be powerful and flexible priors when solving inverse problems. One challenge of using them is overcoming representation error, the fundamental limitation of the network in representing any particular signal. Recently, multiple proposed inversion algorithms reduce representation error by optimizing over intermediate layer representations. These methods are typically applied to generative models that were trained agnostic of the downstream inversion algorithm. In our work, we introduce a principle that if a generative model is intended for inversion using an algorithm based on optimization of intermediate layers, it should be trained in a way that regularizes those intermediate layers. We instantiate this principle for two notable recent inversion algorithms: Intermediate Layer Optimization and the Multi-Code GAN prior. For both of these inversion algorithms, we introduce a new regularized GAN training algorithm and demonstrate that the learned generative model results in lower reconstruction errors across a wide range of under sampling ratios when solving compressed sensing, inpainting, and super-resolution problems. 生成对抗网络（GAN）已被证明在解决逆问题时具有强大且灵活的先验能力。使用它们的一个挑战是克服表示错误，这是网络在表示任何特定信号时的基本限制。最近，提出的多种反演算法通过优化中间层表示来减少表示误差。这些方法通常应用于与下游反演算法无关的训练生成模型。在我们的工作中，我们引入了一个原则，如果生成模型打算使用基于中间层优化的算法进行反演，则应该以规范这些中间层的方式对其进行训练。我们用最近两个著名的反演算法实例化了这一原理：中间层优化和多代码 GAN 先验。对于这两种反演算法，我们引入了一种新的正则化 GAN 训练算法，并证明了在解决压缩感知、修复和超分辨率问题时，学习的生成模型可以在各种欠采样率下实现较低的重建误差。 本文提出针对逆问题的生成模型中间层正则化训练方法，以降低表示误差并提升重建效果。 Sean Gunn,Jorio Cocola,Paul Hand cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Charul Giri,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Herke van Hoof,Christian D. Blakely
title: Logic-based AI for Interpretable Board Game Winner Prediction with Tsetlin Machine
title_zh: 基于逻辑的 AI 使用 Tsetlin 机器预测可解释的棋盘游戏获胜者
abstract: Hex is a turn-based two-player connection game with a high branching factor, making the game arbitrarily complex with increasing board sizes. As such, top-performing algorithms for playing Hex rely on accurate evaluation of board positions using neural networks. However, the limited interpretability of neural networks is problematic when the user wants to understand the reasoning behind the predictions made. In this paper, we propose to use propositional logic expressions to describe winning and losing board game positions, facilitating precise visual interpretation. We employ a Tsetlin Machine (TM) to learn these expressions from previously played games, describing where pieces must be located or not located for a board position to be strong. Extensive experiments on $6\times6$ boards compare our TM-based solution with popular machine learning algorithms like XGBoost, InterpretML, decision trees, and neural networks, considering various board configurations with $2$ to $22$ moves played. On average, the TM testing accuracy is $92.1\%$, outperforming all the other evaluated algorithms. We further demonstrate the global interpretation of the logical expressions and map them down to particular board game configurations to investigate local interpretability. We believe the resulting interpretability establishes building blocks for accurate assistive AI and human-AI collaboration, also for more complex prediction tasks.
summary: Hex is a turn-based two-player connection game with a high branching factor, making the game arbitrarily complex with increasing board sizes. As such, top-performing algorithms for playing Hex rely on accurate evaluation of board positions using neural networks. However, the limited interpretability of neural networks is problematic when the user wants to understand the reasoning behind the predictions made. In this paper, we propose to use propositional logic expressions to describe winning and losing board game positions, facilitating precise visual interpretation. We employ a Tsetlin Machine (TM) to learn these expressions from previously played games, describing where pieces must be located or not located for a board position to be strong. Extensive experiments on $6\times6$ boards compare our TM-based solution with popular machine learning algorithms like XGBoost, InterpretML, decision trees, and neural networks, considering various board configurations with $2$ to $22$ moves played. On average, the TM testing accuracy is $92.1\%$, outperforming all the other evaluated algorithms. We further demonstrate the global interpretation of the logical expressions and map them down to particular board game configurations to investigate local interpretability. We believe the resulting interpretability establishes building blocks for accurate assistive AI and human-AI collaboration, also for more complex prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: Hex 是一款回合制两人连线游戏，具有高分支因子，随着棋盘尺寸的增加，游戏变得任意复杂。因此，玩十六进制的最佳算法依赖于使用神经网络对棋盘位置的准确评估。然而，当用户想要了解预测背后的推理时，神经网络的可解释性有限就会出现问题。在本文中，我们建议使用命题逻辑表达式来描述获胜和失败的棋盘游戏位置，以促进精确的视觉解释。我们使用 Tsetlin Machine (TM) 从之前玩过的游戏中学习这些表达式，描述棋子必须位于或不位于何处才能使棋盘位置更强。在 $6\times6$ 棋盘上进行的广泛实验将我们基于 TM 的解决方案与流行的机器学习算法（如 XGBoost、InterpretML、决策树和神经网络）进行比较，并考虑各种棋盘配置以及 $2$ 到 $22$ 的棋步。平均而言，TM 测试准确度为 $92.1\%$，优于所有其他评估算法。我们进一步演示了逻辑表达式的全局解释，并将它们映射到特定的棋盘游戏配置以研究局部可解释性。我们相信由此产生的可解释性为准确的辅助人工智能和人机协作以及更复杂的预测任务奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于逻辑表达式的可解释AI方法，利用Tsetlin机预测六边形棋盘游戏胜负，提升模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在复杂棋盘游戏中的预测结果缺乏可解释性，阻碍了用户理解决策逻辑及人机协作。
AI.method: 采用Tsetlin机从历史对局中学习命题逻辑表达式，描述棋盘关键位置的胜负规则，并与XGBoost、决策树等算法对比验证。
AI.result: 在6×6棋盘上，Tsetlin机测试准确率达92.1%，优于其他算法，且实现了全局与局部规则的可视化解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建可解释的辅助AI系统提供了基础，适用于复杂预测任务中的人机协同决策场景。

authors_text: Hui Yang,Abeer Alsadoon,P. W. C. Prasad,Thair Al-Dala'in,Tarik A. Rashid,Angelika Maag,Omar Hisham Alsadoon
title: Deep Learning Neural Networks for Emotion Classification from Text: Enhanced Leaky Rectified Linear Unit Activation and Weighted Loss
title_zh: 用于文本情感分类的深度学习神经网络：增强型泄漏整流线性单元激活和加权损失
abstract: Accurate emotion classification for online reviews is vital for business organizations to gain deeper insights into markets. Although deep learning has been successfully implemented in this area, accuracy and processing time are still major problems preventing it from reaching its full potential. This paper proposes an Enhanced Leaky Rectified Linear Unit activation and Weighted Loss (ELReLUWL) algorithm for enhanced text emotion classification and faster parameter convergence speed. This algorithm includes the definition of the inflection point and the slope for inputs on the left side of the inflection point to avoid gradient saturation. It also considers the weight of samples belonging to each class to compensate for the influence of data imbalance. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) combined with the proposed algorithm to increase the classification accuracy and decrease the processing time by eliminating the gradient saturation problem and minimizing the negative effect of data imbalance, demonstrated on a binary sentiment problem. The results show that the proposed solution achieves better classification performance in different data scenarios and different review types. The proposed model takes less convergence time to achieve model optimization with seven epochs against the current convergence time of 11.5 epochs on average. The proposed solution improves accuracy and reduces the processing time of text emotion classification. The solution provides an average class accuracy of 96.63% against a current average accuracy of 91.56%. It also provides a processing time of 23.3 milliseconds compared to the current average processing time of 33.2 milliseconds. Finally, this study solves the issues of gradient saturation and data imbalance. It enhances overall average class accuracy and decreases processing time.
summary: Accurate emotion classification for online reviews is vital for business organizations to gain deeper insights into markets. Although deep learning has been successfully implemented in this area, accuracy and processing time are still major problems preventing it from reaching its full potential. This paper proposes an Enhanced Leaky Rectified Linear Unit activation and Weighted Loss (ELReLUWL) algorithm for enhanced text emotion classification and faster parameter convergence speed. This algorithm includes the definition of the inflection point and the slope for inputs on the left side of the inflection point to avoid gradient saturation. It also considers the weight of samples belonging to each class to compensate for the influence of data imbalance. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) combined with the proposed algorithm to increase the classification accuracy and decrease the processing time by eliminating the gradient saturation problem and minimizing the negative effect of data imbalance, demonstrated on a binary sentiment problem. The results show that the proposed solution achieves better classification performance in different data scenarios and different review types. The proposed model takes less convergence time to achieve model optimization with seven epochs against the current convergence time of 11.5 epochs on average. The proposed solution improves accuracy and reduces the processing time of text emotion classification. The solution provides an average class accuracy of 96.63% against a current average accuracy of 91.56%. It also provides a processing time of 23.3 milliseconds compared to the current average processing time of 33.2 milliseconds. Finally, this study solves the issues of gradient saturation and data imbalance. It enhances overall average class accuracy and decreases processing time.
abstract_zh: 在线评论的准确情感分类对于商业组织深入了解市场至关重要。尽管深度学习已在该领域成功实施，但准确性和处理时间仍然是阻碍其充分发挥潜力的主要问题。本文提出了一种增强型泄漏修正线性单元激活和加权损失（ELReLUWL）算法，用于增强文本情感分类和更快的参数收敛速度。该算法包括拐点的定义以及拐点左侧输入的斜率，以避免梯度饱和。它还考虑属于每个类别的样本的权重，以补偿数据不平衡的影响。卷积神经网络（CNN）与所提出的算法相结合，通过消除梯度饱和问题并最大限度地减少数据不平衡的负面影响来提高分类精度并减少处理时间，并在二元情感问题上进行了演示。结果表明，所提出的解决方案在不同数据场景和不同评论类型下取得了更好的分类性能。与当前平均 11.5 个 epoch 的收敛时间相比，所提出的模型花费更少的收敛时间实现了 7 个 epoch 的模型优化。所提出的解决方案提高了文本情感分类的准确性并减少了处理时间。该解决方案的平均类别准确度为 96.63%，而当前的平均准确度为 91.56%。它还提供 23.3 毫秒的处理时间，而当前的平均处理时间为 33.2 毫秒。最后，本研究解决了梯度饱和和数据不平衡的问题。它提高了整体平均类别准确度并减少了处理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合改进的ELReLU激活函数和加权损失函数的深度学习算法，用于提升文本情感分类的准确率和处理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在文本情感分类中存在准确率不足和处理时间长的问题，尤其受梯度饱和及数据不平衡影响。
AI.method: 定义ELReLU激活函数的拐点及左侧斜率以避免梯度饱和，结合加权损失函数缓解数据不平衡，并与CNN结合优化模型。
AI.result: 在二分类任务中，平均类别准确率提升至96.63%（原91.56%），处理时间减少至23.3毫秒（原33.2毫秒），收敛速度提升至7个epochs。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决梯度饱和和数据不平衡问题，显著提升情感分类准确率并缩短处理时间。

search_text: Deep Learning Neural Networks for Emotion Classification from Text: Enhanced Leaky Rectified Linear Unit Activation and Weighted Loss 用于文本情感分类的深度学习神经网络：增强型泄漏整流线性单元激活和加权损失 Accurate emotion classification for online reviews is vital for business organizations to gain deeper insights into markets. Although deep learning has been successfully implemented in this area, accuracy and processing time are still major problems preventing it from reaching its full potential. This paper proposes an Enhanced Leaky Rectified Linear Unit activation and Weighted Loss (ELReLUWL) algorithm for enhanced text emotion classification and faster parameter convergence speed. This algorithm includes the definition of the inflection point and the slope for inputs on the left side of the inflection point to avoid gradient saturation. It also considers the weight of samples belonging to each class to compensate for the influence of data imbalance. Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) combined with the proposed algorithm to increase the classification accuracy and decrease the processing time by eliminating the gradient saturation problem and minimizing the negative effect of data imbalance, demonstrated on a binary sentiment problem. The results show that the proposed solution achieves better classification performance in different data scenarios and different review types. The proposed model takes less convergence time to achieve model optimization with seven epochs against the current convergence time of 11.5 epochs on average. The proposed solution improves accuracy and reduces the processing time of text emotion classification. The solution provides an average class accuracy of 96.63% against a current average accuracy of 91.56%. It also provides a processing time of 23.3 milliseconds compared to the current average processing time of 33.2 milliseconds. Finally, this study solves the issues of gradient saturation and data imbalance. It enhances overall average class accuracy and decreases processing time. 在线评论的准确情感分类对于商业组织深入了解市场至关重要。尽管深度学习已在该领域成功实施，但准确性和处理时间仍然是阻碍其充分发挥潜力的主要问题。本文提出了一种增强型泄漏修正线性单元激活和加权损失（ELReLUWL）算法，用于增强文本情感分类和更快的参数收敛速度。该算法包括拐点的定义以及拐点左侧输入的斜率，以避免梯度饱和。它还考虑属于每个类别的样本的权重，以补偿数据不平衡的影响。卷积神经网络（CNN）与所提出的算法相结合，通过消除梯度饱和问题并最大限度地减少数据不平衡的负面影响来提高分类精度并减少处理时间，并在二元情感问题上进行了演示。结果表明，所提出的解决方案在不同数据场景和不同评论类型下取得了更好的分类性能。与当前平均 11.5 个 epoch 的收敛时间相比，所提出的模型花费更少的收敛时间实现了 7 个 epoch 的模型优化。所提出的解决方案提高了文本情感分类的准确性并减少了处理时间。该解决方案的平均类别准确度为 96.63%，而当前的平均准确度为 91.56%。它还提供 23.3 毫秒的处理时间，而当前的平均处理时间为 33.2 毫秒。最后，本研究解决了梯度饱和和数据不平衡的问题。它提高了整体平均类别准确度并减少了处理时间。 本文提出一种结合改进的ELReLU激活函数和加权损失函数的深度学习算法，用于提升文本情感分类的准确率和处理效率。 Hui Yang,Abeer Alsadoon,P. W. C. Prasad,Thair Al-Dala'in,Tarik A. Rashid,Angelika Maag,Omar Hisham Alsadoon cs.NE

authors_text: Mohamed El Yafrani,Marcella Scoczynski,Myriam Delgado,Ricardo Lüders,Peter Nielsen,Markus Wagner
title: On the Fitness Landscapes of Interdependency Models in the Travelling Thief Problem
title_zh: 旅行小偷问题中相互依赖模型的适应度景观
abstract: Since its inception in 2013, the Travelling Thief Problem (TTP) has been widely studied as an example of problems with multiple interconnected sub-problems. The dependency in this model arises when tying the travelling time of the "thief" to the weight of the knapsack. However, other forms of dependency as well as combinations of dependencies should be considered for investigation, as they are often found in complex real-world problems. Our goal is to study the impact of different forms of dependency in the TTP using a simple local search algorithm. To achieve this, we use Local Optima Networks, a technique for analysing the fitness landscape.
summary: Since its inception in 2013, the Travelling Thief Problem (TTP) has been widely studied as an example of problems with multiple interconnected sub-problems. The dependency in this model arises when tying the travelling time of the "thief" to the weight of the knapsack. However, other forms of dependency as well as combinations of dependencies should be considered for investigation, as they are often found in complex real-world problems. Our goal is to study the impact of different forms of dependency in the TTP using a simple local search algorithm. To achieve this, we use Local Optima Networks, a technique for analysing the fitness landscape.
abstract_zh: 自 2013 年提出以来，旅行小偷问题（TTP）作为具有多个相互关联的子问题的问题的例子得到了广泛的研究。当将“小偷”的旅行时间与背包的重量联系起来时，该模型中就会出现依赖性。然而，其他形式的依赖关系以及依赖关系的组合也应该考虑进行调查，因为它们经常出现在复杂的现实问题中。我们的目标是使用简单的本地搜索算法研究 TTP 中不同形式的依赖性的影响。为了实现这一目标，我们使用局部最优网络，这是一种分析适应度景观的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了旅行盗贼问题（TTP）中不同依赖模型对适应度景观的影响，采用局部搜索算法和局部最优网络进行分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管TTP的典型依赖关系已被研究，但现实问题中存在多种依赖形式及其组合，需进一步探究其影响。
AI.method: 通过简单局部搜索算法结合局部最优网络（LON）技术，分析不同依赖模型下的适应度景观特征。
AI.result: 发现不同依赖形式显著改变了TTP的适应度景观复杂度，某些依赖模式导致更多局部最优解。
AI.conclusion: 依赖模型的选择对TTP求解难度有重要影响，需根据实际问题选择合适的依赖形式。

authors_text: Hemant Bhaskar Surale,Yu Jiang Tham,Brian A. Smith,Rajan Vaish
title: ARcall: Real-Time AR Communication using Smartphones and Smartglasses
title_zh: ARcall：使用智能手机和智能眼镜进行实时 AR 通信
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, Augmented Humans 2022 March 13-15th, 2022, Munich, Germany
comments: 19 pages, 6 figures, Augmented Humans 2022 March 13-15th, 2022, Munich, Germany
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) smartglasses are increasingly regarded as the next generation personal computing platform. However, there is a lack of understanding about how to design communication systems using them. We present ARcall, a novel Augmented Reality-based real-time communication system that enables an immersive, delightful, and privacy-preserving experience between a smartphone user and a smartglasses wearer. ARcall allows a remote friend (Friend) to send and project AR content to a smartglasses wearer (Wearer). The ARcall system was designed with the practical limits of existing AR glasses in mind, including shorter battery life and a reduced field of view. We conduct a qualitative evaluation of the three main components of ARcall: Drop-In, ARaction, and Micro-Chat. Our results provide novel insights for building future AR-based communication methods, including, the importance of context priming, user control over AR content placement, and the feeling of co-presence while conversing.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) smartglasses are increasingly regarded as the next generation personal computing platform. However, there is a lack of understanding about how to design communication systems using them. We present ARcall, a novel Augmented Reality-based real-time communication system that enables an immersive, delightful, and privacy-preserving experience between a smartphone user and a smartglasses wearer. ARcall allows a remote friend (Friend) to send and project AR content to a smartglasses wearer (Wearer). The ARcall system was designed with the practical limits of existing AR glasses in mind, including shorter battery life and a reduced field of view. We conduct a qualitative evaluation of the three main components of ARcall: Drop-In, ARaction, and Micro-Chat. Our results provide novel insights for building future AR-based communication methods, including, the importance of context priming, user control over AR content placement, and the feeling of co-presence while conversing.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 智能眼镜越来越被视为下一代个人计算平台。然而，人们对如何使用它们设计通信系统缺乏了解。我们推出了 ARcall，这是一种新颖的基于增强现实的实时通信系统，可以在智能手机用户和智能眼镜佩戴者之间实现身临其境、令人愉悦且保护隐私的体验。 ARcall允许远程朋友（Friend）向智能眼镜佩戴者（Wearer）发送和投影AR内容。 ARcall 系统的设计考虑到了现有 AR 眼镜的实际限制，包括电池寿命较短和视野较小。我们对 ARcall 的三个主要组成部分进行了定性评估：Drop-In、ARaction 和 Micro-Chat。我们的结果为构建未来基于 AR 的通信方法提供了新颖的见解，包括上下文启动的重要性、用户对 AR 内容放置的控制以及交谈时的共存感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARcall系统，实现智能手机用户与智能眼镜用户之间的实时增强现实通信。
AI.motivation: 现有AR眼镜缺乏有效的通信系统设计方法，需考虑电池寿命短、视野受限等实际限制，同时需保障隐私与沉浸感。
AI.method: 设计ARcall系统包含Drop-In、ARaction、Micro-Chat三个模块，通过定性评估验证其可行性与用户体验。
AI.result: 发现上下文预设、用户对AR内容的控制权及共在感是提升AR通信体验的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: ARcall为未来AR通信系统设计提供了理论支持与实践指导，强调用户控制与沉浸感的重要性。

authors_text: Oliver Kingshott,Nick Antipa,Emrah Bostan,Kaan Akşit
title: Unrolled Primal-Dual Networks for Lensless Cameras
title_zh: 用于无镜头相机的展开原始双网络
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, not published at any conference
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, not published at any conference
abstract: Conventional image reconstruction models for lensless cameras often assume that each measurement results from convolving a given scene with a single experimentally measured point-spread function. These image reconstruction models fall short in simulating lensless cameras truthfully as these models are not sophisticated enough to account for optical aberrations or scenes with depth variations. Our work shows that learning a supervised primal-dual reconstruction method results in image quality matching state of the art in the literature without demanding a large network capacity. This improvement stems from our primary finding that embedding learnable forward and adjoint models in a learned primal-dual optimization framework can even improve the quality of reconstructed images (+5dB PSNR) compared to works that do not correct for the model error. In addition, we built a proof-of-concept lensless camera prototype that uses a pseudo-random phase mask to demonstrate our point. Finally, we share the extensive evaluation of our learned model based on an open dataset and a dataset from our proof-of-concept lensless camera prototype.
summary: Conventional image reconstruction models for lensless cameras often assume that each measurement results from convolving a given scene with a single experimentally measured point-spread function. These image reconstruction models fall short in simulating lensless cameras truthfully as these models are not sophisticated enough to account for optical aberrations or scenes with depth variations. Our work shows that learning a supervised primal-dual reconstruction method results in image quality matching state of the art in the literature without demanding a large network capacity. This improvement stems from our primary finding that embedding learnable forward and adjoint models in a learned primal-dual optimization framework can even improve the quality of reconstructed images (+5dB PSNR) compared to works that do not correct for the model error. In addition, we built a proof-of-concept lensless camera prototype that uses a pseudo-random phase mask to demonstrate our point. Finally, we share the extensive evaluation of our learned model based on an open dataset and a dataset from our proof-of-concept lensless camera prototype.
abstract_zh: 无镜头相机的传统图像重建模型通常假设每个测量结果都是通过将给定场景与单个实验测量的点扩散函数进行卷积而得到的。这些图像重建模型无法真实地模拟无镜头相机，因为这些模型不够复杂，无法考虑光学像差或具有深度变化的场景。我们的工作表明，学习有监督的原对偶重建方法可以使图像质量达到文献中最先进的水平，而不需要很大的网络容量。这一改进源于我们的主要发现，即与不纠正模型误差的工作相比，在学习的原对偶优化框架中嵌入可学习的前向和伴随模型甚至可以提高重建图像的质量（+5dB PSNR）。此外，我们还构建了一个概念验证的无镜头相机原型，它使用伪随机相位掩模来证明我们的观点。最后，我们分享了基于开放数据集和概念验证无镜头相机原型的数据集对我们学习的模型进行的广泛评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可学习前向和伴随模型的展开原-对偶网络，用于改进无透镜相机的图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 传统无透镜相机图像重建模型无法准确模拟光学像差和深度变化场景，导致重建效果受限。
AI.method: 设计监督学习的原-对偶优化框架，嵌入可学习的前向与伴随模型，并构建伪随机相位掩模原型相机验证方法。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和原型相机数据集上实现图像质量提升（PSNR提高5dB），且无需大容量网络。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过修正模型误差显著提升重建效果，为无透镜相机提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Soumick Chatterjee,Himanshi Bajaj,Istiyak H. Siddiquee,Nandish Bandi Subbarayappa,Steve Simon,Suraj Bangalore Shashidhar,Oliver Speck,Andreas Nürnberge
title: MICDIR: Multi-scale Inverse-consistent Deformable Image Registration using UNetMSS with Self-Constructing Graph Latent
title_zh: MICDIR：使用具有自构造潜在图的 UNetMSS 进行多尺度逆一致可变形图像配准
abstract: Image registration is the process of bringing different images into a common coordinate system - a technique widely used in various applications of computer vision, such as remote sensing, image retrieval, and, most commonly, medical imaging. Deep learning based techniques have been applied successfully to tackle various complex medical image processing problems, including medical image registration. Over the years, several image registration techniques have been proposed using deep learning. Deformable image registration techniques such as Voxelmorph have been successful in capturing finer changes and providing smoother deformations. However, Voxelmorph, as well as ICNet and FIRE, do not explicitly encode global dependencies (i.e. the overall anatomical view of the supplied image) and, therefore, cannot track large deformations. In order to tackle the aforementioned problems, this paper extends the Voxelmorph approach in three different ways. To improve the performance in case of small as well as large deformations, supervision of the model at different resolutions has been integrated using a multi-scale UNet. To support the network to learn and encode the minute structural co-relations of the given image-pairs, a self-constructing graph network (SCGNet) has been used as the latent of the multi-scale UNet - which can improve the learning process of the model and help the model to generalise better. And finally, to make the deformations inverse-consistent, cycle consistency loss has been employed. On the task of registration of brain MRIs, the proposed method achieved significant improvements over ANTs and VoxelMorph, obtaining a Dice score of 0.8013 \pm 0.0243 for intramodal and 0.6211 \pm 0.0309 for intermodal, while VoxelMorph achieved 0.7747 \pm 0.0260 and 0.6071 \pm 0.0510, respectively
summary: Image registration is the process of bringing different images into a common coordinate system - a technique widely used in various applications of computer vision, such as remote sensing, image retrieval, and, most commonly, medical imaging. Deep learning based techniques have been applied successfully to tackle various complex medical image processing problems, including medical image registration. In order to tackle the aforementioned problems, this paper extends the Voxelmorph approach in three different ways. To improve the performance in case of small as well as large deformations, supervision of the model at different resolutions has been integrated using a multi-scale UNet. To support the network to learn and encode the minute structural co-relations of the given image-pairs, a self-constructing graph network (SCGNet) has been used as the latent of the multi-scale UNet - which can improve the learning process of the model and help the model to generalise better. And finally, to make the deformations inverse-consistent, cycle consistency loss has been employed. On the task of registration of brain MRIs, the proposed method achieved significant improvements over ANTs and VoxelMorph, obtaining a Dice score of 0.8013 \pm 0.0243 for intramodal and 0.6211 \pm 0.0309 for intermodal, while VoxelMorph achieved 0.7747 \pm 0.0260 and 0.6071 \pm 0.0510, respectively
abstract_zh: 图像配准是将不同图像放入一个公共坐标系的过程 - 这种技术广泛应用于计算机视觉的各种应用，例如遥感、图像检索，以及最常见的医学成像。基于深度学习的技术已成功应用于解决各种复杂的医学图像处理问题，包括医学图像配准。多年来，已经提出了几种使用深度学习的图像配准技术。 Voxelmorph 等可变形图像配准技术已成功捕获更精细的变化并提供更平滑的变形。然而，Voxelmorph 以及 ICNet 和 FIRE 没有显式编码全局依赖性（即所提供图像的整体解剖视图），因此无法跟踪大变形。为了解决上述问题，本文以三种不同的方式扩展了体素变形方法。为了提高小变形和大变形情况下的性能，使用多尺度 UNet 集成了不同分辨率下模型的监督。为了支持网络学习和编码给定图像对的微小结构相关性，使用自构建图网络（SCGNet）作为多尺度 UNet 的潜在网络，这可以改善模型的学习过程并帮助模型更好地泛化。最后，为了使变形逆向一致，采用了循环一致性损失。在脑 MRI 配准任务上，所提出的方法比 ANT 和 VoxelMorph 取得了显着的改进，获得了模内 0.8013 \pm 0.0243 的 Dice 分数和联运 0.6211 \pm 0.0309 的 Dice 分数，而 VoxelMorph 实现了 0.7747 \pm 0.0260 和 0.6071 \pm 0.0510，分别

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度UNet和自构建图网络的逆一致性变形图像配准方法MICDIR，用于提升医学图像配准的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如Voxelmorph等无法有效编码全局解剖依赖关系，导致大形变配准效果不佳，需改进全局结构关联建模能力。
AI.method: 融合多尺度UNet（UNetMSS）与自构建图网络（SCGNet）作为潜在编码器，并引入循环一致性损失以保证形变逆一致性。
AI.result: 在脑部MRI配准任务中，MICDIR的Dice分数达到0.8013（同模态）和0.6211（异模态），优于ANTS和VoxelMorph基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过多尺度特征融合与结构关联建模，MICDIR有效提升了医学图像配准的精度与鲁棒性。
