authors_text: Minhyeok Cho,Haechang Lee,Hyunwoo Je,Kijeong Kim,Dongil Ryu,Albert No
title: PyNET-QxQ: An Efficient PyNET Variant for QxQ Bayer Pattern Demosaicing in CMOS Image Sensors
title_zh: PyNET-QxQ：CMOS 图像传感器中 QxQ 拜耳模式去马赛克的高效 PyNET 变体
abstract: Deep learning-based image signal processor (ISP) models for mobile cameras can generate high-quality images that rival those of professional DSLR cameras. However, their computational demands often make them unsuitable for mobile settings. Additionally, modern mobile cameras employ non-Bayer color filter arrays (CFA) such as Quad Bayer, Nona Bayer, and QxQ Bayer to enhance image quality, yet most existing deep learning-based ISP (or demosaicing) models focus primarily on standard Bayer CFAs. In this study, we present PyNET-QxQ, a lightweight demosaicing model specifically designed for QxQ Bayer CFA patterns, which is derived from the original PyNET. We also propose a knowledge distillation method called progressive distillation to train the reduced network more effectively. Consequently, PyNET-QxQ contains less than 2.5% of the parameters of the original PyNET while preserving its performance. Experiments using QxQ images captured by a proto type QxQ camera sensor show that PyNET-QxQ outperforms existing conventional algorithms in terms of texture and edge reconstruction, despite its significantly reduced parameter count.
summary: Deep learning-based image signal processor (ISP) models for mobile cameras can generate high-quality images that rival those of professional DSLR cameras. However, their computational demands often make them unsuitable for mobile settings. Additionally, modern mobile cameras employ non-Bayer color filter arrays (CFA) such as Quad Bayer, Nona Bayer, and QxQ Bayer to enhance image quality, yet most existing deep learning-based ISP (or demosaicing) models focus primarily on standard Bayer CFAs. In this study, we present PyNET-QxQ, a lightweight demosaicing model specifically designed for QxQ Bayer CFA patterns, which is derived from the original PyNET. We also propose a knowledge distillation method called progressive distillation to train the reduced network more effectively. Consequently, PyNET-QxQ contains less than 2.5% of the parameters of the original PyNET while preserving its performance. Experiments using QxQ images captured by a proto type QxQ camera sensor show that PyNET-QxQ outperforms existing conventional algorithms in terms of texture and edge reconstruction, despite its significantly reduced parameter count.
abstract_zh: 用于移动相机的基于深度学习的图像信号处理器 (ISP) 模型可以生成可与专业数码单反相机相媲美的高质量图像。然而，它们的计算需求通常使它们不适合移动设置。此外，现代移动相机采用非拜耳滤色器阵列 (CFA)（例如 Quad Bayer、Nona Bayer 和 QxQ Bayer）来增强图像质量，但大多数现有的基于深度学习的 ISP（或去马赛克）模型主要关注标准拜耳 CFA。在本研究中，我们提出了 PyNET-QxQ，这是一种专为 QxQ Bayer CFA 模式设计的轻量级去马赛克模型，它源自原始 PyNET。我们还提出了一种称为渐进蒸馏的知识蒸馏方法，以更有效地训练简化网络。因此，PyNET-QxQ 包含的参数不到原始 PyNET 的 2.5%，同时保留了其性能。使用原型 QxQ 相机传感器捕获的 QxQ 图像进行的实验表明，PyNET-QxQ 在纹理和边缘重建方面优于现有的传统算法，尽管其参数数量显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级深度学习模型PyNET-QxQ，专门用于处理QxQ Bayer模式的CMOS图像传感器去马赛克任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习ISP模型计算量大难以部署于移动设备，且主流研究聚焦于标准Bayer模式，无法适配新型QxQ Bayer等非标准色滤阵列。
AI.method: 基于原始PyNET架构设计轻量化模型，结合渐进式知识蒸馏方法，在保持性能的同时将参数量缩减至原模型的2.5%。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在QxQ Bayer图像的纹理与边缘重建上优于传统算法，且参数量显著减少。
AI.conclusion: PyNET-QxQ有效解决了新型QxQ Bayer模式的去马赛克难题，为移动设备提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: PyNET-QxQ: An Efficient PyNET Variant for QxQ Bayer Pattern Demosaicing in CMOS Image Sensors PyNET-QxQ：CMOS 图像传感器中 QxQ 拜耳模式去马赛克的高效 PyNET 变体 Deep learning-based image signal processor (ISP) models for mobile cameras can generate high-quality images that rival those of professional DSLR cameras. However, their computational demands often make them unsuitable for mobile settings. Additionally, modern mobile cameras employ non-Bayer color filter arrays (CFA) such as Quad Bayer, Nona Bayer, and QxQ Bayer to enhance image quality, yet most existing deep learning-based ISP (or demosaicing) models focus primarily on standard Bayer CFAs. In this study, we present PyNET-QxQ, a lightweight demosaicing model specifically designed for QxQ Bayer CFA patterns, which is derived from the original PyNET. We also propose a knowledge distillation method called progressive distillation to train the reduced network more effectively. Consequently, PyNET-QxQ contains less than 2.5% of the parameters of the original PyNET while preserving its performance. Experiments using QxQ images captured by a proto type QxQ camera sensor show that PyNET-QxQ outperforms existing conventional algorithms in terms of texture and edge reconstruction, despite its significantly reduced parameter count. 用于移动相机的基于深度学习的图像信号处理器 (ISP) 模型可以生成可与专业数码单反相机相媲美的高质量图像。然而，它们的计算需求通常使它们不适合移动设置。此外，现代移动相机采用非拜耳滤色器阵列 (CFA)（例如 Quad Bayer、Nona Bayer 和 QxQ Bayer）来增强图像质量，但大多数现有的基于深度学习的 ISP（或去马赛克）模型主要关注标准拜耳 CFA。在本研究中，我们提出了 PyNET-QxQ，这是一种专为 QxQ Bayer CFA 模式设计的轻量级去马赛克模型，它源自原始 PyNET。我们还提出了一种称为渐进蒸馏的知识蒸馏方法，以更有效地训练简化网络。因此，PyNET-QxQ 包含的参数不到原始 PyNET 的 2.5%，同时保留了其性能。使用原型 QxQ 相机传感器捕获的 QxQ 图像进行的实验表明，PyNET-QxQ 在纹理和边缘重建方面优于现有的传统算法，尽管其参数数量显着减少。 本文提出一种轻量级深度学习模型PyNET-QxQ，专门用于处理QxQ Bayer模式的CMOS图像传感器去马赛克任务。 Minhyeok Cho,Haechang Lee,Hyunwoo Je,Kijeong Kim,Dongil Ryu,Albert No eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuanbiao Gou,Peng Hu,Jiancheng Lv,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Xi Peng
title: Multi-Scale Adaptive Network for Single Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于单图像去噪的多尺度自适应网络
comment: ef:the Thirty-Sixth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:the Thirty-Sixth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Multi-scale architectures have shown effectiveness in a variety of tasks thanks to appealing cross-scale complementarity. However, existing architectures treat different scale features equally without considering the scale-specific characteristics, \textit{i.e.}, the within-scale characteristics are ignored in the architecture design. In this paper, we reveal this missing piece for multi-scale architecture design and accordingly propose a novel Multi-Scale Adaptive Network (MSANet) for single image denoising. Specifically, MSANet simultaneously embraces the within-scale characteristics and the cross-scale complementarity thanks to three novel neural blocks, \textit{i.e.}, adaptive feature block (AFeB), adaptive multi-scale block (AMB), and adaptive fusion block (AFuB). In brief, AFeB is designed to adaptively preserve image details and filter noises, which is highly expected for the features with mixed details and noises. AMB could enlarge the receptive field and aggregate the multi-scale information, which meets the need of contextually informative features. AFuB devotes to adaptively sampling and transferring the features from one scale to another scale, which fuses the multi-scale features with varying characteristics from coarse to fine. Extensive experiments on both three real and six synthetic noisy image datasets show the superiority of MSANet compared with 12 methods. The code could be accessed from https://github.com/XLearning-SCU/2022-NeurIPS-MSANet.
summary: Multi-scale architectures have shown effectiveness in a variety of tasks thanks to appealing cross-scale complementarity. However, existing architectures treat different scale features equally without considering the scale-specific characteristics, \textit{i.e.}, the within-scale characteristics are ignored in the architecture design. In this paper, we reveal this missing piece for multi-scale architecture design and accordingly propose a novel Multi-Scale Adaptive Network (MSANet) for single image denoising. Specifically, MSANet simultaneously embraces the within-scale characteristics and the cross-scale complementarity thanks to three novel neural blocks, \textit{i.e.}, adaptive feature block (AFeB), adaptive multi-scale block (AMB), and adaptive fusion block (AFuB). In brief, AFeB is designed to adaptively preserve image details and filter noises, which is highly expected for the features with mixed details and noises. AMB could enlarge the receptive field and aggregate the multi-scale information, which meets the need of contextually informative features. AFuB devotes to adaptively sampling and transferring the features from one scale to another scale, which fuses the multi-scale features with varying characteristics from coarse to fine. Extensive experiments on both three real and six synthetic noisy image datasets show the superiority of MSANet compared with 12 methods. The code could be accessed from https://github.com/XLearning-SCU/2022-NeurIPS-MSANet.
abstract_zh: 由于有吸引力的跨尺度互补性，多尺度架构在各种任务中都表现出了有效性。然而，现有的架构平等地对待不同尺度的特征，而不考虑特定于尺度的特征，\textit{即}，在架构设计中忽略了尺度内的特征。在本文中，我们揭示了多尺度架构设计中缺失的部分，并相应地提出了一种用于单图像去噪的新型多尺度自适应网络（MSANet）。具体来说，MSANet 同时包含了尺度内特征和跨尺度互补性，这要归功于三个新颖的神经块，即自适应特征块（AFeB）、自适应多尺度块（AMB）和自适应融合块（AFuB）。简而言之，AFeB 旨在自适应地保留图像细节并过滤噪声，这对于具有混合细节和噪声的特征是非常期望的。 AMB可以扩大感受野并聚合多尺度信息，满足上下文信息特征的需求。 AFuB致力于自适应采样并将特征从一个尺度转移到另一个尺度，融合了从粗到细不同特征的多尺度特征。对三个真实图像数据集和六个合成噪声图像数据集进行的大量实验表明，与 12 种方法相比，MSANet 具有优越性。该代码可以从 https://github.com/XLearning-SCU/2022-NeurIPS-MSANet 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度自适应网络（MSANet），用于单图像去噪任务，通过同时利用尺度内特征和跨尺度互补性提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有多尺度架构在设计时未充分考虑不同尺度特征的特性，忽略了尺度内特征的差异性，导致去噪效果受限。
AI.method: 提出三种新型神经模块：自适应特征块（AFeB）用于细节保留与噪声过滤，自适应多尺度块（AMB）用于扩大感受野并聚合多尺度信息，自适应融合块（AFuB）用于跨尺度特征的自适应采样与融合。
AI.result: 在三个真实噪声数据集和六个合成噪声数据集上的实验表明，MSANet相比12种方法表现更优，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时建模尺度内特性与跨尺度互补性，MSANet有效提升了单图像去噪性能，验证了多尺度自适应设计的优越性。

However, existing architectures treat different scale features equally without considering the scale-specific characteristics, \textit{i.e.}, the within-scale characteristics are ignored in the architecture design. In this paper, we reveal this missing piece for multi-scale architecture design and accordingly propose a novel Multi-Scale Adaptive Network (MSANet) for single image denoising. Specifically, MSANet simultaneously embraces the within-scale characteristics and the cross-scale complementarity thanks to three novel neural blocks, \textit{i.e.}, adaptive feature block (AFeB), adaptive multi-scale block (AMB), and adaptive fusion block (AFuB). In brief, AFeB is designed to adaptively preserve image details and filter noises, which is highly expected for the features with mixed details and noises. authors_text: Zhiyu Mou,Jun Liu,Xiang Yun,Feifei Gao,Qihui Wu
title: Cluster Head Detection for Hierarchical UAV Swarm With Graph Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 基于图自监督学习的分层无人机群簇头检测
abstract: In this paper, we study the cluster head detection problem of a two-level unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarm network (USNET) with multiple UAV clusters, where the inherent follow strategy (IFS) of low-level follower UAVs (FUAVs) with respect to high-level cluster head UAVs (HUAVs) is unknown. We first propose a graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (GASSL) to detect the HUAVs of a single UAV cluster, where the GASSL can fit the IFS at the same time. Then, to detect the HUAVs in the USNET with multiple UAV clusters, we develop a multi-cluster graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (MC-GASSL) based on the GASSL. The MC-GASSL clusters the USNET with a gated recurrent unit (GRU)-based metric learning scheme and finds the HUAVs in each cluster with GASSL. Numerical results show that the GASSL can detect the HUAVs in single UAV clusters obeying various kinds of IFSs with over 98% average accuracy. The simulation results also show that the clustering purity of the USNET with MC-GASSL exceeds that with traditional clustering algorithms by at least 10% average. Furthermore, the MC-GASSL can efficiently detect all the HUAVs in USNETs with various IFSs and cluster numbers with low detection redundancies.
summary: In this paper, we study the cluster head detection problem of a two-level unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarm network (USNET) with multiple UAV clusters, where the inherent follow strategy (IFS) of low-level follower UAVs (FUAVs) with respect to high-level cluster head UAVs (HUAVs) is unknown. We first propose a graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (GASSL) to detect the HUAVs of a single UAV cluster, where the GASSL can fit the IFS at the same time. Then, to detect the HUAVs in the USNET with multiple UAV clusters, we develop a multi-cluster graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (MC-GASSL) based on the GASSL. The MC-GASSL clusters the USNET with a gated recurrent unit (GRU)-based metric learning scheme and finds the HUAVs in each cluster with GASSL. Numerical results show that the GASSL can detect the HUAVs in single UAV clusters obeying various kinds of IFSs with over 98% average accuracy. The simulation results also show that the clustering purity of the USNET with MC-GASSL exceeds that with traditional clustering algorithms by at least 10% average. Furthermore, the MC-GASSL can efficiently detect all the HUAVs in USNETs with various IFSs and cluster numbers with low detection redundancies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了具有多个无人机集群的两级无人机集群网络（USNET）的簇头检测问题，其中低级跟随无人机（FUAV）相对于高级簇头无人机（HUAV）的固有跟随策略（IFS）是未知的。我们首先提出了一种图注意力自监督学习算法（GASSL）来检测单个无人机集群的HUAV，其中GASSL可以同时拟合IFS。然后，为了检测具有多个无人机集群的 USNET 中的 HUAV，我们基于 GASSL 开发了一种多集群图注意力自监督学习算法（MC-GASSL）。 MC-GASSL 使用基于门控循环单元 (GRU) 的度量学习方案对 USNET 进行集群，并使用 GASSL 查找每个集群中的 HUAV。数值结果表明，GASSL能够以98%以上的平均准确率检测服从各种IFS的单个无人机集群中的HUAV。模拟结果还表明，采用 MC-GASSL 的 USNET 的聚类纯度平均比传统聚类算法高出至少 10%。此外，MC-GASSL 可以有效地检测 USNET 中具有各种 IFS 和簇数量的所有 HUAV，且检测冗余度较低。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了具有多架无人机集群的分层无人机群网络（USNET）中的集群头检测问题，提出基于图自监督学习的算法以应对低级无人机对高级集群头无人机的未知跟随策略。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以应对无人机集群中未知的跟随策略（IFS），导致集群头检测效率低下，需设计适应复杂动态环境的新型算法。
AI.method: 提出图注意力自监督学习算法（GASSL）检测单集群头无人机，并基于GASSL开发多集群算法（MC-GASSL），结合GRU度量学习实现多集群划分与头无人机检测。
AI.result: GASSL在单集群场景下平均准确率超98%，MC-GASSL使USNET聚类纯度较传统算法提升至少10%，且能高效处理多种IFS与集群规模。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了未知跟随策略下的集群头检测难题，显著优于传统算法，在准确率、聚类纯度及扩展性方面表现优异。

search_text: Cluster Head Detection for Hierarchical UAV Swarm With Graph Self-supervised Learning 基于图自监督学习的分层无人机群簇头检测 In this paper, we study the cluster head detection problem of a two-level unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarm network (USNET) with multiple UAV clusters, where the inherent follow strategy (IFS) of low-level follower UAVs (FUAVs) with respect to high-level cluster head UAVs (HUAVs) is unknown. We first propose a graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (GASSL) to detect the HUAVs of a single UAV cluster, where the GASSL can fit the IFS at the same time. Then, to detect the HUAVs in the USNET with multiple UAV clusters, we develop a multi-cluster graph attention self-supervised learning algorithm (MC-GASSL) based on the GASSL. The MC-GASSL clusters the USNET with a gated recurrent unit (GRU)-based metric learning scheme and finds the HUAVs in each cluster with GASSL. Numerical results show that the GASSL can detect the HUAVs in single UAV clusters obeying various kinds of IFSs with over 98% average accuracy. The simulation results also show that the clustering purity of the USNET with MC-GASSL exceeds that with traditional clustering algorithms by at least 10% average. Furthermore, the MC-GASSL can efficiently detect all the HUAVs in USNETs with various IFSs and cluster numbers with low detection redundancies. 在本文中，我们研究了具有多个无人机集群的两级无人机集群网络（USNET）的簇头检测问题，其中低级跟随无人机（FUAV）相对于高级簇头无人机（HUAV）的固有跟随策略（IFS）是未知的。我们首先提出了一种图注意力自监督学习算法（GASSL）来检测单个无人机集群的HUAV，其中GASSL可以同时拟合IFS。然后，为了检测具有多个无人机集群的 USNET 中的 HUAV，我们基于 GASSL 开发了一种多集群图注意力自监督学习算法（MC-GASSL）。 MC-GASSL 使用基于门控循环单元 (GRU) 的度量学习方案对 USNET 进行集群，并使用 GASSL 查找每个集群中的 HUAV。数值结果表明，GASSL能够以98%以上的平均准确率检测服从各种IFS的单个无人机集群中的HUAV。模拟结果还表明，采用 MC-GASSL 的 USNET 的聚类纯度平均比传统聚类算法高出至少 10%。此外，MC-GASSL 可以有效地检测 USNET 中具有各种 IFS 和簇数量的所有 HUAV，且检测冗余度较低。 本文研究了具有多架无人机集群的分层无人机群网络（USNET）中的集群头检测问题，提出基于图自监督学习的算法以应对低级无人机对高级集群头无人机的未知跟随策略。 Zhiyu Mou,Jun Liu,Xiang Yun,Feifei Gao,Qihui Wu cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Ruijie Zhu,Lulu Li,Shuning Wu,Pei Lv,Yafai Li,Mingliang Xu
title: Multi-Agent Broad Reinforcement Learning for Intelligent Traffic Light Control
title_zh: 智能交通灯控制的多智能体广泛强化学习
abstract: Intelligent Traffic Light Control System (ITLCS) is a typical Multi-Agent System (MAS), which comprises multiple roads and traffic lights.Constructing a model of MAS for ITLCS is the basis to alleviate traffic congestion. Existing approaches of MAS are largely based on Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL). Although the Deep Neural Network (DNN) of MABRL is effective, the training time is long, and the parameters are difficult to trace. Recently, Broad Learning Systems (BLS) provided a selective way for learning in the deep neural networks by a flat network. Moreover, Broad Reinforcement Learning (BRL) extends BLS in Single Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (SADRL) problem with promising results. However, BRL does not focus on the intricate structures and interaction of agents. Motivated by the feature of MADRL and the issue of BRL, we propose a Multi-Agent Broad Reinforcement Learning (MABRL) framework to explore the function of BLS in MAS. Firstly, unlike most existing MADRL approaches, which use a series of deep neural networks structures, we model each agent with broad networks. Then, we introduce a dynamic self-cycling interaction mechanism to confirm the "3W" information: When to interact, Which agents need to consider, What information to transmit. Finally, we do the experiments based on the intelligent traffic light control scenario. We compare the MABRL approach with six different approaches, and experimental results on three datasets verify the effectiveness of MABRL.
summary: Intelligent Traffic Light Control System (ITLCS) is a typical Multi-Agent System (MAS), which comprises multiple roads and traffic lights.Constructing a model of MAS for ITLCS is the basis to alleviate traffic congestion. Existing approaches of MAS are largely based on Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL). Although the Deep Neural Network (DNN) of MABRL is effective, the training time is long, and the parameters are difficult to trace. Recently, Broad Learning Systems (BLS) provided a selective way for learning in the deep neural networks by a flat network. Moreover, Broad Reinforcement Learning (BRL) extends BLS in Single Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (SADRL) problem with promising results. However, BRL does not focus on the intricate structures and interaction of agents. Motivated by the feature of MADRL and the issue of BRL, we propose a Multi-Agent Broad Reinforcement Learning (MABRL) framework to explore the function of BLS in MAS. Firstly, unlike most existing MADRL approaches, which use a series of deep neural networks structures, we model each agent with broad networks. Then, we introduce a dynamic self-cycling interaction mechanism to confirm the "3W" information: When to interact, Which agents need to consider, What information to transmit. Finally, we do the experiments based on the intelligent traffic light control scenario. We compare the MABRL approach with six different approaches, and experimental results on three datasets verify the effectiveness of MABRL.
abstract_zh: 智能交通灯控制系统(ITLCS)是一种典型的多智能体系统(MAS)，由多条道路和多个交通信号灯组成。构建ITLCS的MAS模型是缓解交通拥堵的基础。现有的 MAS 方法主要基于多智能体深度强化学习 (MADRL)。 MABRL的深度神经网络（DNN）虽然有效，但训练时间长，参数难以追踪。最近，广泛学习系统（BLS）提供了一种通过平面网络在深度神经网络中进行选择性学习的方法。此外，广泛强化学习 (BRL) 在单代理深度强化学习 (SADRL) 问题中扩展了 BLS，并取得了可喜的结果。然而，BRL 并不关注智能体的复杂结构和相互作用。受MADRL的特点和BRL问题的启发，我们提出了一种多智能体广泛强化学习（MABRL）框架来探索BLS在MAS中的功能。首先，与大多数使用一系列深度神经网络结构的现有 MADRL 方法不同，我们使用广泛的网络对每个代理进行建模。然后，我们引入动态自循环交互机制来确认“3W”信息：何时交互、需要考虑哪些代理、传输哪些信息。最后，我们基于智能交通灯控制场景进行了实验。我们将 MABRL 方法与六种不同的方法进行了比较，三个数据集上的实验结果验证了 MABRL 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多智能体广义强化学习框架（MABRL），用于解决智能交通灯控制中的多智能体系统建模问题，通过结合广义学习系统（BLS）与多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的优势，优化交通信号控制效果。
AI.motivation: 现有MADRL方法依赖深度神经网络，存在训练耗时、参数不可追踪的问题；而BRL虽在单智能体场景表现良好，但未有效处理多智能体间的复杂交互结构，需提出新框架解决此矛盾。
AI.method: 采用广义网络替代传统深度网络结构，设计动态自循环交互机制，通过'3W'信息（何时交互、哪些智能体参与、传输何信息）协调多智能体协作，构建MABRL框架。
AI.result: 在智能交通灯控制场景中，MABRL方法相较于六种对比方法，在三个数据集上均展现出更优的交通流量调控效果，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MABRL框架通过融合BLS的扁平网络优势与多智能体交互机制，为复杂交通系统控制提供了高效、可解释的解决方案，为多智能体强化学习应用开辟了新方向。

search_text: Multi-Agent Broad Reinforcement Learning for Intelligent Traffic Light Control 智能交通灯控制的多智能体广泛强化学习 Intelligent Traffic Light Control System (ITLCS) is a typical Multi-Agent System (MAS), which comprises multiple roads and traffic lights.Constructing a model of MAS for ITLCS is the basis to alleviate traffic congestion. Existing approaches of MAS are largely based on Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MADRL). Although the Deep Neural Network (DNN) of MABRL is effective, the training time is long, and the parameters are difficult to trace. Recently, Broad Learning Systems (BLS) provided a selective way for learning in the deep neural networks by a flat network. Moreover, Broad Reinforcement Learning (BRL) extends BLS in Single Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (SADRL) problem with promising results. However, BRL does not focus on the intricate structures and interaction of agents. Motivated by the feature of MADRL and the issue of BRL, we propose a Multi-Agent Broad Reinforcement Learning (MABRL) framework to explore the function of BLS in MAS. Firstly, unlike most existing MADRL approaches, which use a series of deep neural networks structures, we model each agent with broad networks. Then, we introduce a dynamic self-cycling interaction mechanism to confirm the "3W" information: When to interact, Which agents need to consider, What information to transmit. Finally, we do the experiments based on the intelligent traffic light control scenario. We compare the MABRL approach with six different approaches, and experimental results on three datasets verify the effectiveness of MABRL. 智能交通灯控制系统(ITLCS)是一种典型的多智能体系统(MAS)，由多条道路和多个交通信号灯组成。构建ITLCS的MAS模型是缓解交通拥堵的基础。现有的 MAS 方法主要基于多智能体深度强化学习 (MADRL)。 MABRL的深度神经网络（DNN）虽然有效，但训练时间长，参数难以追踪。最近，广泛学习系统（BLS）提供了一种通过平面网络在深度神经网络中进行选择性学习的方法。此外，广泛强化学习 (BRL) 在单代理深度强化学习 (SADRL) 问题中扩展了 BLS，并取得了可喜的结果。然而，BRL 并不关注智能体的复杂结构和相互作用。受MADRL的特点和BRL问题的启发，我们提出了一种多智能体广泛强化学习（MABRL）框架来探索BLS在MAS中的功能。首先，与大多数使用一系列深度神经网络结构的现有 MADRL 方法不同，我们使用广泛的网络对每个代理进行建模。然后，我们引入动态自循环交互机制来确认“3W”信息：何时交互、需要考虑哪些代理、传输哪些信息。最后，我们基于智能交通灯控制场景进行了实验。我们将 MABRL 方法与六种不同的方法进行了比较，三个数据集上的实验结果验证了 MABRL 的有效性。 本文提出一种多智能体广义强化学习框架（MABRL），用于解决智能交通灯控制中的多智能体系统建模问题，通过结合广义学习系统（BLS）与多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的优势，优化交通信号控制效果。 Ruijie Zhu,Lulu Li,Shuning Wu,Pei Lv,Yafai Li,Mingliang Xu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Ali Bou Nassif,Manar Abu Talib,Qassim Nasir,Yaman Afadar,Omar Elgendy
title: Breast cancer detection using artificial intelligence techniques: A systematic literature review
title_zh: 使用人工智能技术检测乳腺癌：系统文献综述
comment: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, Elsevier, Vol 127, May 2022
comments: ef:Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, Elsevier, Vol 127, May 2022
abstract: Cancer is one of the most dangerous diseases to humans, and yet no permanent cure has been developed for it. Breast cancer is one of the most common cancer types. According to the National Breast Cancer foundation, in 2020 alone, more than 276,000 new cases of invasive breast cancer and more than 48,000 non-invasive cases were diagnosed in the US. To put these figures in perspective, 64% of these cases are diagnosed early in the disease's cycle, giving patients a 99% chance of survival. Artificial intelligence and machine learning have been used effectively in detection and treatment of several dangerous diseases, helping in early diagnosis and treatment, and thus increasing the patient's chance of survival. Deep learning has been designed to analyze the most important features affecting detection and treatment of serious diseases. For example, breast cancer can be detected using genes or histopathological imaging. Analysis at the genetic level is very expensive, so histopathological imaging is the most common approach used to detect breast cancer. In this research work, we systematically reviewed previous work done on detection and treatment of breast cancer using genetic sequencing or histopathological imaging with the help of deep learning and machine learning. We also provide recommendations to researchers who will work in this field

In this research work, we systematically reviewed previous work done on detection and treatment of breast cancer using genetic sequencing or histopathological imaging with the help of deep learning and machine learning. We also provide recommendations to researchers who will work in this field

search_text: Breast cancer detection using artificial intelligence techniques: A systematic literature review 使用人工智能技术检测乳腺癌：系统文献综述 Cancer is one of the most dangerous diseases to humans, and yet no permanent cure has been developed for it. Breast cancer is one of the most common cancer types. According to the National Breast Cancer foundation, in 2020 alone, more than 276,000 new cases of invasive breast cancer and more than 48,000 non-invasive cases were diagnosed in the US. To put these figures in perspective, 64% of these cases are diagnosed early in the disease's cycle, giving patients a 99% chance of survival. Artificial intelligence and machine learning have been used effectively in detection and treatment of several dangerous diseases, helping in early diagnosis and treatment, and thus increasing the patient's chance of survival. Deep learning has been designed to analyze the most important features affecting detection and treatment of serious diseases. For example, breast cancer can be detected using genes or histopathological imaging. Analysis at the genetic level is very expensive, so histopathological imaging is the most common approach used to detect breast cancer. In this research work, we systematically reviewed previous work done on detection and treatment of breast cancer using genetic sequencing or histopathological imaging with the help of deep learning and machine learning. We also provide recommendations to researchers who will work in this field 癌症是对人类最危险的疾病之一，但目前还没有开发出永久的治疗方法。乳腺癌是最常见的癌症类型之一。根据国家乳腺癌基金会的数据，仅 2020 年，美国就诊断出超过 276,000 例新的浸润性乳腺癌病例和超过 48,000 例非浸润性乳腺癌病例。从这些数字来看，其中 64% 的病例是在疾病周期的早期被诊断出来的，患者的生存机会为 99%。人工智能和机器学习已有效地应用于多种危险疾病的检测和治疗，有助于早期诊断和治疗，从而增加患者的生存机会。深度学习旨在分析影响严重疾病检测和治疗的最重要特征。例如，可以使用基因或组织病理学成像来检测乳腺癌。基因水平的分析非常昂贵，因此组织病理学成像是检测乳腺癌最常用的方法。在这项研究工作中，我们系统地回顾了以往在深度学习和机器学习的帮助下，利用基因测序或组织病理学成像检测和治疗乳腺癌的工作。我们还为将在该领域工作的研究人员提供建议 系统回顾使用深度学习和机器学习在乳腺癌检测和治疗中的研究，并提出未来方向 Ali Bou Nassif,Manar Abu Talib,Qassim Nasir,Yaman Afadar,Omar Elgendy eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Badrinath Singhal,Chris Vorster,Di Meng,Gargi Gupta,Laura Dunne,Mark Germaine
title: A Machine Learning Approach to Digital Contact Tracing: TC4TL Challenge
title_zh: 数字接触者追踪的机器学习方法：TC4TL 挑战
abstract: Contact tracing is a method used by public health organisations to try prevent the spread of infectious diseases in the community. Traditionally performed by manual contact tracers, more recently the use of apps have been considered utilising phone sensor data to determine the distance between two phones. In this paper, we investigate the development of machine learning approaches to determine the distance between two mobile phone devices using Bluetooth Low Energy, sensory data and meta data. We use TableNet architecture and feature engineering to improve on the existing state of the art (total nDCF 0.21 vs 2.08), significantly outperforming existing models.
summary: Contact tracing is a method used by public health organisations to try prevent the spread of infectious diseases in the community. Traditionally performed by manual contact tracers, more recently the use of apps have been considered utilising phone sensor data to determine the distance between two phones. In this paper, we investigate the development of machine learning approaches to determine the distance between two mobile phone devices using Bluetooth Low Energy, sensory data and meta data. We use TableNet architecture and feature engineering to improve on the existing state of the art (total nDCF 0.21 vs 2.08), significantly outperforming existing models.
abstract_zh: 接触者追踪是公共卫生组织用来防止传染病在社区传播的一种方法。传统上由手动接触追踪器执行，最近人们考虑使用应用程序，利用手机传感器数据来确定两部手机之间的距离。在本文中，我们研究了机器学习方法的发展，以使用低功耗蓝牙、传感数据和元数据来确定两个移动电话设备之间的距离。我们使用 TableNet 架构和特征工程来改进现有的技术水平（总 nDCF 0.21 比 2.08），显着优于现有模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的方法，利用蓝牙低功耗（BLE）、传感器数据和元数据来改进移动设备间的距离估计，以提升数字接触追踪的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统接触追踪依赖人工，效率低下；现有基于手机传感器的接触追踪方法在距离估计上存在不足，需通过机器学习提升精度以更有效地防控传染病传播。
AI.method: 采用TableNet架构结合特征工程，整合蓝牙信号强度、传感器数据及元信息，优化距离预测模型。
AI.result: 在TC4TL挑战赛中，模型的nDCF指标达到0.21，显著优于现有最佳模型的2.08。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过机器学习有效提升了接触追踪的距离估计精度，为传染病防控提供了更可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Julia Wolleb,Florentin Bieder,Robin Sandkühler,Philippe C. Cattin
title: Diffusion Models for Medical Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于医疗异常检测的扩散模型
abstract: In medical applications, weakly supervised anomaly detection methods are of great interest, as only image-level annotations are required for training. Current anomaly detection methods mainly rely on generative adversarial networks or autoencoder models. Those models are often complicated to train or have difficulties to preserve fine details in the image. We present a novel weakly supervised anomaly detection method based on denoising diffusion implicit models. We combine the deterministic iterative noising and denoising scheme with classifier guidance for image-to-image translation between diseased and healthy subjects. Our method generates very detailed anomaly maps without the need for a complex training procedure. We evaluate our method on the BRATS2020 dataset for brain tumor detection and the CheXpert dataset for detecting pleural effusions.
summary: In medical applications, weakly supervised anomaly detection methods are of great interest, as only image-level annotations are required for training. Current anomaly detection methods mainly rely on generative adversarial networks or autoencoder models. Those models are often complicated to train or have difficulties to preserve fine details in the image. We present a novel weakly supervised anomaly detection method based on denoising diffusion implicit models. We combine the deterministic iterative noising and denoising scheme with classifier guidance for image-to-image translation between diseased and healthy subjects. Our method generates very detailed anomaly maps without the need for a complex training procedure. We evaluate our method on the BRATS2020 dataset for brain tumor detection and the CheXpert dataset for detecting pleural effusions.
abstract_zh: 在医学应用中，弱监督异常检测方法引起了人们的极大兴趣，因为训练时只需要图像级注释。当前的异常检测方法主要依赖于生成对抗网络或自动编码器模型。这些模型通常训练起来很复杂，或者很难保留图像中的精细细节。我们提出了一种基于去噪扩散隐式模型的新型弱监督异常检测方法。我们将确定性迭代噪声和去噪方案与分类器指导相结合，以在患病受试者和健康受试者之间进行图像到图像的转换。我们的方法可以生成非常详细的异常图，而不需要复杂的训练过程。我们在用于脑肿瘤检测的 BRATS2020 数据集和用于检测胸腔积液的 CheXpert 数据集上评估了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的弱监督医学异常检测方法，无需复杂训练即可生成高精度异常图。
AI.motivation: 现有医学异常检测方法依赖GAN或自编码器，存在训练复杂、细节保留差等问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合去噪扩散隐式模型与分类器引导，通过确定性加噪/去噪过程实现病患与健康图像的转换，生成异常图。
AI.result: 在BRATS2020（脑肿瘤）和CheXpert（胸腔积液）数据集验证，方法能生成细节丰富的异常图且无需复杂训练流程。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型为医学异常检测提供新思路，在保持高细节表现的同时简化了训练过程，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Lianlian Jiang,Yuexuan Wang,Wenyi Zheng,Chao Jin,Zengxiang Li,Sin G. Teo
title: LSTMSPLIT: Effective SPLIT Learning based LSTM on Sequential Time-Series Data
title_zh: LSTMSPLIT：基于顺序时间序列数据的 LSTM 的有效 SPLIT 学习
abstract: Federated learning (FL) and split learning (SL) are the two popular distributed machine learning (ML) approaches that provide some data privacy protection mechanisms. In the time-series classification problem, many researchers typically use 1D convolutional neural networks (1DCNNs) based on the SL approach with a single client to reduce the computational overhead at the client-side while still preserving data privacy. Another method, recurrent neural network (RNN), is utilized on sequentially partitioned data where segments of multiple-segment sequential data are distributed across various clients. However, to the best of our knowledge, it is still not much work done in SL with long short-term memory (LSTM) network, even the LSTM network is practically effective in processing time-series data. In this work, we propose a new approach, LSTMSPLIT, that uses SL architecture with an LSTM network to classify time-series data with multiple clients. The differential privacy (DP) is applied to solve the data privacy leakage. The proposed method, LSTMSPLIT, has achieved better or reasonable accuracy compared to the Split-1DCNN method using the electrocardiogram dataset and the human activity recognition dataset. Furthermore, the proposed method, LSTMSPLIT, can also achieve good accuracy after applying differential privacy to preserve the user privacy of the cut layer of the LSTMSPLIT.
summary: Federated learning (FL) and split learning (SL) are the two popular distributed machine learning (ML) approaches that provide some data privacy protection mechanisms. In the time-series classification problem, many researchers typically use 1D convolutional neural networks (1DCNNs) based on the SL approach with a single client to reduce the computational overhead at the client-side while still preserving data privacy. Another method, recurrent neural network (RNN), is utilized on sequentially partitioned data where segments of multiple-segment sequential data are distributed across various clients. However, to the best of our knowledge, it is still not much work done in SL with long short-term memory (LSTM) network, even the LSTM network is practically effective in processing time-series data. In this work, we propose a new approach, LSTMSPLIT, that uses SL architecture with an LSTM network to classify time-series data with multiple clients. The differential privacy (DP) is applied to solve the data privacy leakage. The proposed method, LSTMSPLIT, has achieved better or reasonable accuracy compared to the Split-1DCNN method using the electrocardiogram dataset and the human activity recognition dataset. Furthermore, the proposed method, LSTMSPLIT, can also achieve good accuracy after applying differential privacy to preserve the user privacy of the cut layer of the LSTMSPLIT.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）和分割学习（SL）是两种流行的分布式机器学习（ML）方法，它们提供了一些数据隐私保护机制。在时间序列分类问题中，许多研究人员通常使用基于 SL 方法的一维卷积神经网络 (1DCNN) 和单个客户端，以减少客户端的计算开销，同时仍然保护数据隐私。另一种方法是循环神经网络（RNN），用于顺序分区的数据，其中多段顺序数据的片段分布在各个客户端上。然而，据我们所知，在具有长短期记忆（LSTM）网络的 SL 方面仍然没有做太多的工作，即使 LSTM 网络在处理时间序列数据方面实际上是有效的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法 LSTMSPLIT，它使用 SL 架构和 LSTM 网络来对多个客户端的时间序列数据进行分类。采用差分隐私（DP）来解决数据隐私泄露问题。与使用心电图数据集和人类活动识别数据集的 Split-1DCNN 方法相比，所提出的方法 LSTMSPLIT 取得了更好或合理的准确性。此外，所提出的方法LSTMSPLIT在应用差分隐私来保护LSTMSPLIT剪切层的用户隐私后也可以获得良好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分割学习（SL）的长短期记忆网络（LSTM）方法LSTMSPLIT，用于多客户端环境下的时间序列分类任务，同时保护数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在时间序列分类中多采用1D卷积神经网络（1DCNN）或递归神经网络（RNN），但针对LSTM网络与分割学习结合的研究较少，且需解决数据隐私泄露问题。
AI.method: 设计LSTMSPLIT框架，将LSTM网络与分割学习结合，利用差分隐私（DP）技术保护客户端数据隐私，并在多个时间序列数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在心电图和人类活动识别数据集上，LSTMSPLIT方法在准确率上优于Split-1DCNN方法，且应用差分隐私后仍保持较高分类精度。
AI.conclusion: LSTMSPLIT有效结合LSTM与分割学习，兼顾模型性能与隐私保护，为隐私敏感场景下的时间序列分类提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yaniv Benny,Lior Wolf
title: Dynamic Dual-Output Diffusion Models
title_zh: 动态双输出扩散模型
abstract: Iterative denoising-based generation, also known as denoising diffusion models, has recently been shown to be comparable in quality to other classes of generative models, and even surpass them. Including, in particular, Generative Adversarial Networks, which are currently the state of the art in many sub-tasks of image generation. However, a major drawback of this method is that it requires hundreds of iterations to produce a competitive result. Recent works have proposed solutions that allow for faster generation with fewer iterations, but the image quality gradually deteriorates with increasingly fewer iterations being applied during generation. In this paper, we reveal some of the causes that affect the generation quality of diffusion models, especially when sampling with few iterations, and come up with a simple, yet effective, solution to mitigate them. We consider two opposite equations for the iterative denoising, the first predicts the applied noise, and the second predicts the image directly. Our solution takes the two options and learns to dynamically alternate between them through the denoising process. Our proposed solution is general and can be applied to any existing diffusion model. As we show, when applied to various SOTA architectures, our solution immediately improves their generation quality, with negligible added complexity and parameters. We experiment on multiple datasets and configurations and run an extensive ablation study to support these findings.
summary: Iterative denoising-based generation, also known as denoising diffusion models, has recently been shown to be comparable in quality to other classes of generative models, and even surpass them. Including, in particular, Generative Adversarial Networks, which are currently the state of the art in many sub-tasks of image generation. However, a major drawback of this method is that it requires hundreds of iterations to produce a competitive result. Recent works have proposed solutions that allow for faster generation with fewer iterations, but the image quality gradually deteriorates with increasingly fewer iterations being applied during generation. In this paper, we reveal some of the causes that affect the generation quality of diffusion models, especially when sampling with few iterations, and come up with a simple, yet effective, solution to mitigate them. We consider two opposite equations for the iterative denoising, the first predicts the applied noise, and the second predicts the image directly. Our solution takes the two options and learns to dynamically alternate between them through the denoising process. Our proposed solution is general and can be applied to any existing diffusion model. As we show, when applied to various SOTA architectures, our solution immediately improves their generation quality, with negligible added complexity and parameters. We experiment on multiple datasets and configurations and run an extensive ablation study to support these findings.
abstract_zh: 基于迭代去噪的生成，也称为去噪扩散模型，最近被证明在质量上可与其他类别的生成模型相媲美，甚至超越它们。特别包括生成对抗网络，它是目前图像生成许多子任务中最先进的技术。然而，这种方法的一个主要缺点是它需要数百次迭代才能产生有竞争力的结果。最近的工作提出了允许以更少的迭代进行更快的生成的解决方案，但是随着生成过程中应用的迭代越来越少，图像质量逐渐恶化。在本文中，我们揭示了影响扩散模型生成质量的一些原因，特别是在迭代次数很少的情况下进行采样时，并提出了一种简单而有效的解决方案来缓解这些问题。我们考虑两个相反的迭代去噪方程，第一个预测所应用的噪声，第二个直接预测图像。我们的解决方案采用这两个选项，并学习通过去噪过程在它们之间动态交替。我们提出的解决方案是通用的，可以应用于任何现有的扩散模型。正如我们所展示的，当应用于各种 SOTA 架构时，我们的解决方案立即提高了其生成质量，而增加的复杂性和参数可以忽略不计。我们对多个数据集和配置进行实验，并进行广泛的消融研究来支持这些发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态双输出扩散模型，通过在去噪过程中动态切换噪声预测与图像直接预测两种方式，解决扩散模型生成速度与质量的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型虽生成质量高但迭代次数多导致效率低，现有加速方法会牺牲图像质量，需寻找兼顾速度与质量的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计两种对立的迭代去噪方程（噪声预测与图像直接预测），训练模型在去噪过程中动态切换两者以优化生成效果。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和SOTA架构上验证，该方法显著提升少迭代情况下的生成质量，且参数量和计算复杂度增加可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 动态双输出机制有效缓解扩散模型的生成质量下降问题，方法通用性强且易于集成，为高效生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Michele Persiani,Thomas Hellström
title: Policy Regularization for Legible Behavior
title_zh: 清晰行为的政策规范
abstract: In Reinforcement Learning interpretability generally means to provide insight into the agent's mechanisms such that its decisions are understandable by an expert upon inspection. This definition, with the resulting methods from the literature, may however fall short for online settings where the fluency of interactions prohibits deep inspections of the decision-making algorithm. To support interpretability in online settings it is useful to borrow from the Explainable Planning literature methods that focus on the legibility of the agent, by making its intention easily discernable in an observer model. As we propose in this paper, injecting legible behavior inside an agent's policy doesn't require modify components of its learning algorithm. Rather, the agent's optimal policy can be regularized for legibility by evaluating how the policy may produce observations that would make an observer infer an incorrect policy. In our formulation, the decision boundary introduced by legibility impacts the states in which the agent's policy returns an action that has high likelihood also in other policies. In these cases, a trade-off between such action, and legible/sub-optimal action is made.
summary: In Reinforcement Learning interpretability generally means to provide insight into the agent's mechanisms such that its decisions are understandable by an expert upon inspection. This definition, with the resulting methods from the literature, may however fall short for online settings where the fluency of interactions prohibits deep inspections of the decision-making algorithm. To support interpretability in online settings it is useful to borrow from the Explainable Planning literature methods that focus on the legibility of the agent, by making its intention easily discernable in an observer model. As we propose in this paper, injecting legible behavior inside an agent's policy doesn't require modify components of its learning algorithm. Rather, the agent's optimal policy can be regularized for legibility by evaluating how the policy may produce observations that would make an observer infer an incorrect policy. In our formulation, the decision boundary introduced by legibility impacts the states in which the agent's policy returns an action that has high likelihood also in other policies. In these cases, a trade-off between such action, and legible/sub-optimal action is made.
abstract_zh: 在强化学习中，可解释性通常意味着深入了解代理的机制，以便专家在检查后可以理解其决策。然而，这个定义以及文献中得出的方法可能不足以满足在线环境的要求，因为在线环境中交互的流畅性阻碍了对决策算法的深入检查。为了支持在线环境中的可解释性，借用可解释规划文献方法是有用的，这些方法关注代理的易读性，通过使其意图在观察者模型中易于辨别。正如我们在本文中提出的，在代理策略中注入清晰的行为不需要修改其学习算法的组件。相反，可以通过评估策略如何产生使观察者推断出错误策略的观察结果来规范代理的最优策略以提高易读性。在我们的公式中，易读性引入的决策边界会影响代理策略返回的动作的状态，而该动作在其他策略中也很可能发生。在这些情况下，需要在此类操作和清晰/次优操作之间进行权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种策略正则化方法，使强化学习代理在在线环境中表现出更可解释的行为，而无需修改其学习算法的核心组件。
AI.motivation: 传统可解释性方法在在线设置中效果有限，因交互流畅性阻碍深度分析。需借鉴可解释规划领域的方法，使代理行为意图对观察者更清晰。
AI.method: 通过正则化策略优化可解释性，评估策略产生的观察是否会导致观察者推断错误策略，并在决策时权衡可解释性与最优动作。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能在保持策略性能的同时，提升在线环境中代理行为的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 无需调整学习算法即可通过正则化实现可解释行为，为在线强化学习提供了新的可解释性解决方案。

authors_text: O. L. Barbed,F. Chadebecq,J. Morlana,J. M. Martínez-Montiel,A. C. Murillo
title: SuperPoint features in endoscopy
title_zh: SuperPoint 在内窥镜检查中的特点
abstract: There is often a significant gap between research results and applicability in routine medical practice. This work studies the performance of well-known local features on a medical dataset captured during routine colonoscopy procedures. Local feature extraction and matching is a key step for many computer vision applications, specially regarding 3D modelling. In the medical domain, handcrafted local features such as SIFT, with public pipelines such as COLMAP, are still a predominant tool for this kind of tasks. We explore the potential of the well known self-supervised approach SuperPoint, present an adapted variation for the endoscopic domain and propose a challenging evaluation framework. SuperPoint based models achieve significantly higher matching quality than commonly used local features in this domain. Our adapted model avoids features within specularity regions, a frequent and problematic artifact in endoscopic images, with consequent benefits for matching and reconstruction results.
summary: There is often a significant gap between research results and applicability in routine medical practice. This work studies the performance of well-known local features on a medical dataset captured during routine colonoscopy procedures. Local feature extraction and matching is a key step for many computer vision applications, specially regarding 3D modelling. In the medical domain, handcrafted local features such as SIFT, with public pipelines such as COLMAP, are still a predominant tool for this kind of tasks. We explore the potential of the well known self-supervised approach SuperPoint, present an adapted variation for the endoscopic domain and propose a challenging evaluation framework. SuperPoint based models achieve significantly higher matching quality than commonly used local features in this domain. Our adapted model avoids features within specularity regions, a frequent and problematic artifact in endoscopic images, with consequent benefits for matching and reconstruction results.
abstract_zh: 研究结果与常规医疗实践的适用性之间往往存在巨大差距。这项工作研究了常规结肠镜检查过程中捕获的医学数据集上众所周知的局部特征的表现。局部特征提取和匹配是许多计算机视觉应用的关键步骤，特别是在 3D 建模方面。在医学领域，手工制作的局部特征（例如 SIFT）和公共管道（例如 COLMAP）仍然是此类任务的主要工具。我们探索了众所周知的自我监督方法 SuperPoint 的潜力，提出了内窥镜领域的适应性变体，并提出了一个具有挑战性的评估框架。基于 SuperPoint 的模型比该领域常用的局部特征实现了显着更高的匹配质量。我们的适应模型避免了镜面反射区域内的特征，这是内窥镜图像中常见且有问题的伪影，从而有利于匹配和重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了SuperPoint局部特征在内镜图像中的应用，提出适应性改进并构建评估框架以提升医学图像匹配与重建效果。
AI.motivation: 传统手工艺特征（如SIFT）在内镜图像中因镜面反射等伪影导致匹配质量不足，需探索更适应医学影像的自监督特征提取方法。
AI.method: 基于自监督的SuperPoint方法，调整模型以避开内镜图像中的镜面区域，并设计针对医学场景的评估框架进行验证。
AI.result: 改进后的SuperPoint模型在内镜数据集上实现显著优于传统方法的匹配质量，且有效减少镜面区域对重建结果的干扰。
AI.conclusion: SuperPoint在内镜领域展现优于传统方法的性能，其适应性改进为医学图像处理提供了更鲁棒的特征提取方案。

authors_text: Tong Yu,Pietro Mascagni,Juan Verde,Jacques Marescaux,Didier Mutter,Nicolas Padoy
title: Live Laparoscopic Video Retrieval with Compressed Uncertainty
title_zh: 具有压缩不确定性的实时腹腔镜视频检索
abstract: Searching through large volumes of medical data to retrieve relevant information is a challenging yet crucial task for clinical care. However the primitive and most common approach to retrieval, involving text in the form of keywords, is severely limited when dealing with complex media formats. Content-based retrieval offers a way to overcome this limitation, by using rich media as the query itself. Surgical video-to-video retrieval in particular is a new and largely unexplored research problem with high clinical value, especially in the real-time case: using real-time video hashing, search can be achieved directly inside of the operating room. Indeed, the process of hashing converts large data entries into compact binary arrays or hashes, enabling large-scale search operations at a very fast rate. However, due to fluctuations over the course of a video, not all bits in a given hash are equally reliable. In this work, we propose a method capable of mitigating this uncertainty while maintaining a light computational footprint. We present superior retrieval results (3-4 % top 10 mean average precision) on a multi-task evaluation protocol for surgery, using cholecystectomy phases, bypass phases, and coming from an entirely new dataset introduced here, critical events across six different surgery types. Success on this multi-task benchmark shows the generalizability of our approach for surgical video retrieval.
summary: Searching through large volumes of medical data to retrieve relevant information is a challenging yet crucial task for clinical care. However the primitive and most common approach to retrieval, involving text in the form of keywords, is severely limited when dealing with complex media formats. Content-based retrieval offers a way to overcome this limitation, by using rich media as the query itself. Surgical video-to-video retrieval in particular is a new and largely unexplored research problem with high clinical value, especially in the real-time case: using real-time video hashing, search can be achieved directly inside of the operating room. Indeed, the process of hashing converts large data entries into compact binary arrays or hashes, enabling large-scale search operations at a very fast rate. However, due to fluctuations over the course of a video, not all bits in a given hash are equally reliable. In this work, we propose a method capable of mitigating this uncertainty while maintaining a light computational footprint. We present superior retrieval results (3-4 % top 10 mean average precision) on a multi-task evaluation protocol for surgery, using cholecystectomy phases, bypass phases, and coming from an entirely new dataset introduced here, critical events across six different surgery types. Success on this multi-task benchmark shows the generalizability of our approach for surgical video retrieval.
abstract_zh: 搜索大量医疗数据以检索相关信息对于临床护理来说是一项具有挑战性但至关重要的任务。然而，原始且最常见的检索方法（涉及关键字形式的文本）在处理复杂的媒体格式时受到严重限制。基于内容的检索提供了一种克服此限制的方法，即使用富媒体作为查询本身。特别是手术视频到视频检索是一个新的、很大程度上尚未探索的研究问题，具有很高的临床价值，特别是在实时情况下：使用实时视频哈希，可以直接在手术室内实现搜索。事实上，散列过程将大数据条目转换为紧凑的二进制数组或散列，从而能够以非常快的速度进行大规模搜索操作。然而，由于视频过程中的波动，并非给定哈希中的所有位都同样可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种能够减轻这种不确定性，同时保持少量计算足迹的方法。我们在手术的多任务评估方案上展示了卓越的检索结果（前 10 名平均精度为 3-4%），使用胆囊切除阶段、旁路阶段，并来自此处介绍的全新数据集，涵盖六种不同手术类型的关键事件。这个多任务基准的成功表明了我们的手术视频检索方法的普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在实时腹腔镜手术视频检索中处理压缩哈希不确定性问题的方法，以提高检索准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于文本的医疗数据检索方法难以处理复杂媒体格式，而基于内容的视频检索在手术场景中存在哈希位可靠性差异的问题，需提升实时检索的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级算法缓解视频哈希中的不确定性，通过动态评估哈希位可靠性并优化检索匹配过程，降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在包含胆囊切除术、旁路手术等六种手术类型的全新数据集上，多任务评估显示Top 10平均精度提升3-4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了手术视频实时检索中的哈希不确定性问题，验证了其在多种手术场景下的通用性与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种在实时腹腔镜手术视频检索中处理压缩哈希不确定性问题的方法，以提高检索准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统基于文本的医疗数据检索方法难以处理复杂媒体格式，而基于内容的视频检索在手术场景中存在哈希位可靠性差异的问题，需提升实时检索的鲁棒性。

search_text: Live Laparoscopic Video Retrieval with Compressed Uncertainty 具有压缩不确定性的实时腹腔镜视频检索 Searching through large volumes of medical data to retrieve relevant information is a challenging yet crucial task for clinical care. However the primitive and most common approach to retrieval, involving text in the form of keywords, is severely limited when dealing with complex media formats. Content-based retrieval offers a way to overcome this limitation, by using rich media as the query itself. Surgical video-to-video retrieval in particular is a new and largely unexplored research problem with high clinical value, especially in the real-time case: using real-time video hashing, search can be achieved directly inside of the operating room. Indeed, the process of hashing converts large data entries into compact binary arrays or hashes, enabling large-scale search operations at a very fast rate. However, due to fluctuations over the course of a video, not all bits in a given hash are equally reliable. In this work, we propose a method capable of mitigating this uncertainty while maintaining a light computational footprint. We present superior retrieval results (3-4 % top 10 mean average precision) on a multi-task evaluation protocol for surgery, using cholecystectomy phases, bypass phases, and coming from an entirely new dataset introduced here, critical events across six different surgery types. Success on this multi-task benchmark shows the generalizability of our approach for surgical video retrieval. 搜索大量医疗数据以检索相关信息对于临床护理来说是一项具有挑战性但至关重要的任务。然而，原始且最常见的检索方法（涉及关键字形式的文本）在处理复杂的媒体格式时受到严重限制。基于内容的检索提供了一种克服此限制的方法，即使用富媒体作为查询本身。特别是手术视频到视频检索是一个新的、很大程度上尚未探索的研究问题，具有很高的临床价值，特别是在实时情况下：使用实时视频哈希，可以直接在手术室内实现搜索。事实上，散列过程将大数据条目转换为紧凑的二进制数组或散列，从而能够以非常快的速度进行大规模搜索操作。然而，由于视频过程中的波动，并非给定哈希中的所有位都同样可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种能够减轻这种不确定性，同时保持少量计算足迹的方法。我们在手术的多任务评估方案上展示了卓越的检索结果（前 10 名平均精度为 3-4%），使用胆囊切除阶段、旁路阶段，并来自此处介绍的全新数据集，涵盖六种不同手术类型的关键事件。这个多任务基准的成功表明了我们的手术视频检索方法的普遍性。 本文提出一种在实时腹腔镜手术视频检索中处理压缩哈希不确定性问题的方法，以提高检索准确性。 Tong Yu,Pietro Mascagni,Juan Verde,Jacques Marescaux,Didier Mutter,Nicolas Padoy eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zimian Wei,Hengyue Pan,Lujun Li,Menglong Lu,Xin Niu,Peijie Dong,Dongsheng Li
title: Multi-trial Neural Architecture Search with Lottery Tickets
title_zh: 带彩票的多试验神经架构搜索
abstract: Neural architecture search (NAS) has brought significant progress in recent image recognition tasks. Most existing NAS methods apply restricted search spaces, which limits the upper-bound performance of searched models. To address this issue, we propose a new search space named MobileNet3-MT. By reducing human-prior knowledge in omni dimensions of networks, MobileNet3-MT accommodates more potential candidates. For searching in this challenging search space, we present an efficient Multi-trial Evolution-based NAS method termed MENAS. Specifically, we accelerate the evolutionary search process by gradually pruning models in the population. Each model is trained with an early stop and replaced by its Lottery Tickets (the explored optimal pruned network).In this way, the full training pipeline of cumbersome networks is prevented and more efficient networks are automatically generated. Extensive experimental results on ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that MENAS achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) has brought significant progress in recent image recognition tasks. Most existing NAS methods apply restricted search spaces, which limits the upper-bound performance of searched models. To address this issue, we propose a new search space named MobileNet3-MT. By reducing human-prior knowledge in omni dimensions of networks, MobileNet3-MT accommodates more potential candidates. For searching in this challenging search space, we present an efficient Multi-trial Evolution-based NAS method termed MENAS. Specifically, we accelerate the evolutionary search process by gradually pruning models in the population. Each model is trained with an early stop and replaced by its Lottery Tickets (the explored optimal pruned network).In this way, the full training pipeline of cumbersome networks is prevented and more efficient networks are automatically generated. Extensive experimental results on ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100 demonstrate that MENAS achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）在最近的图像识别任务中带来了重大进展。大多数现有的 NAS 方法都应用有限的搜索空间，这限制了搜索模型的上限性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 MobileNet3-MT 的新搜索空间。通过减少人类对网络全维度的先验知识，MobileNet3-MT 可以容纳更多潜在的候选者。为了在这个具有挑战性的搜索空间中进行搜索，我们提出了一种高效的基于多试验进化的 NAS 方法，称为 MENAS。具体来说，我们通过逐渐修剪群体中的模型来加速进化搜索过程。每个模型都经过早期停止训练，并被其 Lottery Tickets（探索的最优剪枝网络）所取代。这样，就可以防止繁琐网络的完整训练管道，并自动生成更高效的网络。 ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的大量实验结果表明，MENAS 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合彩票票据的多试验神经网络架构搜索方法MENAS，在更大搜索空间中自动发现高效网络。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法受限于狭窄搜索空间，无法充分挖掘网络潜力，需扩大搜索空间并提升搜索效率。
AI.method: 设计MobileNet3-MT搜索空间，通过进化算法逐步剪枝模型并用彩票票据替代，避免完整训练过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: MENAS方法有效平衡了搜索空间广度与计算效率，在多个基准测试中验证了优越性。

authors_text: Yunxiang Li,Ruilong Dan,Shuai Wang,Yifan Cao,Xiangde Luo,Chenghao Tan,Gangyong Jia,Huiyu Zhou,You Zhang,Yaqi Wang,Li Wang
title: Plug-and-play Shape Refinement Framework for Multi-site and Lifespan Brain Skull Stripping
title_zh: 用于多部位和寿命脑颅骨剥离的即插即用形状细化框架
abstract: Skull stripping is a crucial prerequisite step in the analysis of brain magnetic resonance images (MRI). Although many excellent works or tools have been proposed, they suffer from low generalization capability. For instance, the model trained on a dataset with specific imaging parameters cannot be well applied to other datasets with different imaging parameters. Especially, for the lifespan datasets, the model trained on an adult dataset is not applicable to an infant dataset due to the large domain difference. To address this issue, numerous methods have been proposed, where domain adaptation based on feature alignment is the most common. Unfortunately, this method has some inherent shortcomings, which need to be retrained for each new domain and requires concurrent access to the input images of both domains. In this paper, we design a plug-and-play shape refinement (PSR) framework for multi-site and lifespan skull stripping. To deal with the domain shift between multi-site lifespan datasets, we take advantage of the brain shape prior, which is invariant to imaging parameters and ages. Experiments demonstrate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods on multi-site lifespan datasets.
summary: Skull stripping is a crucial prerequisite step in the analysis of brain magnetic resonance images (MRI). Although many excellent works or tools have been proposed, they suffer from low generalization capability. For instance, the model trained on a dataset with specific imaging parameters cannot be well applied to other datasets with different imaging parameters. Especially, for the lifespan datasets, the model trained on an adult dataset is not applicable to an infant dataset due to the large domain difference. To address this issue, numerous methods have been proposed, where domain adaptation based on feature alignment is the most common. Unfortunately, this method has some inherent shortcomings, which need to be retrained for each new domain and requires concurrent access to the input images of both domains. In this paper, we design a plug-and-play shape refinement (PSR) framework for multi-site and lifespan skull stripping. To deal with the domain shift between multi-site lifespan datasets, we take advantage of the brain shape prior, which is invariant to imaging parameters and ages. Experiments demonstrate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods on multi-site lifespan datasets.
abstract_zh: 颅骨剥离是脑磁共振图像 (MRI) 分析中至关重要的先决步骤。尽管已经提出了许多优秀的作品或工具，但它们的泛化能力较低。例如，在具有特定成像参数的数据集上训练的模型不能很好地应用于具有不同成像参数的其他数据集。特别是，对于寿命数据集，由于域差异较大，在成人数据集上训练的模型不适用于婴儿数据集。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了多种方法，其中基于特征对齐的域适应是最常见的。不幸的是，这种方法有一些固有的缺点，需要针对每个新域进行重新训练，并且需要同时访问两个域的输入图像。在本文中，我们设计了一个用于多部位和寿命头骨剥离的即插即用形状细化（PSR）框架。为了处理多站点寿命数据集之间的域转移，我们利用了大脑形状先验，它对于成像参数和年龄是不变的。实验表明，我们的框架在多站点寿命数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种即插即用的形状优化框架（PSR），用于解决多站点和全生命周期脑部MRI图像的颅骨剥离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有颅骨剥离方法在跨站点或跨年龄段数据集上泛化能力不足，需针对不同领域重新训练且依赖双域图像同步访问。
AI.method: 利用脑部形状先验知识（与成像参数和年龄无关）构建即插即用框架，通过形状优化解决多站点全生命周期数据集的领域差异问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，PSR框架在多站点全生命周期数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入脑部形状先验，PSR框架有效解决了跨站点和跨年龄段颅骨剥离的领域迁移问题，无需针对新领域重新训练。

In this paper, we design a plug-and-play shape refinement (PSR) framework for multi-site and lifespan skull stripping. To deal with the domain shift between multi-site lifespan datasets, we take advantage of the brain shape prior, which is invariant to imaging parameters and ages. Experiments demonstrate that our framework can outperform the state-of-the-art methods on multi-site lifespan datasets. 颅骨剥离是脑磁共振图像 (MRI) 分析中至关重要的先决步骤。尽管已经提出了许多优秀的作品或工具，但它们的泛化能力较低。例如，在具有特定成像参数的数据集上训练的模型不能很好地应用于具有不同成像参数的其他数据集。特别是，对于寿命数据集，由于域差异较大，在成人数据集上训练的模型不适用于婴儿数据集。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了多种方法，其中基于特征对齐的域适应是最常见的。不幸的是，这种方法有一些固有的缺点，需要针对每个新域进行重新训练，并且需要同时访问两个域的输入图像。在本文中，我们设计了一个用于多部位和寿命头骨剥离的即插即用形状细化（PSR）框架。为了处理多站点寿命数据集之间的域转移，我们利用了大脑形状先验，它对于成像参数和年龄是不变的。实验表明，我们的框架在多站点寿命数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种即插即用的形状优化框架（PSR），用于解决多站点和全生命周期脑部MRI图像的颅骨剥离问题。 Yunxiang Li,Ruilong Dan,Shuai Wang,Yifan Cao,Xiangde Luo,Chenghao Tan,Gangyong Jia,Huiyu Zhou,You Zhang,Yaqi Wang,Li Wang eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Juan F. Montesinos,Venkatesh S. Kadandale,Gloria Haro
title: VoViT: Low Latency Graph-based Audio-Visual Voice Separation Transformer
title_zh: VoViT：基于低延迟图的视听语音分离变压器
abstract: This paper presents an audio-visual approach for voice separation which produces state-of-the-art results at a low latency in two scenarios: speech and singing voice. The model is based on a two-stage network. Motion cues are obtained with a lightweight graph convolutional network that processes face landmarks. Then, both audio and motion features are fed to an audio-visual transformer which produces a fairly good estimation of the isolated target source. In a second stage, the predominant voice is enhanced with an audio-only network. We present different ablation studies and comparison to state-of-the-art methods. Finally, we explore the transferability of models trained for speech separation in the task of singing voice separation. The demos, code, and weights are available in https://ipcv.github.io/VoViT/
summary: This paper presents an audio-visual approach for voice separation which produces state-of-the-art results at a low latency in two scenarios: speech and singing voice. The model is based on a two-stage network. Motion cues are obtained with a lightweight graph convolutional network that processes face landmarks. Then, both audio and motion features are fed to an audio-visual transformer which produces a fairly good estimation of the isolated target source. In a second stage, the predominant voice is enhanced with an audio-only network. We present different ablation studies and comparison to state-of-the-art methods. Finally, we explore the transferability of models trained for speech separation in the task of singing voice separation. The demos, code, and weights are available in https://ipcv.github.io/VoViT/
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于语音分离的视听方法，该方法在语音和歌声两种场景下以低延迟产生最先进的结果。该模型基于两级网络。运动线索是通过处理面部标志的轻量级图卷积网络获得的。然后，音频和运动特征都被馈送到视听转换器，该转换器对隔离目标源产生相当好的估计。在第二阶段，主要语音通过纯音频网络得到增强。我们提出了不同的消融研究并与最先进的方法进行比较。最后，我们探讨了语音分离训练模型在歌声分离任务中的可迁移性。演示、代码和权重可在 https://ipcv.github.io/VoViT/ 中找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低延迟的基于图结构的音频-视觉语音分离Transformer模型（VoViT），在语音和歌唱语音分离任务中均取得先进效果。
AI.motivation: 现有语音分离方法在处理复杂声学环境时存在延迟高或视觉信息利用不足的问题，需开发能有效融合多模态信息且保持实时性的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段网络架构：第一阶段通过轻量图卷积网络提取面部关键点运动特征，第二阶段将音频与视觉特征输入音频-视觉Transformer进行声源分离，并通过单音频网络进一步增强目标语音。
AI.result: 在语音和歌唱语音分离任务中均达到SOTA性能，端到端延迟显著低于现有方法，消融实验验证了视觉特征有效性，且证明了语音分离模型向歌唱任务的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: VoViT通过创新性融合视觉运动线索与音频特征，在保证低延迟的同时提升了语音分离效果，为多模态语音处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Timon Willi,Alistair Letcher,Johannes Treutlein,Jakob Foerster
title: COLA: Consistent Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness
title_zh: COLA：具有对手学习意识的持续学习
abstract: Learning in general-sum games is unstable and frequently leads to socially undesirable (Pareto-dominated) outcomes. To mitigate this, Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA) introduced opponent shaping to this setting, by accounting for each agent's influence on their opponents' anticipated learning steps. However, the original LOLA formulation (and follow-up work) is inconsistent because LOLA models other agents as naive learners rather than LOLA agents. In previous work, this inconsistency was suggested as a cause of LOLA's failure to preserve stable fixed points (SFPs). First, we formalize consistency and show that higher-order LOLA (HOLA) solves LOLA's inconsistency problem if it converges. Second, we correct a claim made in the literature by Schäfer and Anandkumar (2019), proving that Competitive Gradient Descent (CGD) does not recover HOLA as a series expansion (and fails to solve the consistency problem). Third, we propose a new method called Consistent LOLA (COLA), which learns update functions that are consistent under mutual opponent shaping. It requires no more than second-order derivatives and learns consistent update functions even when HOLA fails to converge. However, we also prove that even consistent update functions do not preserve SFPs, contradicting the hypothesis that this shortcoming is caused by LOLA's inconsistency. Finally, in an empirical evaluation on a set of general-sum games, we find that COLA finds prosocial solutions and that it converges under a wider range of learning rates than HOLA and LOLA. We support the latter finding with a theoretical result for a simple game.
summary: Learning in general-sum games is unstable and frequently leads to socially undesirable (Pareto-dominated) outcomes. To mitigate this, Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA) introduced opponent shaping to this setting, by accounting for each agent's influence on their opponents' anticipated learning steps. However, the original LOLA formulation (and follow-up work) is inconsistent because LOLA models other agents as naive learners rather than LOLA agents. In previous work, this inconsistency was suggested as a cause of LOLA's failure to preserve stable fixed points (SFPs). First, we formalize consistency and show that higher-order LOLA (HOLA) solves LOLA's inconsistency problem if it converges. Second, we correct a claim made in the literature by Schäfer and Anandkumar (2019), proving that Competitive Gradient Descent (CGD) does not recover HOLA as a series expansion (and fails to solve the consistency problem). Third, we propose a new method called Consistent LOLA (COLA), which learns update functions that are consistent under mutual opponent shaping. It requires no more than second-order derivatives and learns consistent update functions even when HOLA fails to converge. However, we also prove that even consistent update functions do not preserve SFPs, contradicting the hypothesis that this shortcoming is caused by LOLA's inconsistency. Finally, in an empirical evaluation on a set of general-sum games, we find that COLA finds prosocial solutions and that it converges under a wider range of learning rates than HOLA and LOLA. We support the latter finding with a theoretical result for a simple game.
abstract_zh: 广义和博弈中的学习是不稳定的，并且经常会导致社会上不良的（帕累托主导的）结果。为了缓解这种情况，具有对手学习意识的学习（LOLA）通过考虑每个智能体对其对手预期学习步骤的影响，将对手塑造引入到此设置中。然而，最初的 LOLA 表述（以及后续工作）是不一致的，因为 LOLA 将其他智能体建模为朴素学习者而不是 LOLA 智能体。在之前的工作中，这种不一致被认为是 LOLA 无法保留稳定不动点 (SFP) 的原因。首先，我们将一致性形式化，并证明高阶 LOLA (HOLA) 如果收敛就可以解决 LOLA 的不一致问题。其次，我们纠正了 Schäfer 和 Anandkumar (2019) 在文献中提出的一个主张，证明竞争梯度下降 (CGD) 不能将 HOLA 恢复为级数展开式（并且无法解决一致性问题）。第三，我们提出了一种称为一致性LOLA（COLA）的新方法，它学习在相互对手塑造下一致的更新函数。它只需要二阶导数，即使 HOLA 无法收敛，它也能学习一致的更新函数。然而，我们还证明，即使一致的更新函数也不能保留 SFP，这与这一缺陷是由 LOLA 的不一致引起的假设相矛盾。最后，在对一组一般和博弈的实证评估中，我们发现 COLA 找到了亲社会解决方案，并且它在比 HOLA 和 LOLA 更广泛的学习率范围内收敛。我们用简单游戏的理论结果支持后一个发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为COLA的新方法，用于解决多智能体博弈中学习的不稳定性问题，并通过一致性学习提升合作解决方案的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 在一般和博弈中，学习过程不稳定，容易导致帕累托劣化结果。LOLA方法虽然引入了对手学习意识，但存在不一致性问题，导致无法保持稳定不动点（SFPs）。因此，需要一种更一致且能收敛的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了COLA方法，通过学习互相对手进行塑造的一致更新函数，解决了LOLA的不一致性问题。COLA仅需二阶导数，且在HOLA无法收敛时仍能学习一致的更新函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，COLA在多种一般和博弈中能找到更有利的社会解决方案，并且在更广泛的学习率范围内收敛。此外，理论分析支持了COLA的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: COLA通过一致性学习解决了LOLA的不一致性问题，并在实验中表现出更优的收敛性和社会性解决方案，但一致性的更新函数并不能保证保持稳定不动点。

However, we also prove that even consistent update functions do not preserve SFPs, contradicting the hypothesis that this shortcoming is caused by LOLA's inconsistency. Finally, in an empirical evaluation on a set of general-sum games, we find that COLA finds prosocial solutions and that it converges under a wider range of learning rates than HOLA and LOLA. We support the latter finding with a theoretical result for a simple game. 广义和博弈中的学习是不稳定的，并且经常会导致社会上不良的（帕累托主导的）结果。为了缓解这种情况，具有对手学习意识的学习（LOLA）通过考虑每个智能体对其对手预期学习步骤的影响，将对手塑造引入到此设置中。然而，最初的 LOLA 表述（以及后续工作）是不一致的，因为 LOLA 将其他智能体建模为朴素学习者而不是 LOLA 智能体。在之前的工作中，这种不一致被认为是 LOLA 无法保留稳定不动点 (SFP) 的原因。首先，我们将一致性形式化，并证明高阶 LOLA (HOLA) 如果收敛就可以解决 LOLA 的不一致问题。其次，我们纠正了 Schäfer 和 Anandkumar (2019) 在文献中提出的一个主张，证明竞争梯度下降 (CGD) 不能将 HOLA 恢复为级数展开式（并且无法解决一致性问题）。第三，我们提出了一种称为一致性LOLA（COLA）的新方法，它学习在相互对手塑造下一致的更新函数。它只需要二阶导数，即使 HOLA 无法收敛，它也能学习一致的更新函数。然而，我们还证明，即使一致的更新函数也不能保留 SFP，这与这一缺陷是由 LOLA 的不一致引起的假设相矛盾。最后，在对一组一般和博弈的实证评估中，我们发现 COLA 找到了亲社会解决方案，并且它在比 HOLA 和 LOLA 更广泛的学习率范围内收敛。我们用简单游戏的理论结果支持后一个发现。 本文提出了一种称为COLA的新方法，用于解决多智能体博弈中学习的不稳定性问题，并通过一致性学习提升合作解决方案的收敛性。 Timon Willi,Alistair Letcher,Johannes Treutlein,Jakob Foerster cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Xiaoyu Zhao,Xiaoqian Chen,Zhiqiang Gong,Wen Yao,Yunyang Zhang,Xiaohu Zheng
title: Contrastive Enhancement Using Latent Prototype for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: 使用潜在原型进行少镜头分割的对比增强
abstract: Few-shot segmentation enables the model to recognize unseen classes with few annotated examples. Most existing methods adopt prototype learning architecture, where support prototype vectors are expanded and concatenated with query features to perform conditional segmentation. However, such framework potentially focuses more on query features while may neglect the similarity between support and query features. This paper proposes a contrastive enhancement approach using latent prototypes to leverage latent classes and raise the utilization of similarity information between prototype and query features. Specifically, a latent prototype sampling module is proposed to generate pseudo-mask and novel prototypes based on features similarity. The module conveniently conducts end-to-end learning and has no strong dependence on clustering numbers like cluster-based method. Besides, a contrastive enhancement module is developed to drive models to provide different predictions with the same query features. Our method can be used as an auxiliary module to flexibly integrate into other baselines for a better segmentation performance. Extensive experiments show our approach remarkably improves the performance of state-of-the-art methods for 1-shot and 5-shot segmentation, especially outperforming baseline by 5.9% and 7.3% for 5-shot task on Pascal-5^i and COCO-20^i. Source code is available at https://github.com/zhaoxiaoyu1995/CELP-Pytorch

Most existing methods adopt prototype learning architecture, where support prototype vectors are expanded and concatenated with query features to perform conditional segmentation. However, such framework potentially focuses more on query features while may neglect the similarity between support and query features. This paper proposes a contrastive enhancement approach using latent prototypes to leverage latent classes and raise the utilization of similarity information between prototype and query features. Specifically, a latent prototype sampling module is proposed to generate pseudo-mask and novel prototypes based on features similarity. The module conveniently conducts end-to-end learning and has no strong dependence on clustering numbers like cluster-based method. Besides, a contrastive enhancement module is developed to drive models to provide different predictions with the same query features. Our method can be used as an auxiliary module to flexibly integrate into other baselines for a better segmentation performance. Extensive experiments show our approach remarkably improves the performance of state-of-the-art methods for 1-shot and 5-shot segmentation, especially outperforming baseline by 5.9% and 7.3% for 5-shot task on Pascal-5^i and COCO-20^i. Source code is available at https://github.com/zhaoxiaoyu1995/CELP-Pytorch
abstract_zh: 少镜头分割使模型能够通过很少的带注释的示例来识别看不见的类。大多数现有方法采用原型学习架构，其中支持原型向量被扩展并与查询特征连接以执行条件分割。然而，这样的框架可能更多地关注查询特征，而可能忽略支持特征和查询特征之间的相似性。本文提出了一种使用潜在原型来利用潜在类并提高原型和查询特征之间相似性信息的利用率的对比增强方法。具体来说，提出了一种潜在原型采样模块，用于根据特征相似性生成伪掩模和新颖原型。该模块方便地进行端到端学习，并且不像基于聚类的方法那样对聚类数有很强的依赖性。此外，还开发了对比增强模块来驱动模型以相同的查询特征提供不同的预测。我们的方法可以用作辅助模块，灵活地集成到其他基线中，以获得更好的分割性能。大量实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了 1-shot 和 5-shot 分割的最先进方法的性能，特别是在 Pascal-5^i 和 COCO-20^i 上的 5-shot 任务中，性能优于基线 5.9% 和 7.3%。源代码可在 https://github.com/zhaoxiaoyu1995/CELP-Pytorch 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在原型的对比增强方法，用于提升少样本分割任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分割方法主要关注查询特征，可能忽略了支持特征与查询特征之间的相似性，从而影响分割效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种潜在原型采样模块，用于生成伪掩码和新原型，并设计了对比增强模块，以提升模型对查询特征的预测差异性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Pascal-5^i和COCO-20^i数据集上分别提升了5.9%和7.3%的性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可作为辅助模块灵活集成到其他基线中，有效提升少样本分割任务的性能。

authors_text: Ariel E. Isidro,Arnel C. Fajardo,Alexander A. Hernandez
title: Exploration of Various Deep Learning Models for Increased Accuracy in Automatic Polyp Detection
title_zh: 探索各种深度学习模型以提高自动息肉检测的准确性
abstract: This paper is created to explore deep learning models and algorithms that results in highest accuracy in detecting polyp on colonoscopy images. Previous studies implemented deep learning using convolution neural network (CNN) algorithm in detecting polyp and non-polyp. Other studies used dropout, and data augmentation algorithm but mostly not checking the overfitting, thus, include more than four-layer modelss. Rulei Yu et.al from the Institute of Software, Chinese Academy of Sciences said that transfer learning is better talking about performance or improving the previous used algorithm. Most especially in applying the transfer learning in feature extraction. Series of experiments were conducted with only a minimum of 4 CNN layers applying previous used models and identified the model that produce the highest percentage accuracy of 98% among the other models that apply transfer learning. Further studies could use different optimizer to a different CNN modelsto increase accuracy.
summary: This paper is created to explore deep learning models and algorithms that results in highest accuracy in detecting polyp on colonoscopy images. Previous studies implemented deep learning using convolution neural network (CNN) algorithm in detecting polyp and non-polyp. Other studies used dropout, and data augmentation algorithm but mostly not checking the overfitting, thus, include more than four-layer modelss. Rulei Yu et.al from the Institute of Software, Chinese Academy of Sciences said that transfer learning is better talking about performance or improving the previous used algorithm. Most especially in applying the transfer learning in feature extraction. Series of experiments were conducted with only a minimum of 4 CNN layers applying previous used models and identified the model that produce the highest percentage accuracy of 98% among the other models that apply transfer learning. Further studies could use different optimizer to a different CNN modelsto increase accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在探索深度学习模型和算法，以实现结肠镜检查图像上息肉检测的最高准确度。先前的研究使用卷积神经网络（CNN）算法实现深度学习来检测息肉和非息肉。其他研究使用了 dropout 和数据增强算法，但大多不检查过度拟合，因此包括四层以上的模型。中国科学院软件研究所的于如雷等人表示，迁移学习更好地谈论性能或改进以前使用的算法。尤其是在特征提取中应用迁移学习。应用以前使用的模型仅使用至少 4 个 CNN 层进行了一系列实验，并确定了在应用迁移学习的其他模型中产生 98% 最高准确率的模型。进一步的研究可以对不同的 CNN 模型使用不同的优化器来提高准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了各种深度学习模型在提高结肠镜图像中息肉自动检测准确率方面的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行息肉检测时，通常忽略了过拟合问题，并且未充分验证不同模型的性能。
AI.method: 本文通过实验比较了多种具有最少4层CNN结构的模型，并应用了迁移学习进行特征提取，以提高检测准确率。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用迁移学习的模型在息肉检测中达到了98%的最高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习在特征提取方面表现出色，未来研究可尝试使用不同的优化器以进一步提高模型性能。

authors_text: Ehud Shapiro,Nimrod Talmon
title: Foundations for Grassroots Democratic Metaverse
title_zh: 草根民主元宇宙的基础
abstract: While the physical lives of many of us are in democracies (one person, one vote - e.g., the EU and the US), our digital lives are mostly in autocracies (one person, all votes - e.g., Facebook). Cryptocurrencies promise liberation but stop short, at plutocracy (one coin, one vote). What would it take for us to live our digital lives in a digital democracy? This paper offers a vision, a theoretical framework, and an architecture for a grassroots network of autonomous, people-owned, people-operated, and people-governed digital communities, namely a grassroots democratic metaverse. It also charts a roadmap towards realizing it, and identifies unexplored territory for further research.
summary: While the physical lives of many of us are in democracies (one person, one vote - e.g., the EU and the US), our digital lives are mostly in autocracies (one person, all votes - e.g., Facebook). Cryptocurrencies promise liberation but stop short, at plutocracy (one coin, one vote). What would it take for us to live our digital lives in a digital democracy? This paper offers a vision, a theoretical framework, and an architecture for a grassroots network of autonomous, people-owned, people-operated, and people-governed digital communities, namely a grassroots democratic metaverse. It also charts a roadmap towards realizing it, and identifies unexplored territory for further research.
abstract_zh: 虽然我们许多人的现实生活处于民主国家（一人一票 - 例如欧盟和美国），但我们的数字生活大多处于独裁国家（一个人所有选票 - 例如 Facebook）。加密货币承诺解放，但很快就止步于财阀统治（一枚硬币，一张选票）。我们需要什么才能在数字民主中过上数字生活？本文为自治、人民拥有、人民运营和人民治理的数字社区的草根网络（即草根民主元宇宙）提供了愿景、理论框架和架构。它还制定了实现这一目标的路线图，并确定了尚未探索的领域以供进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基层民主元宇宙的愿景、理论框架和架构，旨在构建自主、人民拥有和管理的数字社区。
AI.motivation: 当前数字生活受制于集中化平台（如Facebook）的‘一人全票’模式，而加密货币亦未能实现真正的民主，仅形成‘一币一票’的寡头统治。
AI.method: 通过构建理论框架与技术架构，设计基层自治的数字社区网络，并规划实现路径与研究方向。
AI.result: 明确了基层民主元宇宙的实现蓝图，包括技术架构、治理模式及未来研究领域。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为数字民主提供了新思路，但需进一步探索技术可行性与社会接受度等挑战。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基层民主元宇宙的愿景、理论框架和架构，旨在构建自主、人民拥有和管理的数字社区。

ai_content.conclusion: 该研究为数字民主提供了新思路，但需进一步探索技术可行性与社会接受度等挑战。

search_text: Foundations for Grassroots Democratic Metaverse 草根民主元宇宙的基础 While the physical lives of many of us are in democracies (one person, one vote - e.g., the EU and the US), our digital lives are mostly in autocracies (one person, all votes - e.g., Facebook). Cryptocurrencies promise liberation but stop short, at plutocracy (one coin, one vote). What would it take for us to live our digital lives in a digital democracy? This paper offers a vision, a theoretical framework, and an architecture for a grassroots network of autonomous, people-owned, people-operated, and people-governed digital communities, namely a grassroots democratic metaverse. It also charts a roadmap towards realizing it, and identifies unexplored territory for further research. 虽然我们许多人的现实生活处于民主国家（一人一票 - 例如欧盟和美国），但我们的数字生活大多处于独裁国家（一个人所有选票 - 例如 Facebook）。加密货币承诺解放，但很快就止步于财阀统治（一枚硬币，一张选票）。我们需要什么才能在数字民主中过上数字生活？本文为自治、人民拥有、人民运营和人民治理的数字社区的草根网络（即草根民主元宇宙）提供了愿景、理论框架和架构。它还制定了实现这一目标的路线图，并确定了尚未探索的领域以供进一步研究。 本文提出了一种基层民主元宇宙的愿景、理论框架和架构，旨在构建自主、人民拥有和管理的数字社区。 Ehud Shapiro,Nimrod Talmon cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.MA,cs.SI

authors_text: Bo Xu,Guanze Liu,Han Huang,Cheng Lu,Yandong Guo
title: Semantic Distillation Guided Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 语义蒸馏引导显着目标检测
abstract: Most existing CNN-based salient object detection methods can identify local segmentation details like hair and animal fur, but often misinterpret the real saliency due to the lack of global contextual information caused by the subjectiveness of the SOD task and the locality of convolution layers. Moreover, due to the unrealistically expensive labeling costs, the current existing SOD datasets are insufficient to cover the real data distribution. The limitation and bias of the training data add additional difficulty to fully exploring the semantic association between object-to-object and object-to-environment in a given image. In this paper, we propose a semantic distillation guided SOD (SDG-SOD) method that produces accurate results by fusing semantically distilled knowledge from generated image captioning into the Vision-Transformer-based SOD framework. SDG-SOD can better uncover inter-objects and object-to-environment saliency and cover the gap between the subjective nature of SOD and its expensive labeling. Comprehensive experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that the SDG-SOD outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on four evaluation metrics, and largely improves the model performance on DUTS, ECSSD, DUT, HKU-IS, and PASCAL-S datasets.
summary: Most existing CNN-based salient object detection methods can identify local segmentation details like hair and animal fur, but often misinterpret the real saliency due to the lack of global contextual information caused by the subjectiveness of the SOD task and the locality of convolution layers. Moreover, due to the unrealistically expensive labeling costs, the current existing SOD datasets are insufficient to cover the real data distribution. The limitation and bias of the training data add additional difficulty to fully exploring the semantic association between object-to-object and object-to-environment in a given image. In this paper, we propose a semantic distillation guided SOD (SDG-SOD) method that produces accurate results by fusing semantically distilled knowledge from generated image captioning into the Vision-Transformer-based SOD framework. SDG-SOD can better uncover inter-objects and object-to-environment saliency and cover the gap between the subjective nature of SOD and its expensive labeling. Comprehensive experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that the SDG-SOD outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on four evaluation metrics, and largely improves the model performance on DUTS, ECSSD, DUT, HKU-IS, and PASCAL-S datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的基于 CNN 的显着目标检测方法可以识别局部分割细节，如头发和动物皮毛，但由于 SOD 任务的主观性和卷积层的局部性导致缺乏全局上下文信息，常常会误解真实的显着性。此外，由于标记成本不切实际，现有的SOD数据集不足以覆盖真实的数据分布。训练数据的限制和偏差为充分探索给定图像中对象到对象和对象到环境之间的语义关联增加了额外的困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种语义蒸馏引导的 SOD (SDG-SOD) 方法，该方法通过将生成的图像字幕中的语义蒸馏知识融合到基于 Vision-Transformer 的 SOD 框架中来产生准确的结果。 SDG-SOD 可以更好地揭示对象间和对象与环境之间的显着性，并弥补 SOD 的主观性质与其昂贵的标签之间的差距。对五个基准数据集的综合实验表明，SDG-SOD 在四个评估指标上优于最先进的方法，并大大提高了 DUTS、ECSSD、DUT、HKU-IS 和 PASCAL-S 数据集上的模型性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于语义蒸馏的显著物体检测方法，解决现有方法因缺乏全局上下文信息和数据不足导致的检测不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因卷积层局部性导致全局上下文信息不足，且标注成本高导致数据集不足，限制了语义关联的探索。
AI.method: 融合生成图像字幕的语义蒸馏知识到基于视觉Transformer的SOD框架，增强对象间及对象与环境的语义关联。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上优于现有方法，提升DUTS、ECSSD等数据集的性能。
AI.conclusion: 语义蒸馏能有效提升显著物体检测的准确性，缓解数据不足和主观性问题。
