authors_text: Murad Tukan,Alaa Maalouf,Dan Feldman,Roi Poranne
title: Obstacle Aware Sampling for Path Planning
title_zh: 用于路径规划的障碍感知采样
abstract: Many path planning algorithms are based on sampling the state space. While this approach is very simple, it can become costly when the obstacles are unknown, since samples hitting these obstacles are wasted. The goal of this paper is to efficiently identify obstacles in a map and remove them from the sampling space. To this end, we propose a pre-processing algorithm for space exploration that enables more efficient sampling. We show that it can boost the performance of other space sampling methods and path planners. Our approach is based on the fact that a convex obstacle can be approximated provably well by its minimum volume enclosing ellipsoid (MVEE), and a non-convex obstacle may be partitioned into convex shapes. Our main contribution is an algorithm that strategically finds a small sample, called the \emph{active-coreset}, that adaptively samples the space via membership-oracle such that the MVEE of the coreset approximates the MVEE of the obstacle. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our approach across multiple planners based on Rapidly-exploring random trees, showing significant improvement in terms of time and path length.
summary: Many path planning algorithms are based on sampling the state space. While this approach is very simple, it can become costly when the obstacles are unknown, since samples hitting these obstacles are wasted. The goal of this paper is to efficiently identify obstacles in a map and remove them from the sampling space. To this end, we propose a pre-processing algorithm for space exploration that enables more efficient sampling. We show that it can boost the performance of other space sampling methods and path planners. Our approach is based on the fact that a convex obstacle can be approximated provably well by its minimum volume enclosing ellipsoid (MVEE), and a non-convex obstacle may be partitioned into convex shapes. Our main contribution is an algorithm that strategically finds a small sample, called the \emph{active-coreset}, that adaptively samples the space via membership-oracle such that the MVEE of the coreset approximates the MVEE of the obstacle. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our approach across multiple planners based on Rapidly-exploring random trees, showing significant improvement in terms of time and path length.
abstract_zh: 许多路径规划算法都是基于对状态空间进行采样。虽然这种方法非常简单，但当障碍物未知时，它可能会变得昂贵，因为碰到这些障碍物的样本会被浪费。本文的目标是有效识别地图中的障碍物并将其从采样空间中移除。为此，我们提出了一种用于空间探索的预处理算法，可以实现更高效的采样。我们证明它可以提高其他空间采样方法和路径规划器的性能。我们的方法基于这样一个事实：凸形障碍物可以通过其最小体积包围椭球体（MVEE）很好地近似，并且非凸形障碍物可以被划分为凸形形状。我们的主要贡献是一种策略性地找到一个小样本的算法，称为\emph{active-coreset}，它通过membership-oracle自适应地对空间进行采样，使得核心集的MVEE接近障碍物的MVEE。实验结果证实了我们的方法在基于快速探索随机树的多个规划器中的有效性，在时间和路径长度方面显示出显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种障碍物感知采样方法，通过预处理算法优化路径规划中的状态空间采样效率。
AI.motivation: 传统采样方法在障碍物未知时会浪费大量样本，导致路径规划效率低下。
AI.method: 利用凸障碍物的最小体积包围椭球（MVEE）近似，将非凸障碍物分解为凸形状，并通过主动核心集（active-coreset）自适应采样减少无效样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在基于快速探索随机树（RRT）的规划器上显著提升了运行时间和路径长度表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效识别和排除障碍物区域，显著提高了采样效率和路径规划性能。

authors_text: Tao Zhang,Shiqing Wei,Shunping Ji
title: E2EC: An End-to-End Contour-based Method for High-Quality High-Speed Instance Segmentation
title_zh: E2EC：一种基于端到端轮廓的高质量高速实例分割方法
abstract: Contour-based instance segmentation methods have developed rapidly recently but feature rough and hand-crafted front-end contour initialization, which restricts the model performance, and an empirical and fixed backend predicted-label vertex pairing, which contributes to the learning difficulty. In this paper, we introduce a novel contour-based method, named E2EC, for high-quality instance segmentation. Firstly, E2EC applies a novel learnable contour initialization architecture instead of hand-crafted contour initialization. This consists of a contour initialization module for constructing more explicit learning goals and a global contour deformation module for taking advantage of all of the vertices' features better. Secondly, we propose a novel label sampling scheme, named multi-direction alignment, to reduce the learning difficulty. Thirdly, to improve the quality of the boundary details, we dynamically match the most appropriate predicted-ground truth vertex pairs and propose the corresponding loss function named dynamic matching loss. The experiments showed that E2EC can achieve a state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI INStance (KINS) dataset, the Semantic Boundaries Dataset (SBD), the Cityscapes and the COCO dataset. E2EC is also efficient for use in real-time applications, with an inference speed of 36 fps for 512*512 images on an NVIDIA A6000 GPU. Code will be released at https://github.com/zhang-tao-whu/e2ec.
summary: Contour-based instance segmentation methods have developed rapidly recently but feature rough and hand-crafted front-end contour initialization, which restricts the model performance, and an empirical and fixed backend predicted-label vertex pairing, which contributes to the learning difficulty. In this paper, we introduce a novel contour-based method, named E2EC, for high-quality instance segmentation. Firstly, E2EC applies a novel learnable contour initialization architecture instead of hand-crafted contour initialization. This consists of a contour initialization module for constructing more explicit learning goals and a global contour deformation module for taking advantage of all of the vertices' features better. Secondly, we propose a novel label sampling scheme, named multi-direction alignment, to reduce the learning difficulty. Thirdly, to improve the quality of the boundary details, we dynamically match the most appropriate predicted-ground truth vertex pairs and propose the corresponding loss function named dynamic matching loss. The experiments showed that E2EC can achieve a state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI INStance (KINS) dataset, the Semantic Boundaries Dataset (SBD), the Cityscapes and the COCO dataset. E2EC is also efficient for use in real-time applications, with an inference speed of 36 fps for 512*512 images on an NVIDIA A6000 GPU. Code will be released at https://github.com/zhang-tao-whu/e2ec.
abstract_zh: 基于轮廓的实例分割方法最近发展迅速，但其特点是粗糙且手工制作的前端轮廓初始化，这限制了模型的性能，并且经验和固定的后端预测标签顶点配对，这增加了学习难度。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于轮廓的方法，称为 E2EC，用于高质量实例分割。首先，E2EC 应用了一种新颖的可学习轮廓初始化架构，而不是手工制作的轮廓初始化。这包括用于构建更明确的学习目标的轮廓初始化模块和用于更好地利用所有顶点特征的全局轮廓变形模块。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的标签采样方案，称为多方向对齐，以降低学习难度。第三，为了提高边界细节的质量，我们动态匹配最合适的预测地面真值顶点对，并提出相应的损失函数，称为动态匹配损失。实验表明，E2EC 可以在 KITTI INStance (KINS) 数据集、语义边界数据集 (SBD)、Cityscapes 和 COCO 数据集上实现最先进的性能。 E2EC 在实时应用程序中的使用也非常高效，在 NVIDIA A6000 GPU 上对 512*512 图像的推理速度为 36 fps。代码将发布在https://github.com/zhang-tao-whu/e2ec。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的基于轮廓的实例分割方法E2EC，旨在提升分割质量与速度。
AI.motivation: 现有轮廓实例分割方法存在手工设计的粗糙初始化和固定标签配对问题，限制了模型性能并增加学习难度。
AI.method: E2EC包含可学习的轮廓初始化模块、全局轮廓变形模块、多方向对齐标签采样方案及动态匹配损失函数。
AI.result: 在KINS、SBD、Cityscapes和COCO数据集上达到SOTA性能，512*512图像推理速度达36fps。
AI.conclusion: E2EC通过端到端优化显著提升了轮廓实例分割的质量与效率，适用于实时应用场景。

authors_text: Jiaxing Yang,Lihe Zhang,Huchuan Lu
title: Lane Detection with Versatile AtrousFormer and Local Semantic Guidance
title_zh: 使用多功能 AtrousFormer 和局部语义指导进行车道检测
abstract: Lane detection is one of the core functions in autonomous driving and has aroused widespread attention recently. The networks to segment lane instances, especially with bad appearance, must be able to explore lane distribution properties. Most existing methods tend to resort to CNN-based techniques. A few have a try on incorporating the recent adorable, the seq2seq Transformer \cite{transformer}. However, their innate drawbacks of weak global information collection ability and exorbitant computation overhead prohibit a wide range of the further applications. In this work, we propose Atrous Transformer (AtrousFormer) to solve the problem. Its variant local AtrousFormer is interleaved into feature extractor to enhance extraction. Their collecting information first by rows and then by columns in a dedicated manner finally equips our network with stronger information gleaning ability and better computation efficiency. To further improve the performance, we also propose a local semantic guided decoder to delineate the identities and shapes of lanes more accurately, in which the predicted Gaussian map of the starting point of each lane serves to guide the process. Extensive results on three challenging benchmarks (CULane, TuSimple, and BDD100K) show that our network performs favorably against the state of the arts.
summary: Lane detection is one of the core functions in autonomous driving and has aroused widespread attention recently. The networks to segment lane instances, especially with bad appearance, must be able to explore lane distribution properties. Most existing methods tend to resort to CNN-based techniques. A few have a try on incorporating the recent adorable, the seq2seq Transformer \cite{transformer}. However, their innate drawbacks of weak global information collection ability and exorbitant computation overhead prohibit a wide range of the further applications. In this work, we propose Atrous Transformer (AtrousFormer) to solve the problem. Its variant local AtrousFormer is interleaved into feature extractor to enhance extraction. Their collecting information first by rows and then by columns in a dedicated manner finally equips our network with stronger information gleaning ability and better computation efficiency. To further improve the performance, we also propose a local semantic guided decoder to delineate the identities and shapes of lanes more accurately, in which the predicted Gaussian map of the starting point of each lane serves to guide the process. Extensive results on three challenging benchmarks (CULane, TuSimple, and BDD100K) show that our network performs favorably against the state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 车道检测是自动驾驶的核心功能之一，近年来引起了广泛关注。用于分割车道实例（尤其是外观较差的实例）的网络必须能够探索车道分布属性。大多数现有方法倾向于采用基于 CNN 的技术。一些人尝试合并最近可爱的 seq2seq Transformer \cite{transformer}。然而，它们的全局信息收集能力弱和计算开销过高的先天缺陷阻碍了广泛的进一步应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Atrous Transformer (AtrousFormer) 来解决这个问题。其变体局部 AtrousFormer 被交织到特征提取器中以增强提取。他们专门按行然后按列收集信息，最终使我们的网络具有更强的信息收集能力和更好的计算效率。为了进一步提高性能，我们还提出了一种局部语义引导解码器，以更准确地描绘车道的身份和形状，其中每个车道起点的预测高斯图用于指导该过程。三个具有挑战性的基准（CULane、TuSimple 和 BDD100K）的广泛结果表明，我们的网络的性能优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合AtrousFormer和局部语义引导的车道检测方法，以提升复杂场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法在处理复杂车道线时存在信息感知局限，而Transformer虽具潜力但计算开销大，需改进其全局信息获取能力与效率。
AI.method: 设计AtrousFormer模块通过行列分步收集信息增强特征提取，并引入局部语义引导解码器，利用车道起点高斯图辅助精准描绘车道形状。
AI.result: 在CULane、TuSimple和BDD100K三个基准数据集上，该方法性能优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了全局信息获取与计算效率，显著提升了车道检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yu Xianjia,Sahar Salimpour,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Analyzing General-Purpose Deep-Learning Detection and Segmentation Models with Images from a Lidar as a Camera Sensor
title_zh: 使用激光雷达图像作为相机传感器分析通用深度学习检测和分割模型
abstract: Over the last decade, robotic perception algorithms have significantly benefited from the rapid advances in deep learning (DL). Indeed, a significant amount of the autonomy stack of different commercial and research platforms relies on DL for situational awareness, especially vision sensors. This work explores the potential of general-purpose DL perception algorithms, specifically detection and segmentation neural networks, for processing image-like outputs of advanced lidar sensors. Rather than processing the three-dimensional point cloud data, this is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work to focus on low-resolution images with 360\textdegree field of view obtained with lidar sensors by encoding either depth, reflectivity, or near-infrared light in the image pixels. We show that with adequate preprocessing, general-purpose DL models can process these images, opening the door to their usage in environmental conditions where vision sensors present inherent limitations. We provide both a qualitative and quantitative analysis of the performance of a variety of neural network architectures. We believe that using DL models built for visual cameras offers significant advantages due to the much wider availability and maturity compared to point cloud-based perception.
summary: Over the last decade, robotic perception algorithms have significantly benefited from the rapid advances in deep learning (DL). Indeed, a significant amount of the autonomy stack of different commercial and research platforms relies on DL for situational awareness, especially vision sensors. This work explores the potential of general-purpose DL perception algorithms, specifically detection and segmentation neural networks, for processing image-like outputs of advanced lidar sensors. Rather than processing the three-dimensional point cloud data, this is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work to focus on low-resolution images with 360\textdegree field of view obtained with lidar sensors by encoding either depth, reflectivity, or near-infrared light in the image pixels. We show that with adequate preprocessing, general-purpose DL models can process these images, opening the door to their usage in environmental conditions where vision sensors present inherent limitations. We provide both a qualitative and quantitative analysis of the performance of a variety of neural network architectures. We believe that using DL models built for visual cameras offers significant advantages due to the much wider availability and maturity compared to point cloud-based perception.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，机器人感知算法极大地受益于深度学习 (DL) 的快速发展。事实上，不同商业和研究平台的大量自主堆栈都依赖深度学习来实现态势感知，尤其是视觉传感器。这项工作探索了通用深度学习感知算法（特别是检测和分割神经网络）在处理先进激光雷达传感器的类似图像输出方面的潜力。据我们所知，这不是处理三维点云数据，而是第一个专注于通过激光雷达传感器通过对图像像素中的深度、反射率或近红外光进行编码而获得的具有 360\text° 视场的低分辨率图像的工作。我们证明，通过充分的预处理，通用深度学习模型可以处理这些图像，从而为它们在视觉传感器存在固有局限性的环境条件下使用打开了大门。我们对各种神经网络架构的性能提供定性和定量分析。我们相信，与基于点云的感知相比，使用为视觉相机构建的深度学习模型具有更广泛的可用性和成熟度，因此具有显着的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了使用激光雷达传感器生成的图像（而非点云数据）作为输入，分析通用深度学习检测与分割模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉传感器在复杂环境（如低光照、恶劣天气）中存在局限性，而激光雷达可提供360°视场图像。利用深度学习模型处理激光雷达图像可能提升感知系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将激光雷达的深度、反射率或近红外数据编码为低分辨率图像，通过预处理后输入多种神经网络架构，进行定性与定量性能分析。
AI.result: 证明经过适当预处理后，通用深度学习模型可有效处理激光雷达图像，并在不同环境条件下实现目标检测与分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉相机的深度学习模型可迁移至激光雷达图像处理，为复杂环境下的机器人感知提供新思路，且相比点云方法更具可用性优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了使用激光雷达传感器生成的图像（而非点云数据）作为输入，分析通用深度学习检测与分割模型的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统视觉传感器在复杂环境（如低光照、恶劣天气）中存在局限性，而激光雷达可提供360°视场图像。利用深度学习模型处理激光雷达图像可能提升感知系统的鲁棒性。
ai_content.method: 将激光雷达的深度、反射率或近红外数据编码为低分辨率图像，通过预处理后输入多种神经网络架构，进行定性与定量性能分析。
ai_content.result: 证明经过适当预处理后，通用深度学习模型可有效处理激光雷达图像，并在不同环境条件下实现目标检测与分割任务。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于视觉相机的深度学习模型可迁移至激光雷达图像处理，为复杂环境下的机器人感知提供新思路，且相比点云方法更具可用性优势。

search_text: Analyzing General-Purpose Deep-Learning Detection and Segmentation Models with Images from a Lidar as a Camera Sensor 使用激光雷达图像作为相机传感器分析通用深度学习检测和分割模型 Over the last decade, robotic perception algorithms have significantly benefited from the rapid advances in deep learning (DL). Indeed, a significant amount of the autonomy stack of different commercial and research platforms relies on DL for situational awareness, especially vision sensors. This work explores the potential of general-purpose DL perception algorithms, specifically detection and segmentation neural networks, for processing image-like outputs of advanced lidar sensors. Rather than processing the three-dimensional point cloud data, this is, to the best of our knowledge, the first work to focus on low-resolution images with 360\textdegree field of view obtained with lidar sensors by encoding either depth, reflectivity, or near-infrared light in the image pixels. We show that with adequate preprocessing, general-purpose DL models can process these images, opening the door to their usage in environmental conditions where vision sensors present inherent limitations. We provide both a qualitative and quantitative analysis of the performance of a variety of neural network architectures. We believe that using DL models built for visual cameras offers significant advantages due to the much wider availability and maturity compared to point cloud-based perception. 在过去的十年中，机器人感知算法极大地受益于深度学习 (DL) 的快速发展。事实上，不同商业和研究平台的大量自主堆栈都依赖深度学习来实现态势感知，尤其是视觉传感器。这项工作探索了通用深度学习感知算法（特别是检测和分割神经网络）在处理先进激光雷达传感器的类似图像输出方面的潜力。据我们所知，这不是处理三维点云数据，而是第一个专注于通过激光雷达传感器通过对图像像素中的深度、反射率或近红外光进行编码而获得的具有 360\text° 视场的低分辨率图像的工作。我们证明，通过充分的预处理，通用深度学习模型可以处理这些图像，从而为它们在视觉传感器存在固有局限性的环境条件下使用打开了大门。我们对各种神经网络架构的性能提供定性和定量分析。我们相信，与基于点云的感知相比，使用为视觉相机构建的深度学习模型具有更广泛的可用性和成熟度，因此具有显着的优势。 本文研究了使用激光雷达传感器生成的图像（而非点云数据）作为输入，分析通用深度学习检测与分割模型的性能。 Yu Xianjia,Sahar Salimpour,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Yanda Meng,Joshua Bridge,Meng Wei,Yitian Zhao,Yihong Qiao,Xiaoyun Yang,Xiaowei Huang,Yalin Zheng
title: Counting with Adaptive Auxiliary Learning
title_zh: 使用自适应辅助学习进行计数
abstract: This paper proposes an adaptive auxiliary task learning based approach for object counting problems. Unlike existing auxiliary task learning based methods, we develop an attention-enhanced adaptively shared backbone network to enable both task-shared and task-tailored features learning in an end-to-end manner. The network seamlessly combines standard Convolution Neural Network (CNN) and Graph Convolution Network (GCN) for feature extraction and feature reasoning among different domains of tasks. Our approach gains enriched contextual information by iteratively and hierarchically fusing the features across different task branches of the adaptive CNN backbone. The whole framework pays special attention to the objects' spatial locations and varied density levels, informed by object (or crowd) segmentation and density level segmentation auxiliary tasks. In particular, thanks to the proposed dilated contrastive density loss function, our network benefits from individual and regional context supervision in terms of pixel-independent and pixel-dependent feature learning mechanisms, along with strengthened robustness. Experiments on seven challenging multi-domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance to the state-of-the-art auxiliary task learning based counting methods. Our code is made publicly available at: https://github.com/smallmax00/Counting_With_Adaptive_Auxiliary
summary: This paper proposes an adaptive auxiliary task learning based approach for object counting problems. Unlike existing auxiliary task learning based methods, we develop an attention-enhanced adaptively shared backbone network to enable both task-shared and task-tailored features learning in an end-to-end manner. The network seamlessly combines standard Convolution Neural Network (CNN) and Graph Convolution Network (GCN) for feature extraction and feature reasoning among different domains of tasks. Our approach gains enriched contextual information by iteratively and hierarchically fusing the features across different task branches of the adaptive CNN backbone. The whole framework pays special attention to the objects' spatial locations and varied density levels, informed by object (or crowd) segmentation and density level segmentation auxiliary tasks. In particular, thanks to the proposed dilated contrastive density loss function, our network benefits from individual and regional context supervision in terms of pixel-independent and pixel-dependent feature learning mechanisms, along with strengthened robustness. Experiments on seven challenging multi-domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance to the state-of-the-art auxiliary task learning based counting methods. Our code is made publicly available at: https://github.com/smallmax00/Counting_With_Adaptive_Auxiliary
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于自适应辅助任务学习的方法来解决对象计数问题。与现有的基于辅助任务学习的方法不同，我们开发了一种注意力增强的自适应共享骨干网络，以端到端的方式实现任务共享和任务定制的特征学习。该网络无缝结合了标准卷积神经网络（CNN）和图卷积网络（GCN），用于不同领域任务之间的特征提取和特征推理。我们的方法通过迭代和分层地融合自适应 CNN 主干的不同任务分支的特征来获得丰富的上下文信息。整个框架特别关注对象的空间位置和不同的密度水平，并通过对象（或人群）分割和密度水平分割辅助任务来通知。特别是，由于提出了扩张对比密度损失函数，我们的网络在像素无关和像素相关的特征学习机制方面受益于个体和区域上下文监督，并增强了鲁棒性。对七个具有挑战性的多域数据集的实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的基于辅助任务学习的计数方法具有优越的性能。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/smallmax00/Counting_With_Adaptive_Auxiliary

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应辅助任务学习的物体计数方法，通过结合CNN和GCN网络增强特征学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有辅助任务学习方法无法有效融合任务共享与任务特定特征，导致上下文信息不足和鲁棒性欠佳。
AI.method: 设计注意力增强的自适应共享主干网络，结合CNN与GCN进行跨任务特征分层融合，并引入扩张对比密度损失函数加强像素级与区域级上下文监督。
AI.result: 在七个跨领域数据集上优于现有最先进的辅助任务学习计数方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应特征融合机制和密度损失函数有效提升了物体计数的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Snehal Jauhri,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki
title: Robot Learning of Mobile Manipulation with Reachability Behavior Priors
title_zh: 具有可达行为先验的移动操作的机器人学习
abstract: Mobile Manipulation (MM) systems are ideal candidates for taking up the role of a personal assistant in unstructured real-world environments. Among other challenges, MM requires effective coordination of the robot's embodiments for executing tasks that require both mobility and manipulation. Reinforcement Learning (RL) holds the promise of endowing robots with adaptive behaviors, but most methods require prohibitively large amounts of data for learning a useful control policy. In this work, we study the integration of robotic reachability priors in actor-critic RL methods for accelerating the learning of MM for reaching and fetching tasks. Namely, we consider the problem of optimal base placement and the subsequent decision of whether to activate the arm for reaching a 6D target. For this, we devise a novel Hybrid RL method that handles discrete and continuous actions jointly, resorting to the Gumbel-Softmax reparameterization. Next, we train a reachability prior using data from the operational robot workspace, inspired by classical methods. Subsequently, we derive Boosted Hybrid RL (BHyRL), a novel algorithm for learning Q-functions by modeling them as a sum of residual approximators. Every time a new task needs to be learned, we can transfer our learned residuals and learn the component of the Q-function that is task-specific, hence, maintaining the task structure from prior behaviors. Moreover, we find that regularizing the target policy with a prior policy yields more expressive behaviors. We evaluate our method in simulation in reaching and fetching tasks of increasing difficulty, and we show the superior performance of BHyRL against baseline methods. Finally, we zero-transfer our learned 6D fetching policy with BHyRL to our MM robot TIAGo++. For more details and code release, please refer to our project site: irosalab.com/rlmmbp
summary: Mobile Manipulation (MM) systems are ideal candidates for taking up the role of a personal assistant in unstructured real-world environments. Among other challenges, MM requires effective coordination of the robot's embodiments for executing tasks that require both mobility and manipulation. Reinforcement Learning (RL) holds the promise of endowing robots with adaptive behaviors, but most methods require prohibitively large amounts of data for learning a useful control policy. In this work, we study the integration of robotic reachability priors in actor-critic RL methods for accelerating the learning of MM for reaching and fetching tasks. Namely, we consider the problem of optimal base placement and the subsequent decision of whether to activate the arm for reaching a 6D target. For this, we devise a novel Hybrid RL method that handles discrete and continuous actions jointly, resorting to the Gumbel-Softmax reparameterization. Next, we train a reachability prior using data from the operational robot workspace, inspired by classical methods. Subsequently, we derive Boosted Hybrid RL (BHyRL), a novel algorithm for learning Q-functions by modeling them as a sum of residual approximators. Every time a new task needs to be learned, we can transfer our learned residuals and learn the component of the Q-function that is task-specific, hence, maintaining the task structure from prior behaviors. Moreover, we find that regularizing the target policy with a prior policy yields more expressive behaviors. We evaluate our method in simulation in reaching and fetching tasks of increasing difficulty, and we show the superior performance of BHyRL against baseline methods. Finally, we zero-transfer our learned 6D fetching policy with BHyRL to our MM robot TIAGo++. For more details and code release, please refer to our project site: irosalab.com/rlmmbp
abstract_zh: 移动操纵 (MM) 系统是在非结构化现实环境中扮演个人助理角色的理想选择。除其他挑战外，MM 还需要有效协调机器人的实施例，以执行需要移动性和操纵性的任务。强化学习（RL）有望赋予机器人自适应行为，但大多数方法需要大量数据来学习有用的控制策略。在这项工作中，我们研究了机器人可达性先验在 Actor-Critic RL 方法中的集成，以加速 MM 的学习以达到和获取任务。也就是说，我们考虑最佳底座放置问题以及随后决定是否激活手臂以达到 6D 目标。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的混合强化学习方法，利用 Gumbel-Softmax 重新参数化联合处理离散和连续动作。接下来，受经典方法的启发，我们使用来自操作机器人工作空间的数据来训练可达性。随后，我们推导了增强混合强化学习 (BHyRL)，这是一种通过将 Q 函数建模为残差逼近器之和来学习 Q 函数的新颖算法。每次需要学习新任务时，我们都可以转移学习到的残差并学习特定于任务的 Q 函数的组成部分，从而保持先前行为的任务结构。此外，我们发现用先前的策略规范化目标策略会产生更具表现力的行为。我们在模拟中评估了我们的方法在到达和获取难度不断增加的任务时的表现，并展示了 BHyRL 相对于基线方法的优越性能。最后，我们将通过 BHyRL 学习到的 6D 抓取策略零传输到我们的 MM 机器人 TIAGo++。更多细节和代码发布，请参考我们的项目网站：irosalab.com/rlmmbp

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可达性行为先验的混合强化学习方法，用于加速移动机械臂在复杂环境中的抓取与移动任务学习。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在移动机械臂任务中需要大量数据，而实际场景中数据获取成本高且效率低，需引入先验知识提升学习效率。
AI.method: 设计混合RL框架联合处理离散/连续动作，结合Gumbel-Softmax重参数化；通过操作空间数据训练可达性先验，并提出BHyRL算法利用残差逼近器分解Q函数，实现跨任务知识迁移与策略正则化。
AI.result: 仿真任务中BHyRL相较基线方法提升性能，且成功零样本迁移至TIAGo++实物机器人完成6D抓取任务。
AI.conclusion: 可达性先验与混合RL框架有效提升移动机械臂学习效率，残差分解机制支持任务特定知识增量学习，为现实场景部署提供可行方案。

search_text: Robot Learning of Mobile Manipulation with Reachability Behavior Priors 具有可达行为先验的移动操作的机器人学习 Mobile Manipulation (MM) systems are ideal candidates for taking up the role of a personal assistant in unstructured real-world environments. Among other challenges, MM requires effective coordination of the robot's embodiments for executing tasks that require both mobility and manipulation. Reinforcement Learning (RL) holds the promise of endowing robots with adaptive behaviors, but most methods require prohibitively large amounts of data for learning a useful control policy. In this work, we study the integration of robotic reachability priors in actor-critic RL methods for accelerating the learning of MM for reaching and fetching tasks. Namely, we consider the problem of optimal base placement and the subsequent decision of whether to activate the arm for reaching a 6D target. For this, we devise a novel Hybrid RL method that handles discrete and continuous actions jointly, resorting to the Gumbel-Softmax reparameterization. Next, we train a reachability prior using data from the operational robot workspace, inspired by classical methods. Subsequently, we derive Boosted Hybrid RL (BHyRL), a novel algorithm for learning Q-functions by modeling them as a sum of residual approximators. Every time a new task needs to be learned, we can transfer our learned residuals and learn the component of the Q-function that is task-specific, hence, maintaining the task structure from prior behaviors. Moreover, we find that regularizing the target policy with a prior policy yields more expressive behaviors. We evaluate our method in simulation in reaching and fetching tasks of increasing difficulty, and we show the superior performance of BHyRL against baseline methods. Finally, we zero-transfer our learned 6D fetching policy with BHyRL to our MM robot TIAGo++. For more details and code release, please refer to our project site: irosalab.com/rlmmbp 移动操纵 (MM) 系统是在非结构化现实环境中扮演个人助理角色的理想选择。除其他挑战外，MM 还需要有效协调机器人的实施例，以执行需要移动性和操纵性的任务。强化学习（RL）有望赋予机器人自适应行为，但大多数方法需要大量数据来学习有用的控制策略。在这项工作中，我们研究了机器人可达性先验在 Actor-Critic RL 方法中的集成，以加速 MM 的学习以达到和获取任务。也就是说，我们考虑最佳底座放置问题以及随后决定是否激活手臂以达到 6D 目标。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的混合强化学习方法，利用 Gumbel-Softmax 重新参数化联合处理离散和连续动作。接下来，受经典方法的启发，我们使用来自操作机器人工作空间的数据来训练可达性。随后，我们推导了增强混合强化学习 (BHyRL)，这是一种通过将 Q 函数建模为残差逼近器之和来学习 Q 函数的新颖算法。每次需要学习新任务时，我们都可以转移学习到的残差并学习特定于任务的 Q 函数的组成部分，从而保持先前行为的任务结构。此外，我们发现用先前的策略规范化目标策略会产生更具表现力的行为。我们在模拟中评估了我们的方法在到达和获取难度不断增加的任务时的表现，并展示了 BHyRL 相对于基线方法的优越性能。最后，我们将通过 BHyRL 学习到的 6D 抓取策略零传输到我们的 MM 机器人 TIAGo++。更多细节和代码发布，请参考我们的项目网站：irosalab.com/rlmmbp 本文提出一种结合可达性行为先验的混合强化学习方法，用于加速移动机械臂在复杂环境中的抓取与移动任务学习。 Snehal Jauhri,Jan Peters,Georgia Chalvatzaki cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lang Peng,Zhirong Chen,Zhangjie Fu,Pengpeng Liang,Erkang Cheng
title: BEVSegFormer: Bird's Eye View Semantic Segmentation From Arbitrary Camera Rigs
title_zh: BEVSegFormer：任意相机装置的鸟瞰语义分割
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV 2023
comments: Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV 2023
abstract: Semantic segmentation in bird's eye view (BEV) is an important task for autonomous driving. Though this task has attracted a large amount of research efforts, it is still challenging to flexibly cope with arbitrary (single or multiple) camera sensors equipped on the autonomous vehicle. In this paper, we present BEVSegFormer, an effective transformer-based method for BEV semantic segmentation from arbitrary camera rigs. Specifically, our method first encodes image features from arbitrary cameras with a shared backbone. These image features are then enhanced by a deformable transformer-based encoder. Moreover, we introduce a BEV transformer decoder module to parse BEV semantic segmentation results. An efficient multi-camera deformable attention unit is designed to carry out the BEV-to-image view transformation. Finally, the queries are reshaped according the layout of grids in the BEV, and upsampled to produce the semantic segmentation result in a supervised manner. We evaluate the proposed algorithm on the public nuScenes dataset and a self-collected dataset. Experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance on BEV semantic segmentation from arbitrary camera rigs. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of each component via ablation study.
summary: Semantic segmentation in bird's eye view (BEV) is an important task for autonomous driving. Though this task has attracted a large amount of research efforts, it is still challenging to flexibly cope with arbitrary (single or multiple) camera sensors equipped on the autonomous vehicle. In this paper, we present BEVSegFormer, an effective transformer-based method for BEV semantic segmentation from arbitrary camera rigs. Specifically, our method first encodes image features from arbitrary cameras with a shared backbone. These image features are then enhanced by a deformable transformer-based encoder. Moreover, we introduce a BEV transformer decoder module to parse BEV semantic segmentation results. An efficient multi-camera deformable attention unit is designed to carry out the BEV-to-image view transformation. Finally, the queries are reshaped according the layout of grids in the BEV, and upsampled to produce the semantic segmentation result in a supervised manner. We evaluate the proposed algorithm on the public nuScenes dataset and a self-collected dataset. Experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance on BEV semantic segmentation from arbitrary camera rigs. We also demonstrate the effectiveness of each component via ablation study.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰图（BEV）中的语义分割是自动驾驶的一项重要任务。尽管这项任务吸引了大量的研究工作，但灵活应对自动驾驶车辆上配备的任意（单个或多个）摄像头传感器仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 BEVSegFormer，这是一种基于 Transformer 的有效方法，用于从任意相机设备进行 BEV 语义分割。具体来说，我们的方法首先对来自具有共享主干的任意相机的图像特征进行编码。然后，通过基于可变形变压器的编码器增强这些图像特征。此外，我们引入了 BEV 转换器解码器模块来解析 BEV 语义分割结果。设计了一种高效的多摄像头可变形注意单元来执行 BEV 到图像视图的转换。最后，根据 BEV 中的网格布局对查询进行重塑，并进行上采样，以有监督的方式生成语义分割结果。我们在公共 nuScenes 数据集和自行收集的数据集上评估了所提出的算法。实验结果表明，我们的方法在任意相机设备的 BEV 语义分割上取得了良好的性能。我们还通过消融研究证明了每个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEVSegFormer方法，实现从任意摄像头配置中进行鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以灵活处理自动驾驶车辆上不同数量和类型的摄像头传感器，需设计通用解决方案应对任意摄像头布局。
AI.method: 采用共享主干网络编码多摄像头图像特征，通过可变形Transformer编码器增强特征，设计BEV Transformer解码器和多摄像头可变形注意力单元实现视图转换与分割结果生成。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集和自建数据集上验证，方法在任意摄像头配置下取得良好分割效果，组件有效性通过消融实验验证。
AI.conclusion: BEVSegFormer有效解决了多摄像头BEV语义分割问题，各模块设计合理且具有普适性。

authors_text: Jin Yuan,Shikai Chen,Yao Zhang,Zhongchao Shi,Xin Geng,Jianping Fan,Yong Rui
title: Graph Attention Transformer Network for Multi-Label Image Classification
title_zh: 用于多标签图像分类的图注意力变换器网络
abstract: Multi-label classification aims to recognize multiple objects or attributes from images. However, it is challenging to learn from proper label graphs to effectively characterize such inter-label correlations or dependencies. Current methods often use the co-occurrence probability of labels based on the training set as the adjacency matrix to model this correlation, which is greatly limited by the dataset and affects the model's generalization ability. In this paper, we propose a Graph Attention Transformer Network (GATN), a general framework for multi-label image classification that can effectively mine complex inter-label relationships. First, we use the cosine similarity based on the label word embedding as the initial correlation matrix, which can represent rich semantic information. Subsequently, we design the graph attention transformer layer to transfer this adjacency matrix to adapt to the current domain. Our extensive experiments have demonstrated that our proposed methods can achieve state-of-the-art performance on three datasets.
summary: Multi-label classification aims to recognize multiple objects or attributes from images. However, it is challenging to learn from proper label graphs to effectively characterize such inter-label correlations or dependencies. Current methods often use the co-occurrence probability of labels based on the training set as the adjacency matrix to model this correlation, which is greatly limited by the dataset and affects the model's generalization ability. In this paper, we propose a Graph Attention Transformer Network (GATN), a general framework for multi-label image classification that can effectively mine complex inter-label relationships. First, we use the cosine similarity based on the label word embedding as the initial correlation matrix, which can represent rich semantic information. Subsequently, we design the graph attention transformer layer to transfer this adjacency matrix to adapt to the current domain. Our extensive experiments have demonstrated that our proposed methods can achieve state-of-the-art performance on three datasets.
abstract_zh: 多标签分类旨在从图像中识别多个对象或属性。然而，从正确的标签图中学习以有效地表征这种标签间的相关性或依赖性是具有挑战性的。目前的方法往往使用基于训练集的标签共现概率作为邻接矩阵来建模这种相关性，这极大地受到数据集的限制，影响模型的泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了图注意力变换网络（GATN），这是一种多标签图像分类的通用框架，可以有效地挖掘复杂的标签间关系。首先，我们使用基于标签词嵌入的余弦相似度作为初始相关矩阵，它可以表示丰富的语义信息。随后，我们设计了图注意力变换器层来传输该邻接矩阵以适应当前域。我们广泛的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在三个数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种图注意力变换网络（GATN），用于多标签图像分类任务，通过建模标签间的复杂关系提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标签共现概率构建邻接矩阵，受限于数据集规模和分布，难以有效捕捉标签间的语义关联和复杂依赖关系。
AI.method: 基于标签词嵌入余弦相似度构建初始语义相关矩阵，并设计图注意力变换层动态调整邻接矩阵以适应目标领域特征。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上达到当时最优性能，验证了方法在多标签分类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GATN通过语义感知的图结构建模和领域自适应机制，显著提升了多标签图像分类中标签关联建模的能力。

First, we use the cosine similarity based on the label word embedding as the initial correlation matrix, which can represent rich semantic information. Subsequently, we design the graph attention transformer layer to transfer this adjacency matrix to adapt to the current domain. Our extensive experiments have demonstrated that our proposed methods can achieve state-of-the-art performance on three datasets. 多标签分类旨在从图像中识别多个对象或属性。然而，从正确的标签图中学习以有效地表征这种标签间的相关性或依赖性是具有挑战性的。目前的方法往往使用基于训练集的标签共现概率作为邻接矩阵来建模这种相关性，这极大地受到数据集的限制，影响模型的泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了图注意力变换网络（GATN），这是一种多标签图像分类的通用框架，可以有效地挖掘复杂的标签间关系。首先，我们使用基于标签词嵌入的余弦相似度作为初始相关矩阵，它可以表示丰富的语义信息。随后，我们设计了图注意力变换器层来传输该邻接矩阵以适应当前域。我们广泛的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在三个数据集上实现最先进的性能。 本文提出一种图注意力变换网络（GATN），用于多标签图像分类任务，通过建模标签间的复杂关系提升分类性能。 Jin Yuan,Shikai Chen,Yao Zhang,Zhongchao Shi,Xin Geng,Jianping Fan,Yong Rui cs.CV

authors_text: Xingbo Dong,Wanyan Xu,Zhihui Miao,Lan Ma,Chao Zhang,Jiewen Yang,Zhe Jin,Andrew Beng Jin Teoh,Jiajun Shen
title: Abandoning the Bayer-Filter to See in the Dark
title_zh: 放弃拜耳滤光片以在黑暗中观察
abstract: Low-light image enhancement - a pervasive but challenging problem, plays a central role in enhancing the visibility of an image captured in a poor illumination environment. Due to the fact that not all photons can pass the Bayer-Filter on the sensor of the color camera, in this work, we first present a De-Bayer-Filter simulator based on deep neural networks to generate a monochrome raw image from the colored raw image. Next, a fully convolutional network is proposed to achieve the low-light image enhancement by fusing colored raw data with synthesized monochrome raw data. Channel-wise attention is also introduced to the fusion process to establish a complementary interaction between features from colored and monochrome raw images. To train the convolutional networks, we propose a dataset with monochrome and color raw pairs named Mono-Colored Raw paired dataset (MCR) collected by using a monochrome camera without Bayer-Filter and a color camera with Bayer-Filter. The proposed pipeline take advantages of the fusion of the virtual monochrome and the color raw images and our extensive experiments indicate that significant improvement can be achieved by leveraging raw sensor data and data-driven learning.
summary: Low-light image enhancement - a pervasive but challenging problem, plays a central role in enhancing the visibility of an image captured in a poor illumination environment. Due to the fact that not all photons can pass the Bayer-Filter on the sensor of the color camera, in this work, we first present a De-Bayer-Filter simulator based on deep neural networks to generate a monochrome raw image from the colored raw image. Next, a fully convolutional network is proposed to achieve the low-light image enhancement by fusing colored raw data with synthesized monochrome raw data. Channel-wise attention is also introduced to the fusion process to establish a complementary interaction between features from colored and monochrome raw images. To train the convolutional networks, we propose a dataset with monochrome and color raw pairs named Mono-Colored Raw paired dataset (MCR) collected by using a monochrome camera without Bayer-Filter and a color camera with Bayer-Filter. The proposed pipeline take advantages of the fusion of the virtual monochrome and the color raw images and our extensive experiments indicate that significant improvement can be achieved by leveraging raw sensor data and data-driven learning.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强是一个普遍但具有挑战性的问题，在增强弱照明环境中捕获的图像的可见度方面发挥着核心作用。由于并非所有光子都能通过彩色相机传感器上的拜耳滤波器，因此在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种基于深度神经网络的去拜耳滤波器模拟器，以从彩色原始图像生成单色原始图像。接下来，提出了一种全卷积网络，通过将彩色原始数据与合成的单色原始数据融合来实现低光图像增强。融合过程中还引入了通道关注，以在彩色和单色原始图像的特征之间建立互补的交互。为了训练卷积网络，我们提出了一个包含单色和彩色原始对的数据集，称为单色原始配对数据集（MCR），通过使用不带拜耳滤波器的单色相机和带拜耳滤波器的彩色相机收集。所提出的管道利用了虚拟单色和彩色原始图像的融合，我们的大量实验表明，通过利用原始传感器数据和数据驱动的学习可以实现显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过弃用拜耳滤光镜并融合彩色与单色原始图像数据来提升暗光环境图像质量的方法。
AI.motivation: 拜耳滤光镜会阻挡部分光子导致低光环境下图像质量下降，传统方法难以有效增强暗光图像。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络构建去拜耳滤光模拟器生成单色原始图像，并设计全卷积网络融合彩色与单色原始数据，引入通道注意力机制优化特征交互，同时构建包含单色-彩色原始图像对的MCR数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法通过融合虚拟单色图像与彩色原始数据，在低光图像增强任务中取得了显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用原始传感器数据与数据驱动学习策略，结合单色与彩色图像信息可有效提升暗光环境下的图像增强效果。

authors_text: Qidong Huang,Xiaoyi Dong,Dongdong Chen,Hang Zhou,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu
title: Shape-invariant 3D Adversarial Point Clouds
title_zh: 形状不变的 3D 对抗点云
abstract: Adversary and invisibility are two fundamental but conflict characters of adversarial perturbations. Previous adversarial attacks on 3D point cloud recognition have often been criticized for their noticeable point outliers, since they just involve an "implicit constrain" like global distance loss in the time-consuming optimization to limit the generated noise. While point cloud is a highly structured data format, it is hard to constrain its perturbation with a simple loss or metric properly. In this paper, we propose a novel Point-Cloud Sensitivity Map to boost both the efficiency and imperceptibility of point perturbations. This map reveals the vulnerability of point cloud recognition models when encountering shape-invariant adversarial noises. These noises are designed along the shape surface with an "explicit constrain" instead of extra distance loss. Specifically, we first apply a reversible coordinate transformation on each point of the point cloud input, to reduce one degree of point freedom and limit its movement on the tangent plane. Then we calculate the best attacking direction with the gradients of the transformed point cloud obtained on the white-box model. Finally we assign each point with a non-negative score to construct the sensitivity map, which benefits both white-box adversarial invisibility and black-box query-efficiency extended in our work. Extensive evaluations prove that our method can achieve the superior performance on various point cloud recognition models, with its satisfying adversarial imperceptibility and strong resistance to different point cloud defense settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/shikiw/SI-Adv.
summary: Adversary and invisibility are two fundamental but conflict characters of adversarial perturbations. Previous adversarial attacks on 3D point cloud recognition have often been criticized for their noticeable point outliers, since they just involve an "implicit constrain" like global distance loss in the time-consuming optimization to limit the generated noise. While point cloud is a highly structured data format, it is hard to constrain its perturbation with a simple loss or metric properly. In this paper, we propose a novel Point-Cloud Sensitivity Map to boost both the efficiency and imperceptibility of point perturbations. This map reveals the vulnerability of point cloud recognition models when encountering shape-invariant adversarial noises. These noises are designed along the shape surface with an "explicit constrain" instead of extra distance loss. Specifically, we first apply a reversible coordinate transformation on each point of the point cloud input, to reduce one degree of point freedom and limit its movement on the tangent plane. Then we calculate the best attacking direction with the gradients of the transformed point cloud obtained on the white-box model. Finally we assign each point with a non-negative score to construct the sensitivity map, which benefits both white-box adversarial invisibility and black-box query-efficiency extended in our work. Extensive evaluations prove that our method can achieve the superior performance on various point cloud recognition models, with its satisfying adversarial imperceptibility and strong resistance to different point cloud defense settings. Our code is available at: https://github.com/shikiw/SI-Adv.
abstract_zh: 对手和隐形是对抗性扰动的两个基本但相互冲突的特征。以前针对 3D 点云识别的对抗性攻击经常因其明显的点异常值而受到批评，因为它们只是在耗时的优化中涉及“隐式约束”，例如全局距离损失，以限制生成的噪声。虽然点云是一种高度结构化的数据格式，但很难通过简单的损失或度量来正确地约束其扰动。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的点云灵敏度图，以提高点扰动的效率和不易察觉性。该图揭示了点云识别模型在遇到形状不变的对抗性噪声时的脆弱性。这些噪声是沿着形状表面设计的，具有“显式约束”，而不是额外的距离损失。具体来说，我们首先对点云输入的每个点应用可逆坐标变换，以减少一个点自由度并限制其在切平面上的移动。然后我们利用白盒模型上获得的变换后的点云的梯度来计算最佳攻击方向。最后，我们为每个点分配一个非负分数来构建敏感度图，这有利于我们工作中扩展的白盒对抗性不可见性和黑盒查询效率。广泛的评估证明，我们的方法可以在各种点云识别模型上取得优异的性能，具有令人满意的对抗性不可感知性和对不同点云防御设置的强大抵抗力。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/shikiw/SI-Adv。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成形状不变的3D对抗点云的新方法，通过显式约束提升攻击效率与隐蔽性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击因依赖全局距离损失等隐式约束，导致点云异常点明显，难以有效约束结构化点云数据的扰动。
AI.method: 设计点云敏感度图，通过可逆坐标变换限制点在切平面运动，结合白盒模型梯度计算攻击方向，并分配非负评分构建敏感度图。
AI.result: 在多种点云识别模型上实现优越攻击效果，具有良好的隐蔽性且能抵抗不同防御设置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式形状约束显著提升了对抗攻击的效率与隐蔽性，为点云安全研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Chuanfu Shen,Beibei Lin,Shunli Zhang,George Q. Huang,Shiqi Yu,Xin Yu
title: Gait Recognition with Mask-based Regularization
title_zh: 使用基于掩模的正则化进行步态识别
abstract: Most gait recognition methods exploit spatial-temporal representations from static appearances and dynamic walking patterns. However, we observe that many part-based methods neglect representations at boundaries. In addition, the phenomenon of overfitting on training data is relatively common in gait recognition, which is perhaps due to insufficient data and low-informative gait silhouettes. Motivated by these observations, we propose a novel mask-based regularization method named ReverseMask. By injecting perturbation on the feature map, the proposed regularization method helps convolutional architecture learn the discriminative representations and enhances generalization. Also, we design an Inception-like ReverseMask Block, which has three branches composed of a global branch, a feature dropping branch, and a feature scaling branch. Precisely, the dropping branch can extract fine-grained representations when partial activations are zero-outed. Meanwhile, the scaling branch randomly scales the feature map, keeping structural information of activations and preventing overfitting. The plug-and-play Inception-like ReverseMask block is simple and effective to generalize networks, and it also improves the performance of many state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the ReverseMask regularization help baseline achieves higher accuracy and better generalization. Moreover, the baseline with Inception-like Block significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the two most popular datasets, CASIA-B and OUMVLP. The source code will be released.
summary: Most gait recognition methods exploit spatial-temporal representations from static appearances and dynamic walking patterns. However, we observe that many part-based methods neglect representations at boundaries. In addition, the phenomenon of overfitting on training data is relatively common in gait recognition, which is perhaps due to insufficient data and low-informative gait silhouettes. Motivated by these observations, we propose a novel mask-based regularization method named ReverseMask. By injecting perturbation on the feature map, the proposed regularization method helps convolutional architecture learn the discriminative representations and enhances generalization. Also, we design an Inception-like ReverseMask Block, which has three branches composed of a global branch, a feature dropping branch, and a feature scaling branch. Precisely, the dropping branch can extract fine-grained representations when partial activations are zero-outed. Meanwhile, the scaling branch randomly scales the feature map, keeping structural information of activations and preventing overfitting. The plug-and-play Inception-like ReverseMask block is simple and effective to generalize networks, and it also improves the performance of many state-of-the-art methods. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the ReverseMask regularization help baseline achieves higher accuracy and better generalization. Moreover, the baseline with Inception-like Block significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the two most popular datasets, CASIA-B and OUMVLP. The source code will be released.
abstract_zh: 大多数步态识别方法利用静态外观和动态行走模式的时空表示。然而，我们观察到许多基于部分的方法忽略了边界处的表示。此外，训练数据的过拟合现象在步态识别中比较常见，这可能是由于数据不足和步态轮廓信息量低造成的。受这些观察的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于掩模的正则化方法，名为 ReverseMask。通过在特征图上注入扰动，所提出的正则化方法有助于卷积架构学习判别表示并增强泛化能力。此外，我们设计了一个类似 Inception 的 ReverseMask 块，它具有由全局分支、特征删除分支和特征缩放分支组成的三个分支。准确地说，当部分激活为零时，丢弃分支可以提取细粒度的表示。同时，缩放分支随机缩放特征图，保留激活的结构信息并防止过拟合。即插即用的类似 Inception 的 ReverseMask 块对于泛化网络来说是简单而有效的，并且还提高了许多最先进方法的性能。大量实验表明，ReverseMask 正则化有助于基线实现更高的准确性和更好的泛化能力。此外，在两个最流行的数据集 CASIA-B 和 OUMVLP 上，类 Inception Block 的基线显着优于最先进的方法。源代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码正则化的步态识别方法ReverseMask，通过改进特征表示和防止过拟合提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法忽视边界特征且易过拟合，主要因数据不足和低信息量的步态轮廓。
AI.method: 设计ReverseMask正则化方法，在特征图注入扰动；构建包含全局分支、特征丢弃分支和特征缩放分支的Inception-like ReverseMask块。
AI.result: 基线模型在CASIA-B和OUMVLP数据集上优于现有方法，ReverseMask显著提升准确率和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ReverseMask通过增强边界表示和正则化有效缓解过拟合，其模块化设计可广泛适用于多种网络结构。

authors_text: Xi Weng,Yan Yan,Genshun Dong,Chang Shu,Biao Wang,Hanzi Wang,Ji Zhang
title: Deep Multi-Branch Aggregation Network for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation in Street Scenes
title_zh: 用于街景实时语义分割的深度多分支聚合网络
abstract: Real-time semantic segmentation, which aims to achieve high segmentation accuracy at real-time inference speed, has received substantial attention over the past few years. However, many state-of-the-art real-time semantic segmentation methods tend to sacrifice some spatial details or contextual information for fast inference, thus leading to degradation in segmentation quality. In this paper, we propose a novel Deep Multi-branch Aggregation Network (called DMA-Net) based on the encoder-decoder structure to perform real-time semantic segmentation in street scenes. Specifically, we first adopt ResNet-18 as the encoder to efficiently generate various levels of feature maps from different stages of convolutions. Then, we develop a Multi-branch Aggregation Network (MAN) as the decoder to effectively aggregate different levels of feature maps and capture the multi-scale information. In MAN, a lattice enhanced residual block is designed to enhance feature representations of the network by taking advantage of the lattice structure. Meanwhile, a feature transformation block is introduced to explicitly transform the feature map from the neighboring branch before feature aggregation. Moreover, a global context block is used to exploit the global contextual information. These key components are tightly combined and jointly optimized in a unified network. Extensive experimental results on the challenging Cityscapes and CamVid datasets demonstrate that our proposed DMA-Net respectively obtains 77.0% and 73.6% mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) at the inference speed of 46.7 FPS and 119.8 FPS by only using a single NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti GPU. This shows that DMA-Net provides a good tradeoff between segmentation quality and speed for semantic segmentation in street scenes.
summary: Real-time semantic segmentation, which aims to achieve high segmentation accuracy at real-time inference speed, has received substantial attention over the past few years. However, many state-of-the-art real-time semantic segmentation methods tend to sacrifice some spatial details or contextual information for fast inference, thus leading to degradation in segmentation quality. In this paper, we propose a novel Deep Multi-branch Aggregation Network (called DMA-Net) based on the encoder-decoder structure to perform real-time semantic segmentation in street scenes. Specifically, we first adopt ResNet-18 as the encoder to efficiently generate various levels of feature maps from different stages of convolutions. Then, we develop a Multi-branch Aggregation Network (MAN) as the decoder to effectively aggregate different levels of feature maps and capture the multi-scale information. In MAN, a lattice enhanced residual block is designed to enhance feature representations of the network by taking advantage of the lattice structure. Meanwhile, a feature transformation block is introduced to explicitly transform the feature map from the neighboring branch before feature aggregation. Moreover, a global context block is used to exploit the global contextual information. These key components are tightly combined and jointly optimized in a unified network. Extensive experimental results on the challenging Cityscapes and CamVid datasets demonstrate that our proposed DMA-Net respectively obtains 77.0% and 73.6% mean Intersection over Union (mIoU) at the inference speed of 46.7 FPS and 119.8 FPS by only using a single NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti GPU. This shows that DMA-Net provides a good tradeoff between segmentation quality and speed for semantic segmentation in street scenes.
abstract_zh: 实时语义分割旨在以实时推理速度实现高分割精度，在过去几年中受到了广泛关注。然而，许多最先进的实时语义分割方法往往会为了快速推理而牺牲一些空间细节或上下文信息，从而导致分割质量下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器结构的新型深度多分支聚合网络（称为DMA-Net），以在街道场景中执行实时语义分割。具体来说，我们首先采用 ResNet-18 作为编码器，从不同阶段的卷积中有效地生成各种级别的特征图。然后，我们开发了一个多分支聚合网络（MAN）作为解码器，以有效聚合不同级别的特征图并捕获多尺度信息。在MAN中，设计了晶格增强残差块，以利用晶格结构来增强网络的特征表示。同时，引入特征变换块以在特征聚合之前显式变换来自相邻分支的特征图。此外，全局上下文块用于利用全局上下文信息。这些关键组件在统一网络中紧密结合并共同优化。在具有挑战性的 Cityscapes 和 CamVid 数据集上进行的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的 DMA-Net 仅使用单个 NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti GPU，就能以 46.7 FPS 和 119.8 FPS 的推理速度分别获得 77.0% 和 73.6% 的平均交集比并集 (mIoU)。这表明 DMA-Net 为街道场景中的语义分割提供了分割质量和速度之间的良好权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DMA-Net的深度多分支聚合网络，用于在街景场景中实现实时语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有的实时语义分割方法在追求高速推理时往往牺牲空间细节或上下文信息，导致分割质量下降，因此需要在速度与精度之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器结构，采用ResNet-18作为编码器生成多级特征图，并设计多分支聚合网络（MAN）作为解码器，包含晶格增强残差块、特征变换块和全局上下文块以融合多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和CamVid数据集上，DMA-Net分别以46.7 FPS和119.8 FPS的速度达到77.0%和73.6%的mIoU，验证了其在速度与精度上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: DMA-Net通过多分支聚合结构有效结合了多尺度特征与全局上下文信息，在街景语义分割任务中实现了高质量与实时性的平衡。

authors_text: Fei Yin,Yong Zhang,Xiaodong Cun,Mingdeng Cao,Yanbo Fan,Xuan Wang,Qingyan Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang
title: StyleHEAT: One-Shot High-Resolution Editable Talking Face Generation via Pre-trained StyleGAN
title_zh: StyleHEAT：通过预先训练的 StyleGAN 一次性生成高分辨率可编辑说话脸部
abstract: One-shot talking face generation aims at synthesizing a high-quality talking face video from an arbitrary portrait image, driven by a video or an audio segment. One challenging quality factor is the resolution of the output video: higher resolution conveys more details. In this work, we investigate the latent feature space of a pre-trained StyleGAN and discover some excellent spatial transformation properties. Upon the observation, we explore the possibility of using a pre-trained StyleGAN to break through the resolution limit of training datasets. We propose a novel unified framework based on a pre-trained StyleGAN that enables a set of powerful functionalities, i.e., high-resolution video generation, disentangled control by driving video or audio, and flexible face editing. Our framework elevates the resolution of the synthesized talking face to 1024*1024 for the first time, even though the training dataset has a lower resolution. We design a video-based motion generation module and an audio-based one, which can be plugged into the framework either individually or jointly to drive the video generation. The predicted motion is used to transform the latent features of StyleGAN for visual animation. To compensate for the transformation distortion, we propose a calibration network as well as a domain loss to refine the features. Moreover, our framework allows two types of facial editing, i.e., global editing via GAN inversion and intuitive editing based on 3D morphable models. Comprehensive experiments show superior video quality, flexible controllability, and editability over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: One-shot talking face generation aims at synthesizing a high-quality talking face video from an arbitrary portrait image, driven by a video or an audio segment. One challenging quality factor is the resolution of the output video: higher resolution conveys more details. In this work, we investigate the latent feature space of a pre-trained StyleGAN and discover some excellent spatial transformation properties. Upon the observation, we explore the possibility of using a pre-trained StyleGAN to break through the resolution limit of training datasets. We propose a novel unified framework based on a pre-trained StyleGAN that enables a set of powerful functionalities, i.e., high-resolution video generation, disentangled control by driving video or audio, and flexible face editing. Our framework elevates the resolution of the synthesized talking face to 1024*1024 for the first time, even though the training dataset has a lower resolution. We design a video-based motion generation module and an audio-based one, which can be plugged into the framework either individually or jointly to drive the video generation. The predicted motion is used to transform the latent features of StyleGAN for visual animation. To compensate for the transformation distortion, we propose a calibration network as well as a domain loss to refine the features. Moreover, our framework allows two types of facial editing, i.e., global editing via GAN inversion and intuitive editing based on 3D morphable models. Comprehensive experiments show superior video quality, flexible controllability, and editability over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 一次性说话人脸生成的目的是在视频或音频片段的驱动下，从任意肖像图像合成高质量的说话人脸视频。一个具有挑战性的质量因素是输出视频的分辨率：更高的分辨率可以传达更多细节。在这项工作中，我们研究了预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在特征空间，并发现了一些出色的空间变换属性。根据观察，我们探索了使用预训练 StyleGAN 突破训练数据集分辨率限制的可能性。我们提出了一种基于预训练 StyleGAN 的新型统一框架，该框架能够实现一系列强大的功能，即高分辨率视频生成、通过驱动视频或音频进行解开控制以及灵活的面部编辑。我们的框架首次将合成说话人脸的分辨率提高到 1024*1024，尽管训练数据集的分辨率较低。我们设计了一个基于视频的运动生成模块和一个基于音频的运动生成模块，它们可以单独或联合插入到框架中以驱动视频生成。预测的运动用于转换 StyleGAN 的潜在特征以实现视觉动画。为了补偿变换失真，我们提出了一个校准网络以及一个域损失来细化特征。此外，我们的框架允许两种类型的面部编辑，即通过 GAN 反转的全局编辑和基于 3D 可变形模型的直观编辑。综合实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，具有卓越的视频质量、灵活的可控性和可编辑性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出StyleHEAT框架，通过预训练StyleGAN实现高分辨率可编辑的单次 talking face 生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成高分辨率 talking face 时受限于训练数据分辨率，且缺乏灵活控制与编辑能力，需突破分辨率限制并实现多模态驱动与编辑功能。
AI.method: 基于预训练StyleGAN的潜在空间特性，设计视频/音频驱动模块、校准网络与领域损失，结合GAN反转和3D可变形模型实现全局与直观编辑。
AI.result: 首次实现1024×1024分辨率 talking face 生成，视频质量、控制灵活性及编辑能力优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: StyleHEAT通过预训练模型扩展与多模态驱动机制，为高分辨率可编辑 talking face 生成提供了统一高效解决方案。

search_text: StyleHEAT: One-Shot High-Resolution Editable Talking Face Generation via Pre-trained StyleGAN StyleHEAT：通过预先训练的 StyleGAN 一次性生成高分辨率可编辑说话脸部 One-shot talking face generation aims at synthesizing a high-quality talking face video from an arbitrary portrait image, driven by a video or an audio segment. One challenging quality factor is the resolution of the output video: higher resolution conveys more details. In this work, we investigate the latent feature space of a pre-trained StyleGAN and discover some excellent spatial transformation properties. Upon the observation, we explore the possibility of using a pre-trained StyleGAN to break through the resolution limit of training datasets. We propose a novel unified framework based on a pre-trained StyleGAN that enables a set of powerful functionalities, i.e., high-resolution video generation, disentangled control by driving video or audio, and flexible face editing. Our framework elevates the resolution of the synthesized talking face to 1024*1024 for the first time, even though the training dataset has a lower resolution. We design a video-based motion generation module and an audio-based one, which can be plugged into the framework either individually or jointly to drive the video generation. The predicted motion is used to transform the latent features of StyleGAN for visual animation. To compensate for the transformation distortion, we propose a calibration network as well as a domain loss to refine the features. Moreover, our framework allows two types of facial editing, i.e., global editing via GAN inversion and intuitive editing based on 3D morphable models. Comprehensive experiments show superior video quality, flexible controllability, and editability over state-of-the-art methods. 一次性说话人脸生成的目的是在视频或音频片段的驱动下，从任意肖像图像合成高质量的说话人脸视频。一个具有挑战性的质量因素是输出视频的分辨率：更高的分辨率可以传达更多细节。在这项工作中，我们研究了预训练 StyleGAN 的潜在特征空间，并发现了一些出色的空间变换属性。根据观察，我们探索了使用预训练 StyleGAN 突破训练数据集分辨率限制的可能性。我们提出了一种基于预训练 StyleGAN 的新型统一框架，该框架能够实现一系列强大的功能，即高分辨率视频生成、通过驱动视频或音频进行解开控制以及灵活的面部编辑。我们的框架首次将合成说话人脸的分辨率提高到 1024*1024，尽管训练数据集的分辨率较低。我们设计了一个基于视频的运动生成模块和一个基于音频的运动生成模块，它们可以单独或联合插入到框架中以驱动视频生成。预测的运动用于转换 StyleGAN 的潜在特征以实现视觉动画。为了补偿变换失真，我们提出了一个校准网络以及一个域损失来细化特征。此外，我们的框架允许两种类型的面部编辑，即通过 GAN 反转的全局编辑和基于 3D 可变形模型的直观编辑。综合实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，具有卓越的视频质量、灵活的可控性和可编辑性。 本文提出StyleHEAT框架，通过预训练StyleGAN实现高分辨率可编辑的单次 talking face 生成。 Fei Yin,Yong Zhang,Xiaodong Cun,Mingdeng Cao,Yanbo Fan,Xuan Wang,Qingyan Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Xi Weng,Yan Yan,Si Chen,Jing-Hao Xue,Hanzi Wang
title: Stage-Aware Feature Alignment Network for Real-Time Semantic Segmentation of Street Scenes
title_zh: 用于街景实时语义分割的舞台感知特征对齐网络
abstract: Over the past few years, deep convolutional neural network-based methods have made great progress in semantic segmentation of street scenes. Some recent methods align feature maps to alleviate the semantic gap between them and achieve high segmentation accuracy. However, they usually adopt the feature alignment modules with the same network configuration in the decoder and thus ignore the different roles of stages of the decoder during feature aggregation, leading to a complex decoder structure. Such a manner greatly affects the inference speed. In this paper, we present a novel Stage-aware Feature Alignment Network (SFANet) based on the encoder-decoder structure for real-time semantic segmentation of street scenes. Specifically, a Stage-aware Feature Alignment module (SFA) is proposed to align and aggregate two adjacent levels of feature maps effectively. In the SFA, by taking into account the unique role of each stage in the decoder, a novel stage-aware Feature Enhancement Block (FEB) is designed to enhance spatial details and contextual information of feature maps from the encoder. In this way, we are able to address the misalignment problem with a very simple and efficient multi-branch decoder structure. Moreover, an auxiliary training strategy is developed to explicitly alleviate the multi-scale object problem without bringing additional computational costs during the inference phase. Experimental results show that the proposed SFANet exhibits a good balance between accuracy and speed for real-time semantic segmentation of street scenes. In particular, based on ResNet-18, SFANet respectively obtains 78.1% and 74.7% mean of class-wise Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) at inference speeds of 37 FPS and 96 FPS on the challenging Cityscapes and CamVid test datasets by using only a single GTX 1080Ti GPU.
summary: Over the past few years, deep convolutional neural network-based methods have made great progress in semantic segmentation of street scenes. Some recent methods align feature maps to alleviate the semantic gap between them and achieve high segmentation accuracy. However, they usually adopt the feature alignment modules with the same network configuration in the decoder and thus ignore the different roles of stages of the decoder during feature aggregation, leading to a complex decoder structure. Such a manner greatly affects the inference speed. In this paper, we present a novel Stage-aware Feature Alignment Network (SFANet) based on the encoder-decoder structure for real-time semantic segmentation of street scenes. Specifically, a Stage-aware Feature Alignment module (SFA) is proposed to align and aggregate two adjacent levels of feature maps effectively. In the SFA, by taking into account the unique role of each stage in the decoder, a novel stage-aware Feature Enhancement Block (FEB) is designed to enhance spatial details and contextual information of feature maps from the encoder. In this way, we are able to address the misalignment problem with a very simple and efficient multi-branch decoder structure. Moreover, an auxiliary training strategy is developed to explicitly alleviate the multi-scale object problem without bringing additional computational costs during the inference phase. Experimental results show that the proposed SFANet exhibits a good balance between accuracy and speed for real-time semantic segmentation of street scenes. In particular, based on ResNet-18, SFANet respectively obtains 78.1% and 74.7% mean of class-wise Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) at inference speeds of 37 FPS and 96 FPS on the challenging Cityscapes and CamVid test datasets by using only a single GTX 1080Ti GPU.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，基于深度卷积神经网络的方法在街道场景语义分割方面取得了巨大进展。最近的一些方法对齐特征图以减轻它们之间的语义差距并实现高分割精度。然而，它们通常在解码器中采用具有相同网络配置的特征对齐模块，从而忽略了解码器在特征聚合过程中各个阶段的不同角色，导致解码器结构复杂。这种方式极大地影响了推理速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器结构的新颖的阶段感知特征对齐网络（SFANet），用于街道场景的实时语义分割。具体来说，提出了阶段感知特征对齐模块（SFA）来有效地对齐和聚合两个相邻级别的特征图。在SFA中，考虑到解码器中每个阶段的独特作用，设计了一种新颖的阶段感知特征增强块（FEB）来增强来自编码器的特征图的空间细节和上下文信息。通过这种方式，我们能够通过非常简单且高效的多分支解码器结构来解决未对准问题。此外，开发了一种辅助训练策略来明确缓解多尺度对象问题，而不会在推理阶段带来额外的计算成本。实验结果表明，所提出的 SFANet 在街道场景实时语义分割方面表现出准确性和速度之间的良好平衡。特别是，基于 ResNet-18，SFANet 仅使用单个 GTX 1080Ti GPU，在具有挑战性的 Cityscapes 和 CamVid 测试数据集上以 37 FPS 和 96 FPS 的推理速度分别获得了 78.1% 和 74.7% 的类交集平均值 (mIoU)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于编码器-解码器结构的Stage-Aware Feature Alignment Network（SFANet），用于实时街景语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解码器中使用统一的特征对齐模块，忽视了解码器各阶段在特征聚合中的不同作用，导致结构复杂且推理速度慢。
AI.method: 设计Stage-aware Feature Alignment模块（SFA），包含阶段感知的特征增强块（FEB），通过多分支解码器结构解决对齐问题，并引入辅助训练策略提升多尺度目标处理能力。
AI.result: 基于ResNet-18，SFANet在Cityscapes和CamVid数据集上分别达到78.1%/74.7% mIoU，推理速度分别为37 FPS和96 FPS（单GTX 1080Ti GPU）。
AI.conclusion: SFANet在保持高分割精度的同时显著提升推理速度，为实时街景语义分割提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Apostolos Modas,Andrea Cavallaro,Pascal Frossard
title: Data augmentation with mixtures of max-entropy transformations for filling-level classification
title_zh: 用于填充级别分类的最大熵变换混合的数据增强
abstract: We address the problem of distribution shifts in test-time data with a principled data augmentation scheme for the task of content-level classification. In such a task, properties such as shape or transparency of test-time containers (cup or drinking glass) may differ from those represented in the training data. Dealing with such distribution shifts using standard augmentation schemes is challenging and transforming the training images to cover the properties of the test-time instances requires sophisticated image manipulations. We therefore generate diverse augmentations using a family of max-entropy transformations that create samples with new shapes, colors and spectral characteristics. We show that such a principled augmentation scheme, alone, can replace current approaches that use transfer learning or can be used in combination with transfer learning to improve its performance.
summary: We address the problem of distribution shifts in test-time data with a principled data augmentation scheme for the task of content-level classification. In such a task, properties such as shape or transparency of test-time containers (cup or drinking glass) may differ from those represented in the training data. Dealing with such distribution shifts using standard augmentation schemes is challenging and transforming the training images to cover the properties of the test-time instances requires sophisticated image manipulations. We therefore generate diverse augmentations using a family of max-entropy transformations that create samples with new shapes, colors and spectral characteristics. We show that such a principled augmentation scheme, alone, can replace current approaches that use transfer learning or can be used in combination with transfer learning to improve its performance.
abstract_zh: 我们通过用于内容级分类任务的原则性数据增强方案来解决测试时数据的分布变化问题。在此类任务中，测试时容器（杯子或水杯）的形状或透明度等属性可能与训练数据中表示的属性不同。使用标准增强方案处理这种分布变化具有挑战性，并且转换训练图像以覆盖测试时实例的属性需要复杂的图像处理。因此，我们使用一系列最大熵变换来生成不同的增强，这些变换创建具有新形状、颜色和光谱特征的样本。我们证明，这种有原则的增强方案单独可以取代当前使用迁移学习的方法，或者可以与迁移学习结合使用以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大熵变换混合的数据增强方法，用于解决填充水平分类任务中测试数据分布偏移的问题。
AI.motivation: 测试数据中的容器形状或透明度可能与训练数据不同，标准数据增强方法难以有效处理此类分布偏移问题，且需要复杂的图像操作。
AI.method: 通过生成最大熵变换的混合样本，创建具有新形状、颜色和光谱特性的多样化增强数据，以替代或补充迁移学习方法。
AI.result: 该增强方案可独立替代迁移学习方法，或与迁移学习结合使用，显著提升分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 最大熵变换混合增强方法能有效应对分布偏移问题，在填充水平分类任务中表现出优于迁移学习的潜力。

search_text: Data augmentation with mixtures of max-entropy transformations for filling-level classification 用于填充级别分类的最大熵变换混合的数据增强 We address the problem of distribution shifts in test-time data with a principled data augmentation scheme for the task of content-level classification. In such a task, properties such as shape or transparency of test-time containers (cup or drinking glass) may differ from those represented in the training data. Dealing with such distribution shifts using standard augmentation schemes is challenging and transforming the training images to cover the properties of the test-time instances requires sophisticated image manipulations. We therefore generate diverse augmentations using a family of max-entropy transformations that create samples with new shapes, colors and spectral characteristics. We show that such a principled augmentation scheme, alone, can replace current approaches that use transfer learning or can be used in combination with transfer learning to improve its performance. 我们通过用于内容级分类任务的原则性数据增强方案来解决测试时数据的分布变化问题。在此类任务中，测试时容器（杯子或水杯）的形状或透明度等属性可能与训练数据中表示的属性不同。使用标准增强方案处理这种分布变化具有挑战性，并且转换训练图像以覆盖测试时实例的属性需要复杂的图像处理。因此，我们使用一系列最大熵变换来生成不同的增强，这些变换创建具有新形状、颜色和光谱特征的样本。我们证明，这种有原则的增强方案单独可以取代当前使用迁移学习的方法，或者可以与迁移学习结合使用以提高其性能。 本文提出一种基于最大熵变换混合的数据增强方法，用于解决填充水平分类任务中测试数据分布偏移的问题。 Apostolos Modas,Andrea Cavallaro,Pascal Frossard cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ruishuang Liu,Weiwei Wan,Emiko Isomura,Kensuke Harada
title: Metal Wire Manipulation Planning for 3D Curving -- How a Low Payload Robot Can Use a Bending Machine to Bend Stiff Metal Wire
title_zh: 3D 弯曲的金属线操纵规划——低负载机器人如何使用弯曲机弯曲坚硬的金属线
abstract: This paper presents a combined task and motion planner for a robot arm to carry out 3D metal wire curving tasks by collaborating with a bending machine. We assume a collaborative robot that is safe to work in a human environment but has a weak payload to bend objects with large stiffness, and developed a combined planner for the robot to use a bending machine. Our method converts a 3D curve to a bending set and generates the feasible bending sequence, machine usage, robotic grasp poses, and pick-and-place arm motion considering the combined task and motion level constraints. Compared with previous deformable linear object shaping work that relied on forces provided by robotic arms, the proposed method is suitable for the material with high stiffness. We evaluate the system using different tasks. The results show that the proposed system is flexible and robust to generate robotic motion to corporate with the designed bending machine.
summary: This paper presents a combined task and motion planner for a robot arm to carry out 3D metal wire curving tasks by collaborating with a bending machine. We assume a collaborative robot that is safe to work in a human environment but has a weak payload to bend objects with large stiffness, and developed a combined planner for the robot to use a bending machine. Our method converts a 3D curve to a bending set and generates the feasible bending sequence, machine usage, robotic grasp poses, and pick-and-place arm motion considering the combined task and motion level constraints. Compared with previous deformable linear object shaping work that relied on forces provided by robotic arms, the proposed method is suitable for the material with high stiffness. We evaluate the system using different tasks. The results show that the proposed system is flexible and robust to generate robotic motion to corporate with the designed bending machine.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种组合任务和运动规划器，用于机器人手臂与折弯机协作执行 3D 金属线弯曲任务。我们假设协作机器人可以在人类环境中安全工作，但有效载荷较弱，无法弯曲刚度较大的物体，并为机器人开发了一种使用弯曲机的组合规划器。我们的方法将 3D 曲线转换为弯曲集，并考虑组合任务和运动水平约束，生成可行的弯曲序列、机器使用、机器人抓取姿势和拾放手臂运动。与以往依靠机械臂提供力的可变形线性物体成形工作相比，该方法适用于高刚度材料。我们使用不同的任务来评估系统。结果表明，所提出的系统灵活且稳健，可以产生机器人运动以与设计的折弯机配合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合任务与运动规划的方法，使低负载机器人通过协作弯曲机实现3D刚性金属丝的弯曲操作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖机器人自身力量塑形变形物体，但低负载机器人难以弯曲高刚度金属丝，需借助外部设备实现高效操作。
AI.method: 将3D曲线转换为弯曲指令集，生成可行弯曲序列、机器使用方案、机械臂抓取姿态及运动路径，综合考虑任务与运动约束。
AI.result: 系统在多种任务中验证有效，展示了机器人与弯曲机协作的灵活性和鲁棒性，成功实现高刚度材料的弯曲操作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过机器人与弯曲机协同，解决了低负载机器人处理高刚度金属丝的难题，为刚性材料加工提供了新方案。

authors_text: Vittorio Lippi,Alessandro Filippeschi,Cristian Camardella,Francesco Porcini,Christoph Maurer,Lucia Lencioni
title: EXOSMOOTH: Test of Innovative EXOskeleton Control for SMOOTH Assistance, With and Without Ankle Actuation
title_zh: EXOSMOOTH：创新外骨骼控制的平滑辅助测试，有或没有脚踝驱动
abstract: This work presents a description of the EXOSMOOTH project, oriented to the benchmarking of lower limb exoskeletons performance. In the field of assisted walking by powered lower limb exoskeletons, the EXOSMOOTH project proposes an experiment that targets two scientific questions. The first question is related to the effectiveness of a novel control strategy for smooth assistance. Current assist strategies are based on controllers that switch the assistance level based on the gait segmentation provided by a finite state machine. The proposed strategy aims at managing phase transitions to provide a smoother assistance to the user, thus increasing the device transparency and comfort for the user. The second question is the role of the actuation at the ankle joint in assisted walking. Many novel exoskeletons devised for industrial applications do not feature an actuated ankle joint. In the EXOSMOOTH project, the ankle joint actuation will be one experimental factor to have a direct assessment of the role of an actuated joint in assisted walking. Preliminary results of 15 healthy subjects walking at different speeds while wearing a lower limb exoskeleton supported the rationale behind this question: having an actuated ankle joint could potentially reduce the torques applied by the user by a maximum value of 85 Nm. The two aforementioned questions will be investigated in a protocol that includes walking on a treadmill and on flat ground, with or without slope, and with a load applied on the back. In addition, the interaction forces measured at the exoskeleton harnesses will be used to assess the comfort of the user and the effectiveness of the control strategy to improve transparency.
summary: This work presents a description of the EXOSMOOTH project, oriented to the benchmarking of lower limb exoskeletons performance. In the field of assisted walking by powered lower limb exoskeletons, the EXOSMOOTH project proposes an experiment that targets two scientific questions. The first question is related to the effectiveness of a novel control strategy for smooth assistance. Current assist strategies are based on controllers that switch the assistance level based on the gait segmentation provided by a finite state machine. The proposed strategy aims at managing phase transitions to provide a smoother assistance to the user, thus increasing the device transparency and comfort for the user. The second question is the role of the actuation at the ankle joint in assisted walking. Many novel exoskeletons devised for industrial applications do not feature an actuated ankle joint. In the EXOSMOOTH project, the ankle joint actuation will be one experimental factor to have a direct assessment of the role of an actuated joint in assisted walking. Preliminary results of 15 healthy subjects walking at different speeds while wearing a lower limb exoskeleton supported the rationale behind this question: having an actuated ankle joint could potentially reduce the torques applied by the user by a maximum value of 85 Nm. The two aforementioned questions will be investigated in a protocol that includes walking on a treadmill and on flat ground, with or without slope, and with a load applied on the back. In addition, the interaction forces measured at the exoskeleton harnesses will be used to assess the comfort of the user and the effectiveness of the control strategy to improve transparency.
abstract_zh: 这项工作描述了 EXOSMOOTH 项目，面向下肢外骨骼性能的基准测试。在动力下肢外骨骼辅助行走领域，EXOSMOOTH 项目提出了一项针对两个科学问题的实验。第一个问题与平稳辅助的新型控制策略的有效性有关。当前的辅助策略基于控制器，该控制器根据有限状态机提供的步态分段来切换辅助级别。所提出的策略旨在管理相变，为用户提供更顺畅的帮助，从而提高设备的透明度和用户的舒适度。第二个问题是踝关节驱动在辅助行走中的作用。许多为工业应用设计的新型外骨骼不具有驱动踝关节。在 EXOSMOOTH 项目中，踝关节驱动将成为直接评估驱动关节在辅助行走中的作用的实验因素之一。 15 名佩戴下肢外骨骼的健康受试者以不同速度行走的初步结果支持了这个问题背后的基本原理：驱动踝关节可能会减少用户施加的扭矩，最大值为 85 Nm。上述两个问题将在一项协议中进行调查，该协议包括在跑步机上行走、在平坦的地面上行走、有或没有斜坡、以及在背部施加负载。此外，在外骨骼安全带上测量的相互作用力将用于评估用户的舒适度以及提高透明度的控制策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了EXOSMOOTH项目，旨在通过实验评估下肢外骨骼的性能，重点测试新型平滑辅助控制策略及踝关节驱动在外骨骼辅助行走中的作用。
AI.motivation: 当前外骨骼辅助策略依赖有限状态机进行步态分割，导致辅助切换不平滑，影响透明度和舒适性。同时，工业外骨骼常缺乏踝关节驱动，需验证其必要性。
AI.method: 通过15名健康受试者在不同速度下行走的实验，结合跑步机、平地、坡道及负重条件，测量外骨骼 harness 的交互力，评估控制策略平滑性及踝关节驱动对用户扭矩的影响。
AI.result: 初步结果显示，踝关节驱动可最大减少用户施加的扭矩85 Nm，验证了其潜在价值；控制策略的平滑性通过交互力数据初步支持。
AI.conclusion: EXOSMOOTH项目为优化外骨骼控制策略及踝关节驱动设计提供了实验依据，未来需进一步验证其在复杂场景下的有效性与普适性。
