search_text: Generative Cooperative Learning for Unsupervised Video Anomaly Detection 用于无监督视频异常检测的生成式合作学习 Video anomaly detection is well investigated in weakly-supervised and one-class classification (OCC) settings. However, unsupervised video anomaly detection methods are quite sparse, likely because anomalies are less frequent in occurrence and usually not well-defined, which when coupled with the absence of ground truth supervision, could adversely affect the performance of the learning algorithms. This problem is challenging yet rewarding as it can completely eradicate the costs of obtaining laborious annotations and enable such systems to be deployed without human intervention. To this end, we propose a novel unsupervised Generative Cooperative Learning (GCL) approach for video anomaly detection that exploits the low frequency of anomalies towards building a cross-supervision between a generator and a discriminator. In essence, both networks get trained in a cooperative fashion, thereby allowing unsupervised learning. We conduct extensive experiments on two large-scale video anomaly detection datasets, UCF crime, and ShanghaiTech. Consistent improvement over the existing state-of-the-art unsupervised and OCC methods corroborate the effectiveness of our approach. 视频异常检测在弱监督和一类分类 (OCC) 设置中得到了深入研究。然而，无监督视频异常检测方法相当稀疏，可能是因为异常发生频率较低且通常定义不明确，再加上缺乏地面实况监督，可能会对学习算法的性能产生不利影响。这个问题具有挑战性，但也很有价值，因为它可以完全消除获得费力注释的成本，并使此类系统无需人工干预即可部署。为此，我们提出了一种用于视频异常检测的新型无监督生成合作学习（GCL）方法，该方法利用低频异常来在生成器和鉴别器之间建立交叉监督。本质上，两个网络都以合作的方式进行训练，从而允许无监督学习。我们对两个大型视频异常检测数据集 UCF Crime 和 ShanghaiTech 进行了广泛的实验。对现有最先进的无监督和 OCC 方法的持续改进证实了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种无监督的生成协同学习（GCL）方法，用于视频异常检测。 Muhammad Zaigham Zaheer,Arif Mahmood,Muhammad Haris Khan,Mattia Segu,Fisher Yu,Seung-Ik Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Michele Antonazzi,Matteo Luperto,Nicola Basilico,N. Alberto Borghese
title: Enhancing Door-Status Detection for Autonomous Mobile Robots during Environment-Specific Operational Use
title_zh: 增强自主移动机器人在特定环境操作使用期间的门状态检测
comment: ef:2023 European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR), Coimbra, Portugal, 2023, pp. 1-8
comments: ef:2023 European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR), Coimbra, Portugal, 2023, pp. 1-8
abstract: Door-status detection, namely recognizing the presence of a door and its status (open or closed), can induce a remarkable impact on a mobile robot's navigation performance, especially for dynamic settings where doors can enable or disable passages, changing the topology of the map. In this work, we address the problem of building a door-status detector module for a mobile robot operating in the same environment for a long time, thus observing the same set of doors from different points of view. First, we show how to improve the mainstream approach based on object detection by considering the constrained perception setup typical of a mobile robot. Hence, we devise a method to build a dataset of images taken from a robot's perspective and we exploit it to obtain a door-status detector based on deep learning. We then leverage the typical working conditions of a robot to qualify the model for boosting its performance in the working environment via fine-tuning with additional data. Our experimental analysis shows the effectiveness of this method with results obtained both in simulation and in the real-world, that also highlight a trade-off between costs and benefits of the fine-tuning approach.
summary: Door-status detection, namely recognizing the presence of a door and its status (open or closed), can induce a remarkable impact on a mobile robot's navigation performance, especially for dynamic settings where doors can enable or disable passages, changing the topology of the map. In this work, we address the problem of building a door-status detector module for a mobile robot operating in the same environment for a long time, thus observing the same set of doors from different points of view. First, we show how to improve the mainstream approach based on object detection by considering the constrained perception setup typical of a mobile robot. Hence, we devise a method to build a dataset of images taken from a robot's perspective and we exploit it to obtain a door-status detector based on deep learning. We then leverage the typical working conditions of a robot to qualify the model for boosting its performance in the working environment via fine-tuning with additional data. Our experimental analysis shows the effectiveness of this method with results obtained both in simulation and in the real-world, that also highlight a trade-off between costs and benefits of the fine-tuning approach.
abstract_zh: 门状态检测，即识别门的存在及其状态（打开或关闭），可以对移动机器人的导航性能产生显着影响，特别是对于门可以启用或禁用通道、改变地图拓扑的动态设置。在这项工作中，我们解决了为长期在同一环境中运行的移动机器人构建门状态检测器模块的问题，从而从不同的角度观察同一组门。首先，我们展示了如何通过考虑移动机器人典型的约束感知设置来改进基于对象检测的主流方法。因此，我们设计了一种方法来构建从机器人角度拍摄的图像数据集，并利用它来获得基于深度学习的门状态检测器。然后，我们利用机器人的典型工作条件来验证模型，通过附加数据的微调来提高其在工作环境中的性能。我们的实验分析表明了该方法的有效性，并在模拟和现实世界中获得了结果，这也凸显了微调方法的成本和收益之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对自主移动机器人在特定环境中长期运行的门状态检测方法，通过改进目标检测并结合深度学习模型优化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 门状态检测对移动机器人导航性能至关重要，尤其在动态环境中门的开启或关闭会改变地图拓扑结构，而现有方法未能充分适配机器人视角和长期运行需求。
AI.method: 基于机器人视角构建图像数据集，改进主流目标检测方法以适配机器人受限感知环境，并通过典型工作条件下的微调提升模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在仿真和真实环境中均有效，同时揭示了微调策略在成本与性能提升之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过适配机器人视角的数据集构建和针对性微调，可有效提升门状态检测性能，但需权衡微调带来的成本与收益。

authors_text: Haokui Zhang,Wenze Hu,Xiaoyu Wang
title: ParC-Net: Position Aware Circular Convolution with Merits from ConvNets and Transformer
title_zh: ParC-Net：具有 ConvNet 和 Transformer 优点的位置感知循环卷积
comment: This paper has been acccpted by ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net
comments: This paper has been acccpted by ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net
abstract: Recently, vision transformers started to show impressive results which outperform large convolution based models significantly. However, in the area of small models for mobile or resource constrained devices, ConvNet still has its own advantages in both performance and model complexity. We propose ParC-Net, a pure ConvNet based backbone model that further strengthens these advantages by fusing the merits of vision transformers into ConvNets. Specifically, we propose position aware circular convolution (ParC), a light-weight convolution op which boasts a global receptive field while producing location sensitive features as in local convolutions. We combine the ParCs and squeeze-exictation ops to form a meta-former like model block, which further has the attention mechanism like transformers. The aforementioned block can be used in plug-and-play manner to replace relevant blocks in ConvNets or transformers. Experiment results show that the proposed ParC-Net achieves better performance than popular light-weight ConvNets and vision transformer based models in common vision tasks and datasets, while having fewer parameters and faster inference speed. For classification on ImageNet-1k, ParC-Net achieves 78.6% top-1 accuracy with about 5.0 million parameters, saving 11% parameters and 13% computational cost but gaining 0.2% higher accuracy and 23% faster inference speed (on ARM based Rockchip RK3288) compared with MobileViT, and uses only 0.5 times parameters but gaining 2.7% accuracy compared with DeIT. On MS-COCO object detection and PASCAL VOC segmentation tasks, ParC-Net also shows better performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net
summary: Recently, vision transformers started to show impressive results which outperform large convolution based models significantly. However, in the area of small models for mobile or resource constrained devices, ConvNet still has its own advantages in both performance and model complexity. We propose ParC-Net, a pure ConvNet based backbone model that further strengthens these advantages by fusing the merits of vision transformers into ConvNets. Specifically, we propose position aware circular convolution (ParC), a light-weight convolution op which boasts a global receptive field while producing location sensitive features as in local convolutions. We combine the ParCs and squeeze-exictation ops to form a meta-former like model block, which further has the attention mechanism like transformers. The aforementioned block can be used in plug-and-play manner to replace relevant blocks in ConvNets or transformers. Experiment results show that the proposed ParC-Net achieves better performance than popular light-weight ConvNets and vision transformer based models in common vision tasks and datasets, while having fewer parameters and faster inference speed. For classification on ImageNet-1k, ParC-Net achieves 78.6% top-1 accuracy with about 5.0 million parameters, saving 11% parameters and 13% computational cost but gaining 0.2% higher accuracy and 23% faster inference speed (on ARM based Rockchip RK3288) compared with MobileViT, and uses only 0.5 times parameters but gaining 2.7% accuracy compared with DeIT. On MS-COCO object detection and PASCAL VOC segmentation tasks, ParC-Net also shows better performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉转换器开始显示出令人印象深刻的结果，其性能显着优于基于大型卷积的模型。然而，在移动或资源受限设备的小型模型领域，ConvNet 在性能和模型复杂度方面仍然具有自己的优势。我们提出了 ParC-Net，这是一种纯粹的基于 ConvNet 的骨干模型，通过将视觉转换器的优点融合到 ConvNet 中，进一步增强了这些优势。具体来说，我们提出了位置感知循环卷积（ParC），这是一种轻量级卷积运算，它拥有全局感受野，同时产生与局部卷积一样的位置敏感特征。我们将 ParC 和挤压激发操作结合起来，形成一个类似元模型的模型块，它进一步具有像 Transformer 一样的注意力机制。上述模块可以以即插即用的方式替换 ConvNet 或 Transformer 中的相关模块。实验结果表明，所提出的 ParC-Net 在常见视觉任务和数据集中比流行的轻量级 ConvNet 和基于视觉 Transformer 的模型取得了更好的性能，同时具有更少的参数和更快的推理速度。对于 ImageNet-1k 上的分类，ParC-Net 使用约 500 万个参数实现了 78.6% 的 top-1 准确率，与 MobileViT 相比，节省了 11% 的参数和 13% 的计算成本，但准确率提高了 0.2%，推理速度加快了 23%（基于 ARM 的 Rockchip RK3288），仅使用 0.5 倍的参数，但与 DeIT 相比，准确率提高了 2.7%。在MS-COCO目标检测和PASCAL VOC分割任务上，ParC-Net也表现出了更好的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net 获取

AI.tldr: 提出ParC-Net，一种结合卷积神经网络（ConvNet）与视觉Transformer优势的轻量级模型，通过位置感知环形卷积（ParC）提升性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在大型模型中表现优异，但轻量级模型在移动端或资源受限设备上仍需ConvNet的高效性。需融合两者优势以兼顾性能与复杂度。
AI.method: 设计位置感知环形卷积（ParC），结合全局感受野与局部位置敏感特性；将ParC与squeeze-excitation操作结合形成类Transformer模块，可替换现有模型组件。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k分类任务中，ParC-Net参数量5.0M，准确率78.6%，相比MobileViT减少11%参数与13%计算量，速度提升23%；相比DeIT参数减少50%且准确率高2.7%。在目标检测与分割任务中亦表现更优。
AI.conclusion: ParC-Net有效融合ConvNet与Transformer优势，在保持轻量化的同时提升准确率与推理速度，适用于移动端视觉任务。

search_text: ParC-Net: Position Aware Circular Convolution with Merits from ConvNets and Transformer ParC-Net：具有 ConvNet 和 Transformer 优点的位置感知循环卷积 Recently, vision transformers started to show impressive results which outperform large convolution based models significantly. However, in the area of small models for mobile or resource constrained devices, ConvNet still has its own advantages in both performance and model complexity. We propose ParC-Net, a pure ConvNet based backbone model that further strengthens these advantages by fusing the merits of vision transformers into ConvNets. Specifically, we propose position aware circular convolution (ParC), a light-weight convolution op which boasts a global receptive field while producing location sensitive features as in local convolutions. We combine the ParCs and squeeze-exictation ops to form a meta-former like model block, which further has the attention mechanism like transformers. The aforementioned block can be used in plug-and-play manner to replace relevant blocks in ConvNets or transformers. Experiment results show that the proposed ParC-Net achieves better performance than popular light-weight ConvNets and vision transformer based models in common vision tasks and datasets, while having fewer parameters and faster inference speed. For classification on ImageNet-1k, ParC-Net achieves 78.6% top-1 accuracy with about 5.0 million parameters, saving 11% parameters and 13% computational cost but gaining 0.2% higher accuracy and 23% faster inference speed (on ARM based Rockchip RK3288) compared with MobileViT, and uses only 0.5 times parameters but gaining 2.7% accuracy compared with DeIT. On MS-COCO object detection and PASCAL VOC segmentation tasks, ParC-Net also shows better performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net 最近，视觉转换器开始显示出令人印象深刻的结果，其性能显着优于基于大型卷积的模型。然而，在移动或资源受限设备的小型模型领域，ConvNet 在性能和模型复杂度方面仍然具有自己的优势。我们提出了 ParC-Net，这是一种纯粹的基于 ConvNet 的骨干模型，通过将视觉转换器的优点融合到 ConvNet 中，进一步增强了这些优势。具体来说，我们提出了位置感知循环卷积（ParC），这是一种轻量级卷积运算，它拥有全局感受野，同时产生与局部卷积一样的位置敏感特征。我们将 ParC 和挤压激发操作结合起来，形成一个类似元模型的模型块，它进一步具有像 Transformer 一样的注意力机制。上述模块可以以即插即用的方式替换 ConvNet 或 Transformer 中的相关模块。实验结果表明，所提出的 ParC-Net 在常见视觉任务和数据集中比流行的轻量级 ConvNet 和基于视觉 Transformer 的模型取得了更好的性能，同时具有更少的参数和更快的推理速度。对于 ImageNet-1k 上的分类，ParC-Net 使用约 500 万个参数实现了 78.6% 的 top-1 准确率，与 MobileViT 相比，节省了 11% 的参数和 13% 的计算成本，但准确率提高了 0.2%，推理速度加快了 23%（基于 ARM 的 Rockchip RK3288），仅使用 0.5 倍的参数，但与 DeIT 相比，准确率提高了 2.7%。在MS-COCO目标检测和PASCAL VOC分割任务上，ParC-Net也表现出了更好的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/hkzhang91/ParC-Net 获取 提出ParC-Net，一种结合卷积神经网络（ConvNet）与视觉Transformer优势的轻量级模型，通过位置感知环形卷积（ParC）提升性能。 Haokui Zhang,Wenze Hu,Xiaoyu Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yinao Li,Yutaro Iwamoto,Ryousuke Nakamura,Lanfen Lin,Ruofeng Tong,Yen-Wei Chen
title: Efficient and Accurate Hyperspectral Pansharpening Using 3D VolumeNet and 2.5D Texture Transfer
title_zh: 使用 3D VolumeNet 和 2.5D 纹理传输进行高效、准确的高光谱全色锐化
abstract: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNN) have obtained promising results in single-image SR for hyperspectral pansharpening. However, enhancing CNNs' representation ability with fewer parameters and a shorter prediction time is a challenging and critical task. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-spectral image fusion method using a combination of the previously proposed 3D CNN model VolumeNet and 2.5D texture transfer method using other modality high resolution (HR) images. Since a multi-spectral (MS) image consists of several bands and each band is a 2D image slice, MS images can be seen as 3D data. Thus, we use the previously proposed VolumeNet to fuse HR panchromatic (PAN) images and bicubic interpolated MS images. Because the proposed 3D VolumeNet can effectively improve the accuracy by expanding the receptive field of the model, and due to its lightweight structure, we can achieve better performance against the existing method without purchasing a large number of remote sensing images for training. In addition, VolumeNet can restore the high-frequency information lost in the HR MR image as much as possible, reducing the difficulty of feature extraction in the following step: 2.5D texture transfer. As one of the latest technologies, deep learning-based texture transfer has been demonstrated to effectively and efficiently improve the visual performance and quality evaluation indicators of image reconstruction. Different from the texture transfer processing of RGB image, we use HR PAN images as the reference images and perform texture transfer for each frequency band of MS images, which is named 2.5D texture transfer. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms the existing methods in terms of objective accuracy assessment, method efficiency, and visual subjective evaluation.
summary: Recently, convolutional neural networks (CNN) have obtained promising results in single-image SR for hyperspectral pansharpening. However, enhancing CNNs' representation ability with fewer parameters and a shorter prediction time is a challenging and critical task. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-spectral image fusion method using a combination of the previously proposed 3D CNN model VolumeNet and 2.5D texture transfer method using other modality high resolution (HR) images. Since a multi-spectral (MS) image consists of several bands and each band is a 2D image slice, MS images can be seen as 3D data. Thus, we use the previously proposed VolumeNet to fuse HR panchromatic (PAN) images and bicubic interpolated MS images. Because the proposed 3D VolumeNet can effectively improve the accuracy by expanding the receptive field of the model, and due to its lightweight structure, we can achieve better performance against the existing method without purchasing a large number of remote sensing images for training. In addition, VolumeNet can restore the high-frequency information lost in the HR MR image as much as possible, reducing the difficulty of feature extraction in the following step: 2.5D texture transfer. As one of the latest technologies, deep learning-based texture transfer has been demonstrated to effectively and efficiently improve the visual performance and quality evaluation indicators of image reconstruction. Different from the texture transfer processing of RGB image, we use HR PAN images as the reference images and perform texture transfer for each frequency band of MS images, which is named 2.5D texture transfer. The experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms the existing methods in terms of objective accuracy assessment, method efficiency, and visual subjective evaluation.
abstract_zh: 最近，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在用于高光谱全色锐化的单图像 SR 方面取得了有希望的结果。然而，以更少的参数和更短的预测时间增强 CNN 的表示能力是一项具有挑战性和关键性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多光谱图像融合方法，该方法结合了先前提出的 3D CNN 模型 VolumeNet 和使用其他模态高分辨率（HR）图像的 2.5D 纹理传输方法。由于多光谱 (MS) 图像由多个波段组成，每个波段都是一个 2D 图像切片，因此 MS 图像可以视为 3D 数据。因此，我们使用之前提出的 VolumeNet 来融合 HR 全色 (PAN) 图像和双三次插值 MS 图像。因为所提出的3D VolumeNet可以通过扩大模型的感受野来有效提高精度，并且由于其轻量级结构，我们可以在不购买大量遥感图像进行训练的情况下获得比现有方法更好的性能。此外，VolumeNet可以尽可能地恢复HR MR图像中丢失的高频信息，降低了后续步骤：2.5D纹理传输中特征提取的难度。作为最新技术之一，基于深度学习的纹理迁移已被证明能够有效、高效地提高图像重建的视觉性能和质量评价指标。与RGB图像的纹理转移处理不同，我们使用HR PAN图像作为参考图像，对MS图像的每个频段进行纹理转移，称为2.5D纹理转移。实验结果表明，该方法在客观精度评估、方法效率和视觉主观评价方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合3D VolumeNet和2.5D纹理迁移的高光谱 pansharpening 方法，以提高融合图像的精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN在高光谱 pansharpening 中面临参数多、预测时间长的问题，且需大量遥感图像训练。本文旨在通过轻量化模型和纹理迁移技术，在减少数据依赖的同时提升性能。
AI.method: 使用3D VolumeNet融合高分辨率全色（PAN）图像与双三次插值多光谱（MS）图像，随后以HR PAN为参考，对MS图像各频段进行2.5D纹理迁移，恢复高频信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在客观精度、计算效率和视觉评估上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合3D VolumeNet与2.5D纹理迁移的方案能有效提升高光谱 pansharpening 的准确性与效率，且无需依赖大规模训练数据。

authors_text: Di Chang,Aljaž Božič,Tong Zhang,Qingsong Yan,Yingcong Chen,Sabine Süsstrunk,Matthias Nießner
title: RC-MVSNet: Unsupervised Multi-View Stereo with Neural Rendering
title_zh: RC-MVSNet：具有神经渲染的无监督多视图立体
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022, Project Page: https://boese0601.github.io/rc-mvsnet/
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022, Project Page: https://boese0601.github.io/rc-mvsnet/
abstract: Finding accurate correspondences among different views is the Achilles' heel of unsupervised Multi-View Stereo (MVS). Existing methods are built upon the assumption that corresponding pixels share similar photometric features. However, multi-view images in real scenarios observe non-Lambertian surfaces and experience occlusions. In this work, we propose a novel approach with neural rendering (RC-MVSNet) to solve such ambiguity issues of correspondences among views. Specifically, we impose a depth rendering consistency loss to constrain the geometry features close to the object surface to alleviate occlusions. Concurrently, we introduce a reference view synthesis loss to generate consistent supervision, even for non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks\&Temples benchmarks demonstrate that our RC-MVSNet approach achieves state-of-the-art performance over unsupervised MVS frameworks and competitive performance to many supervised methods.The code is released at https://github.com/Boese0601/RC-MVSNet
summary: Finding accurate correspondences among different views is the Achilles' heel of unsupervised Multi-View Stereo (MVS). Existing methods are built upon the assumption that corresponding pixels share similar photometric features. However, multi-view images in real scenarios observe non-Lambertian surfaces and experience occlusions. In this work, we propose a novel approach with neural rendering (RC-MVSNet) to solve such ambiguity issues of correspondences among views. Specifically, we impose a depth rendering consistency loss to constrain the geometry features close to the object surface to alleviate occlusions. Concurrently, we introduce a reference view synthesis loss to generate consistent supervision, even for non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks\&Temples benchmarks demonstrate that our RC-MVSNet approach achieves state-of-the-art performance over unsupervised MVS frameworks and competitive performance to many supervised methods.The code is released at https://github.com/Boese0601/RC-MVSNet
abstract_zh: 找到不同视图之间的准确对应关系是无监督多视图立体 (MVS) 的致命弱点。现有方法建立在相应像素具有相似光度特征的假设之上。然而，真实场景中的多视图图像观察非朗伯表面并经历遮挡。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的神经渲染方法（RC-MVSNet）来解决视图之间对应的模糊问题。具体来说，我们施加深度渲染一致性损失来约束靠近物体表面的几何特征，以减轻遮挡。同时，我们引入了参考视图合成损失来生成一致的监督，即使对于非朗伯表面也是如此。对 DTU 和 Tanks\&Temples 基准的大量实验表明，我们的 RC-MVSNet 方法在无监督 MVS 框架上实现了最先进的性能，并且与许多监督方法相比具有竞争性能。代码发布于 https://github.com/Boese0601/RC-MVSNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经渲染的无监督多视角立体视觉方法RC-MVSNet，以解决实际场景中因非朗伯表面和遮挡导致的视图间对应关系模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督多视角立体视觉方法依赖像素光度相似性假设，在非朗伯表面和遮挡场景下表现不佳，亟需更鲁棒的对应关系建模方法。
AI.method: 通过引入深度渲染一致性损失约束几何特征贴近物体表面以缓解遮挡，并结合参考视图合成损失生成非朗伯表面的一致监督，利用神经渲染实现无监督训练。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks&Temples基准测试中，RC-MVSNet在无监督方法中达到最先进水平，并优于许多监督方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 神经渲染有效解决了多视角对应关系的模糊性问题，为无监督三维重建提供了新思路。

search_text: RC-MVSNet: Unsupervised Multi-View Stereo with Neural Rendering RC-MVSNet：具有神经渲染的无监督多视图立体 Finding accurate correspondences among different views is the Achilles' heel of unsupervised Multi-View Stereo (MVS). Existing methods are built upon the assumption that corresponding pixels share similar photometric features. However, multi-view images in real scenarios observe non-Lambertian surfaces and experience occlusions. In this work, we propose a novel approach with neural rendering (RC-MVSNet) to solve such ambiguity issues of correspondences among views. Specifically, we impose a depth rendering consistency loss to constrain the geometry features close to the object surface to alleviate occlusions. Concurrently, we introduce a reference view synthesis loss to generate consistent supervision, even for non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks\&Temples benchmarks demonstrate that our RC-MVSNet approach achieves state-of-the-art performance over unsupervised MVS frameworks and competitive performance to many supervised methods.The code is released at https://github.com/Boese0601/RC-MVSNet 找到不同视图之间的准确对应关系是无监督多视图立体 (MVS) 的致命弱点。现有方法建立在相应像素具有相似光度特征的假设之上。然而，真实场景中的多视图图像观察非朗伯表面并经历遮挡。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的神经渲染方法（RC-MVSNet）来解决视图之间对应的模糊问题。具体来说，我们施加深度渲染一致性损失来约束靠近物体表面的几何特征，以减轻遮挡。同时，我们引入了参考视图合成损失来生成一致的监督，即使对于非朗伯表面也是如此。对 DTU 和 Tanks\&Temples 基准的大量实验表明，我们的 RC-MVSNet 方法在无监督 MVS 框架上实现了最先进的性能，并且与许多监督方法相比具有竞争性能。代码发布于 https://github.com/Boese0601/RC-MVSNet 本文提出了一种基于神经渲染的无监督多视角立体视觉方法RC-MVSNet，以解决实际场景中因非朗伯表面和遮挡导致的视图间对应关系模糊问题。 Di Chang,Aljaž Božič,Tong Zhang,Qingsong Yan,Yingcong Chen,Sabine Süsstrunk,Matthias Nießner cs.CV

authors_text: Thorsten Hempel,Ayoub Al-Hamadi
title: An Online Semantic Mapping System for Extending and Enhancing Visual SLAM
title_zh: 用于扩展和增强视觉 SLAM 的在线语义映射系统
comment: Accepted by Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Elsevier, 7 Mar 2022
comments: Accepted by Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence, Elsevier, 7 Mar 2022
abstract: We present a real-time semantic mapping approach for mobile vision systems with a 2D to 3D object detection pipeline and rapid data association for generated landmarks. Besides the semantic map enrichment the associated detections are further introduced as semantic constraints into a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system for pose correction purposes. This way, we are able generate additional meaningful information that allows to achieve higher-level tasks, while simultaneously leveraging the view-invariance of object detections to improve the accuracy and the robustness of the odometry estimation. We propose tracklets of locally associated object observations to handle ambiguous and false predictions and an uncertainty-based greedy association scheme for an accelerated processing time. Our system reaches real-time capabilities with an average iteration duration of 65~ms and is able to improve the pose estimation of a state-of-the-art SLAM by up to 68% on a public dataset. Additionally, we implemented our approach as a modular ROS package that makes it straightforward for integration in arbitrary graph-based SLAM methods.
summary: We present a real-time semantic mapping approach for mobile vision systems with a 2D to 3D object detection pipeline and rapid data association for generated landmarks. Besides the semantic map enrichment the associated detections are further introduced as semantic constraints into a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system for pose correction purposes. This way, we are able generate additional meaningful information that allows to achieve higher-level tasks, while simultaneously leveraging the view-invariance of object detections to improve the accuracy and the robustness of the odometry estimation. We propose tracklets of locally associated object observations to handle ambiguous and false predictions and an uncertainty-based greedy association scheme for an accelerated processing time. Our system reaches real-time capabilities with an average iteration duration of 65~ms and is able to improve the pose estimation of a state-of-the-art SLAM by up to 68% on a public dataset. Additionally, we implemented our approach as a modular ROS package that makes it straightforward for integration in arbitrary graph-based SLAM methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种适用于移动视觉系统的实时语义映射方法，具有 2D 到 3D 对象检测管道以及生成的地标的快速数据关联。除了语义图丰富之外，相关检测还作为语义约束进一步引入同步定位和建图（SLAM）系统中，以实现姿态校正。通过这种方式，我们能够生成额外的有意义的信息，从而实现更高级别的任务，同时利用对象检测的视图不变性来提高里程计估计的准确性和鲁棒性。我们提出了局部关联对象观察的轨迹来处理模糊和错误的预测，并提出了基于不确定性的贪婪关联方案来加速处​​理时间。我们的系统达到了实时能力，平均迭代持续时间为 65~ms，并且能够在公共数据集上将最先进的 SLAM 的姿态估计提高高达 68%。此外，我们将我们的方法实现为模块化 ROS 包，使其可以直接集成到任意基于图的 SLAM 方法中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时语义映射方法，通过2D到3D的目标检测流水线和快速数据关联生成地标，将语义约束引入SLAM系统以提升定位精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM系统缺乏语义信息，难以处理动态环境和高层任务。通过引入语义约束，可利用目标检测的视角不变性提升里程计估计的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计2D-3D目标检测流水线，结合局部关联的物体观察轨迹（tracklets）和基于不确定性的贪婪关联策略，将语义信息作为约束条件集成到SLAM系统中。
AI.result: 系统实现平均65ms的实时处理速度，在公开数据集上将先进SLAM系统的位姿估计精度提升最高68%，并开发了可集成到任意图优化SLAM方法的ROS模块。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过语义信息增强SLAM系统，有效提升了动态环境下的定位精度和鲁棒性，为高层任务提供了更多语义信息支持。

authors_text: Michael Roe,Konstantina Spanaki,Athina Ioannou,Efpraxia Zamani,Mihalis Giannakis
title: Drivers and challenges of internet of things diffusion in smart stores: A field exploration
title_zh: 物联网在智能商店中传播的驱动因素和挑战：实地探索
comment: ef:Technological Forecasting and Social Change, Elsevier, 2022, 178, pp.121593
comments: ef:Technological Forecasting and Social Change, Elsevier, 2022, 178, pp.121593
abstract: The digitally disruptive environment has evolved rapidly due to the introduction of new advancements within the field of smart applications. Applications of one of the most prominent technologies, Internet of Things (IoT), often appear in the retail sector, where smart services have transformed the customer experience holistically. Presented in this paper are the findings from an exploratory field study in the retail service sector, which drew on the views of experienced practitioners about the smart store experience and the associated changes. The paper presents an overview of the drivers of smart retail service diffusion and the relevant challenges, such as the business expectations and the heterogeneity of devices. The arising themes indicate that IoT security is a major challenge for businesses installing IoT devices in their journey towards smart store transformation. The paper highlights the importance of a secure data-sharing IoT environment that respects customer privacy as the smart experience in-store offers data-driven insights and services. Implications for research and practice are discussed in terms of the customer experience relevant to the identified challenges.
summary: The digitally disruptive environment has evolved rapidly due to the introduction of new advancements within the field of smart applications. Applications of one of the most prominent technologies, Internet of Things (IoT), often appear in the retail sector, where smart services have transformed the customer experience holistically. Presented in this paper are the findings from an exploratory field study in the retail service sector, which drew on the views of experienced practitioners about the smart store experience and the associated changes. The paper presents an overview of the drivers of smart retail service diffusion and the relevant challenges, such as the business expectations and the heterogeneity of devices. The arising themes indicate that IoT security is a major challenge for businesses installing IoT devices in their journey towards smart store transformation. The paper highlights the importance of a secure data-sharing IoT environment that respects customer privacy as the smart experience in-store offers data-driven insights and services. Implications for research and practice are discussed in terms of the customer experience relevant to the identified challenges.
abstract_zh: 由于智能应用领域的新进步的引入，数字颠覆性环境迅速发展。物联网 (IoT) 是最突出的技术之一，其应用经常出现在零售行业，智能服务从整体上改变了客户体验。本文介绍了零售服务行业探索性实地研究的结果，该研究借鉴了经验丰富的从业者对智能商店体验和相关变化的看法。本文概述了智能零售服务扩散的驱动因素以及相关挑战，例如业务期望和设备的异构性。出现的主题表明，物联网安全是安装物联网设备的企业在智能商店转型过程中面临的主要挑战。该论文强调了尊重客户隐私的安全数据共享物联网环境的重要性，因为店内的智能体验提供了数据驱动的见解和服务。根据与已识别的挑战相关的客户体验来讨论对研究和实践的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实地研究探讨智能零售环境中物联网（IoT）扩散的驱动因素与挑战，分析其对顾客体验的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着数字技术的快速发展，物联网在零售领域的应用日益广泛，但其扩散过程中面临诸多挑战，需深入研究以指导实践与未来研究。
AI.method: 采用探索性实地研究方法，收集零售行业从业者对智能商店体验及技术应用变化的观点与见解。
AI.result: 研究发现，业务期望与设备异构性是主要驱动因素，而物联网安全、数据隐私及异构设备整合是关键挑战，需构建安全的数据共享环境以保障顾客体验。
AI.conclusion: 智能零售的物联网应用需平衡技术创新与安全隐私，未来研究应聚焦于解决设备兼容性及数据安全问题，以推动行业可持续发展。

search_text: Drivers and challenges of internet of things diffusion in smart stores: A field exploration 物联网在智能商店中传播的驱动因素和挑战：实地探索 The digitally disruptive environment has evolved rapidly due to the introduction of new advancements within the field of smart applications. Applications of one of the most prominent technologies, Internet of Things (IoT), often appear in the retail sector, where smart services have transformed the customer experience holistically. Presented in this paper are the findings from an exploratory field study in the retail service sector, which drew on the views of experienced practitioners about the smart store experience and the associated changes. The paper presents an overview of the drivers of smart retail service diffusion and the relevant challenges, such as the business expectations and the heterogeneity of devices. The arising themes indicate that IoT security is a major challenge for businesses installing IoT devices in their journey towards smart store transformation. The paper highlights the importance of a secure data-sharing IoT environment that respects customer privacy as the smart experience in-store offers data-driven insights and services. Implications for research and practice are discussed in terms of the customer experience relevant to the identified challenges. 由于智能应用领域的新进步的引入，数字颠覆性环境迅速发展。物联网 (IoT) 是最突出的技术之一，其应用经常出现在零售行业，智能服务从整体上改变了客户体验。本文介绍了零售服务行业探索性实地研究的结果，该研究借鉴了经验丰富的从业者对智能商店体验和相关变化的看法。本文概述了智能零售服务扩散的驱动因素以及相关挑战，例如业务期望和设备的异构性。出现的主题表明，物联网安全是安装物联网设备的企业在智能商店转型过程中面临的主要挑战。该论文强调了尊重客户隐私的安全数据共享物联网环境的重要性，因为店内的智能体验提供了数据驱动的见解和服务。根据与已识别的挑战相关的客户体验来讨论对研究和实践的影响。 本文通过实地研究探讨智能零售环境中物联网（IoT）扩散的驱动因素与挑战，分析其对顾客体验的影响。 Michael Roe,Konstantina Spanaki,Athina Ioannou,Efpraxia Zamani,Mihalis Giannakis cs.HC

authors_text: Kai Liu,Tianyi Wu,Cong Liu,Guodong Guo
title: Dynamic Group Transformer: A General Vision Transformer Backbone with Dynamic Group Attention
title_zh: Dynamic Group Transformer：具有动态组注意力的通用视觉 Transformer 主干
abstract: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. To reduce the quadratic computation complexity caused by each query attending to all keys/values, various methods have constrained the range of attention within local regions, where each query only attends to keys/values within a hand-crafted window. However, these hand-crafted window partition mechanisms are data-agnostic and ignore their input content, so it is likely that one query maybe attends to irrelevant keys/values. To address this issue, we propose a Dynamic Group Attention (DG-Attention), which dynamically divides all queries into multiple groups and selects the most relevant keys/values for each group. Our DG-Attention can flexibly model more relevant dependencies without any spatial constraint that is used in hand-crafted window based attention. Built on the DG-Attention, we develop a general vision transformer backbone named Dynamic Group Transformer (DGT). Extensive experiments show that our models can outperform the state-of-the-art methods on multiple common vision tasks, including image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation.
summary: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. To reduce the quadratic computation complexity caused by each query attending to all keys/values, various methods have constrained the range of attention within local regions, where each query only attends to keys/values within a hand-crafted window. However, these hand-crafted window partition mechanisms are data-agnostic and ignore their input content, so it is likely that one query maybe attends to irrelevant keys/values. To address this issue, we propose a Dynamic Group Attention (DG-Attention), which dynamically divides all queries into multiple groups and selects the most relevant keys/values for each group. Our DG-Attention can flexibly model more relevant dependencies without any spatial constraint that is used in hand-crafted window based attention. Built on the DG-Attention, we develop a general vision transformer backbone named Dynamic Group Transformer (DGT). Extensive experiments show that our models can outperform the state-of-the-art methods on multiple common vision tasks, including image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and instance segmentation.
abstract_zh: 最近，变形金刚在各种视觉任务中表现出了可喜的表现。为了减少由于每个查询关注所有键/值而引起的二次计算复杂性，各种方法将关注范围限制在局部区域内，其中每个查询仅关注手工制作的窗口内的键/值。然而，这些手工制作的窗口分区机制与数据无关，并且忽略其输入内容，因此一个查询可能会涉及不相关的键/值。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了动态组注意力（DG-Attention），它将所有查询动态划分为多个组，并为每个组选择最相关的键/值。我们的 DG-Attention 可以灵活地建模更多相关的依赖关系，而无需手工制作的基于窗口的注意力中使用的任何空间约束。在 DG-Attention 的基础上，我们开发了一个名为 Dynamic Group Transformer (DGT) 的通用视觉变压器主干。大量实验表明，我们的模型在多个常见视觉任务上的性能优于最先进的方法，包括图像分类、语义分割、对象检测和实例分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dynamic Group Transformer (DGT)的通用视觉Transformer骨干网络，通过动态分组注意力机制（DG-Attention）优化视觉任务中的计算复杂度与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在视觉任务中因全连接注意力导致计算复杂度高，且固定窗口划分机制无法适应输入内容，易导致查询与无关键值对交互。
AI.method: 设计动态分组注意力（DG-Attention），将查询动态分组并为每组选择最相关的键值对，无需固定空间约束，构建通用视觉Transformer骨干DGT。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割、目标检测等任务中，DGT模型优于现有最先进方法，验证了动态分组机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DG-Attention通过动态适应输入内容的分组策略，降低了计算成本并提升了模型性能，DGT成为多功能视觉任务的高效骨干网络。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Enric Sesa-Nogueras,Josep Roure-Alcobé,Anna Esposito,Jiri Mekyska,Karmele López-de-Ipiña
title: A Preliminary Study on Aging Examining Online Handwriting
title_zh: 在线笔迹老化检测的初步研究
abstract: In order to develop infocommunications devices so that the capabilities of the human brain may interact with the capabilities of any artificially cognitive system a deeper knowledge of aging is necessary. Especially if society does not want to exclude elder people and wants to develop automatic systems able to help and improve the quality of life of this group of population, healthy individuals as well as those with cognitive decline or other pathologies. This paper tries to establish the variations in handwriting tasks with the goal to obtain a better knowledge about aging. We present the correlation results between several parameters extracted from online handwriting and the age of the writers. It is based on BIOSECURID database, which consists of 400 people that provided several biometric traits, including online handwriting. The main idea is to identify those parameters that are more stable and those more age dependent. One challenging topic for disease diagnose is the differentiation between healthy and pathological aging. For this purpose, it is necessary to be aware of handwriting parameters that are, in general, not affected by aging and those who experiment changes, increase or decrease their values, because of it. This paper contributes to this research line analyzing a selected set of online handwriting parameters provided by a healthy group of population aged from 18 to 70 years. Preliminary results show that these parameters are not affected by aging and therefore, changes in their values can only be attributed to motor or cognitive disorders.
summary: In order to develop infocommunications devices so that the capabilities of the human brain may interact with the capabilities of any artificially cognitive system a deeper knowledge of aging is necessary. The main idea is to identify those parameters that are more stable and those more age dependent. One challenging topic for disease diagnose is the differentiation between healthy and pathological aging. For this purpose, it is necessary to be aware of handwriting parameters that are, in general, not affected by aging and those who experiment changes, increase or decrease their values, because of it. abstract_zh: 为了开发信息通信设备，使人脑的功能可以与任何人工认知系统的功能进行交互，需要对衰老有更深入的了解。特别是如果社会不想排斥老年人，并希望开发能够帮助和改善这一群体、健康个体以及患有认知衰退或其他疾病的人的生活质量的自动化系统。本文试图建立手写任务的变化，目的是更好地了解衰老。我们提出了从在线笔迹中提取的几个参数与书写者年龄之间的相关性结果。它基于 BIOSECURID 数据库，该数据库由 400 人组成，提供了多种生物识别特征，包括在线笔迹。主要思想是确定那些更稳定和更依赖年龄的参数。疾病诊断的一个具有挑战性的话题是健康衰老和病理衰老的区别。为此，有必要了解一般情况下不受年龄影响的手写参数，以及因此而尝试改变、增加或减少其值的人。本文致力于分析一组由 18 至 70 岁健康人群提供的精选在线手写参数。初步结果表明，这些参数不受衰老的影响，因此，其值的变化只能归因于运动或认知障碍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线手写参数与年龄之间的关系，以更好地了解衰老过程。
AI.motivation: 为了开发能够帮助老年人改善生活质量的自动系统，需要更深入地了解衰老过程，特别是区分健康衰老和病理衰老。
AI.method: 基于BIOSECURID数据库，分析了400名提供在线手写数据的受试者的多个参数，以确定哪些参数受年龄影响较大，哪些较为稳定。
AI.result: 初步结果显示，所选在线手写参数不受年龄影响，其变化可能与运动或认知障碍有关。
AI.conclusion: 这些参数可以作为区分健康衰老与病理衰老的潜在指标，为相关疾病诊断提供参考。

Preliminary results show that these parameters are not affected by aging and therefore, changes in their values can only be attributed to motor or cognitive disorders. 为了开发信息通信设备，使人脑的功能可以与任何人工认知系统的功能进行交互，需要对衰老有更深入的了解。特别是如果社会不想排斥老年人，并希望开发能够帮助和改善这一群体、健康个体以及患有认知衰退或其他疾病的人的生活质量的自动化系统。本文试图建立手写任务的变化，目的是更好地了解衰老。我们提出了从在线笔迹中提取的几个参数与书写者年龄之间的相关性结果。它基于 BIOSECURID 数据库，该数据库由 400 人组成，提供了多种生物识别特征，包括在线笔迹。主要思想是确定那些更稳定和更依赖年龄的参数。疾病诊断的一个具有挑战性的话题是健康衰老和病理衰老的区别。为此，有必要了解一般情况下不受年龄影响的手写参数，以及因此而尝试改变、增加或减少其值的人。本文致力于分析一组由 18 至 70 岁健康人群提供的精选在线手写参数。初步结果表明，这些参数不受衰老的影响，因此，其值的变化只能归因于运动或认知障碍。 本文研究了在线手写参数与年龄之间的关系，以更好地了解衰老过程。 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Enric Sesa-Nogueras,Josep Roure-Alcobé,Anna Esposito,Jiri Mekyska,Karmele López-de-Ipiña cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Stefano Marinozzi,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Digital Speech Algorithms for Speaker De-Identification
title_zh: 用于说话人去识别的数字语音算法
abstract: The present work is based on the COST Action IC1206 for De-identification in multimedia content. It was performed to test four algorithms of voice modifications on a speech gender recognizer to find the degree of modification of pitch when the speech recognizer have the probability of success equal to the probability of failure. The purpose of this analysis is to assess the intensity of the speech tone modification, the quality, the reversibility and not-reversibility of the changes made.
summary: The present work is based on the COST Action IC1206 for De-identification in multimedia content. It was performed to test four algorithms of voice modifications on a speech gender recognizer to find the degree of modification of pitch when the speech recognizer have the probability of success equal to the probability of failure. The purpose of this analysis is to assess the intensity of the speech tone modification, the quality, the reversibility and not-reversibility of the changes made.
abstract_zh: 目前的工作基于用于多媒体内容去识别化的 COST Action IC1206。它是为了在语音性别识别器上测试四种语音修改算法，以找出当语音识别器成功概率等于失败概率时音调修改的程度。此分析的目的是评估语音语调修改的强度、质量、所做更改的可逆性和不可逆性。

AI.tldr: 本文测试了四种语音修改算法在语音性别识别器上的效果，评估其音调修改程度、质量及可逆性。
AI.motivation: 旨在评估语音去识别技术的强度与质量，确保在隐私保护与语音可用性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 基于COST行动IC1206框架，通过语音性别识别器测试四种算法，分析修改后语音的成功与失败概率相等时的参数变化。
AI.result: 确定了不同算法对音调修改的强度、语音质量影响及修改的可逆性差异，但未明确具体数值结果。
AI.conclusion: 需根据实际应用场景权衡算法的修改强度、质量保持与可逆性，以实现有效的说话人去识别。

authors_text: Kuan Zhu,Haiyun Guo,Tianyi Yan,Yousong Zhu,Jinqiao Wang,Ming Tang
title: PASS: Part-Aware Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Person Re-Identification
title_zh: PASS：用于人员重新识别的部分感知自我监督预训练
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID
abstract: In person re-identification (ReID), very recent researches have validated pre-training the models on unlabelled person images is much better than on ImageNet. However, these researches directly apply the existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods designed for image classification to ReID without any adaption in the framework. These SSL methods match the outputs of local views (e.g., red T-shirt, blue shorts) to those of the global views at the same time, losing lots of details. In this paper, we propose a ReID-specific pre-training method, Part-Aware Self-Supervised pre-training (PASS), which can generate part-level features to offer fine-grained information and is more suitable for ReID. PASS divides the images into several local areas, and the local views randomly cropped from each area are assigned with a specific learnable [PART] token. On the other hand, the [PART]s of all local areas are also appended to the global views. PASS learns to match the output of the local views and global views on the same [PART]. That is, the learned [PART] of the local views from a local area is only matched with the corresponding [PART] learned from the global views. As a result, each [PART] can focus on a specific local area of the image and extracts fine-grained information of this area. Experiments show PASS sets the new state-of-the-art performances on Market1501 and MSMT17 on various ReID tasks, e.g., vanilla ViT-S/16 pre-trained by PASS achieves 92.2\%/90.2\%/88.5\% mAP accuracy on Market1501 for supervised/UDA/USL ReID. Our codes are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID.
summary: In person re-identification (ReID), very recent researches have validated pre-training the models on unlabelled person images is much better than on ImageNet. However, these researches directly apply the existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods designed for image classification to ReID without any adaption in the framework. These SSL methods match the outputs of local views (e.g., red T-shirt, blue shorts) to those of the global views at the same time, losing lots of details. In this paper, we propose a ReID-specific pre-training method, Part-Aware Self-Supervised pre-training (PASS), which can generate part-level features to offer fine-grained information and is more suitable for ReID. PASS divides the images into several local areas, and the local views randomly cropped from each area are assigned with a specific learnable [PART] token. On the other hand, the [PART]s of all local areas are also appended to the global views. PASS learns to match the output of the local views and global views on the same [PART]. That is, the learned [PART] of the local views from a local area is only matched with the corresponding [PART] learned from the global views. As a result, each [PART] can focus on a specific local area of the image and extracts fine-grained information of this area. Experiments show PASS sets the new state-of-the-art performances on Market1501 and MSMT17 on various ReID tasks, e.g., vanilla ViT-S/16 pre-trained by PASS achieves 92.2\%/90.2\%/88.5\% mAP accuracy on Market1501 for supervised/UDA/USL ReID. Our codes are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID.
abstract_zh: 在行人重新识别 (ReID) 方面，最近的研究已经验证在未标记的行人图像上预训练模型比在 ImageNet 上预训练要好得多。然而，这些研究直接将现有的用于图像分类的自监督学习（SSL）方法应用于ReID，而没有在框架中进行任何调整。这些 SSL 方法同时将本地视图（例如红色 T 恤、蓝色短裤）的输出与全局视图的输出进行匹配，从而丢失大量细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 ReID 的预训练方法，即零件感知自监督预训练（PASS），它可以生成零件级特征以提供细粒度信息，更适合 ReID。 PASS 将图像划分为几个局部区域，并且从每个区域随机裁剪的局部视图被分配有特定的可学习的 [PART] 标记。另一方面，所有局部区域的[PART]也被附加到全局视图中。 PASS 学习匹配同一 [PART] 上的局部视图和全局视图的输出。也就是说，从局部区域学习到的局部视图的[PART]仅与从全局视图学习到的相应[PART]相匹配。因此，每个[PART]可以聚焦于图像的特定局部区域并提取该区域的细粒度信息。实验表明，PASS 在 Market1501 和 MSMT17 上的各种 ReID 任务上设置了新的最先进性能，例如，PASS 预训练的 vanilla ViT-S/16 在 Market1501 上针对监督/UDA/USL ReID 实现了 92.2\%/90.2\%/88.5\% mAP 精度。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对行人重识别（ReID）的自监督预训练方法PASS，通过生成局部区域特征提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法直接应用于ReID时，因未考虑局部区域特征而丢失细节信息，导致性能不足。
AI.method: PASS将图像划分为多个局部区域，为每个区域的局部视图分配可学习的[PART]标记，并在全局视图中附加所有局部区域的[PART]，通过匹配相同[PART]的局部与全局视图学习细粒度特征。
AI.result: PASS在Market1501和MSMT17数据集上达到SOTA性能，例如ViT-S/16模型在Market1501上的监督/UDA/USL ReID任务中mAP分别为92.2%/90.2%/88.5%。
AI.conclusion: PASS通过聚焦局部区域特征提升ReID性能，验证了局部感知自监督预训练的有效性。

search_text: PASS: Part-Aware Self-Supervised Pre-Training for Person Re-Identification PASS：用于人员重新识别的部分感知自我监督预训练 In person re-identification (ReID), very recent researches have validated pre-training the models on unlabelled person images is much better than on ImageNet. However, these researches directly apply the existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods designed for image classification to ReID without any adaption in the framework. These SSL methods match the outputs of local views (e.g., red T-shirt, blue shorts) to those of the global views at the same time, losing lots of details. In this paper, we propose a ReID-specific pre-training method, Part-Aware Self-Supervised pre-training (PASS), which can generate part-level features to offer fine-grained information and is more suitable for ReID. PASS divides the images into several local areas, and the local views randomly cropped from each area are assigned with a specific learnable [PART] token. On the other hand, the [PART]s of all local areas are also appended to the global views. PASS learns to match the output of the local views and global views on the same [PART]. That is, the learned [PART] of the local views from a local area is only matched with the corresponding [PART] learned from the global views. As a result, each [PART] can focus on a specific local area of the image and extracts fine-grained information of this area. Experiments show PASS sets the new state-of-the-art performances on Market1501 and MSMT17 on various ReID tasks, e.g., vanilla ViT-S/16 pre-trained by PASS achieves 92.2\%/90.2\%/88.5\% mAP accuracy on Market1501 for supervised/UDA/USL ReID. Our codes are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID. 在行人重新识别 (ReID) 方面，最近的研究已经验证在未标记的行人图像上预训练模型比在 ImageNet 上预训练要好得多。然而，这些研究直接将现有的用于图像分类的自监督学习（SSL）方法应用于ReID，而没有在框架中进行任何调整。这些 SSL 方法同时将本地视图（例如红色 T 恤、蓝色短裤）的输出与全局视图的输出进行匹配，从而丢失大量细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 ReID 的预训练方法，即零件感知自监督预训练（PASS），它可以生成零件级特征以提供细粒度信息，更适合 ReID。 PASS 将图像划分为几个局部区域，并且从每个区域随机裁剪的局部视图被分配有特定的可学习的 [PART] 标记。另一方面，所有局部区域的[PART]也被附加到全局视图中。 PASS 学习匹配同一 [PART] 上的局部视图和全局视图的输出。也就是说，从局部区域学习到的局部视图的[PART]仅与从全局视图学习到的相应[PART]相匹配。因此，每个[PART]可以聚焦于图像的特定局部区域并提取该区域的细粒度信息。实验表明，PASS 在 Market1501 和 MSMT17 上的各种 ReID 任务上设置了新的最先进性能，例如，PASS 预训练的 vanilla ViT-S/16 在 Market1501 上针对监督/UDA/USL ReID 实现了 92.2\%/90.2\%/88.5\% mAP 精度。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/PASS-reID 获取。 本文提出一种针对行人重识别（ReID）的自监督预训练方法PASS，通过生成局部区域特征提升模型性能。 Kuan Zhu,Haiyun Guo,Tianyi Yan,Yousong Zhu,Jinqiao Wang,Ming Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Fatemehsadat Mireshghallah,Kartik Goyal,Archit Uniyal,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Reza Shokri
title: Quantifying Privacy Risks of Masked Language Models Using Membership Inference Attacks
title_zh: 使用成员推理攻击量化隐藏语言模型的隐私风险
abstract: The wide adoption and application of Masked language models~(MLMs) on sensitive data (from legal to medical) necessitates a thorough quantitative investigation into their privacy vulnerabilities -- to what extent do MLMs leak information about their training data? Prior attempts at measuring leakage of MLMs via membership inference attacks have been inconclusive, implying the potential robustness of MLMs to privacy attacks. In this work, we posit that prior attempts were inconclusive because they based their attack solely on the MLM's model score. We devise a stronger membership inference attack based on likelihood ratio hypothesis testing that involves an additional reference MLM to more accurately quantify the privacy risks of memorization in MLMs. We show that masked language models are extremely susceptible to likelihood ratio membership inference attacks: Our empirical results, on models trained on medical notes, show that our attack improves the AUC of prior membership inference attacks from 0.66 to an alarmingly high 0.90 level, with a significant improvement in the low-error region: at 1% false positive rate, our attack is 51X more powerful than prior work.
summary: The wide adoption and application of Masked language models~(MLMs) on sensitive data (from legal to medical) necessitates a thorough quantitative investigation into their privacy vulnerabilities -- to what extent do MLMs leak information about their training data? Prior attempts at measuring leakage of MLMs via membership inference attacks have been inconclusive, implying the potential robustness of MLMs to privacy attacks. In this work, we posit that prior attempts were inconclusive because they based their attack solely on the MLM's model score. We devise a stronger membership inference attack based on likelihood ratio hypothesis testing that involves an additional reference MLM to more accurately quantify the privacy risks of memorization in MLMs. We show that masked language models are extremely susceptible to likelihood ratio membership inference attacks: Our empirical results, on models trained on medical notes, show that our attack improves the AUC of prior membership inference attacks from 0.66 to an alarmingly high 0.90 level, with a significant improvement in the low-error region: at 1% false positive rate, our attack is 51X more powerful than prior work.
abstract_zh: 屏蔽语言模型（MLM）在敏感数据（从法律到医疗）上的广泛采用和应用需要对其隐私漏洞进行彻底的定量调查——MLM 在多大程度上泄露了有关其训练数据的信息？之前通过成员推断攻击来衡量传销泄漏的尝试尚未得出结论，这意味着传销对隐私攻击的潜在鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们假设之前的尝试没有结果，因为他们的攻击仅基于传销的模型得分。我们基于似然比假设检验设计了一种更强的成员推理攻击，其中涉及额外的参考传销，以更准确地量化传销中记忆的隐私风险。我们表明，掩码语言模型极易受到似然比隶属推断攻击的影响：我们在医学笔记上训练的模型上的实证结果表明，我们的攻击将之前的隶属推断攻击的 AUC 从 0.66 提高到了惊人的 0.90 水平，并且在低错误区域有显着改善：在 1% 的误报率下，我们的攻击比之前的工作强大 51 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于似然比假设检验的更强会员推理攻击方法，以量化掩码语言模型（MLM）的隐私风险。
AI.motivation: 先前对MLM隐私泄露的测量结果不明确，因其仅依赖模型分数进行攻击，无法准确评估记忆性导致的隐私风险。
AI.method: 设计结合参考MLM的似然比假设检验攻击框架，通过对比目标模型与参考模型的似然比提升攻击准确性。
AI.result: 在医疗笔记训练的MLM上，攻击AUC从0.66提升至0.90，且在1%误报率下攻击效力提升51倍。
AI.conclusion: MLM对新型似然比会员推理攻击极度脆弱，需重新评估其隐私保护能力。

search_text: Quantifying Privacy Risks of Masked Language Models Using Membership Inference Attacks 使用成员推理攻击量化隐藏语言模型的隐私风险 The wide adoption and application of Masked language models~(MLMs) on sensitive data (from legal to medical) necessitates a thorough quantitative investigation into their privacy vulnerabilities -- to what extent do MLMs leak information about their training data? Prior attempts at measuring leakage of MLMs via membership inference attacks have been inconclusive, implying the potential robustness of MLMs to privacy attacks. In this work, we posit that prior attempts were inconclusive because they based their attack solely on the MLM's model score. We devise a stronger membership inference attack based on likelihood ratio hypothesis testing that involves an additional reference MLM to more accurately quantify the privacy risks of memorization in MLMs. We show that masked language models are extremely susceptible to likelihood ratio membership inference attacks: Our empirical results, on models trained on medical notes, show that our attack improves the AUC of prior membership inference attacks from 0.66 to an alarmingly high 0.90 level, with a significant improvement in the low-error region: at 1% false positive rate, our attack is 51X more powerful than prior work. 屏蔽语言模型（MLM）在敏感数据（从法律到医疗）上的广泛采用和应用需要对其隐私漏洞进行彻底的定量调查——MLM 在多大程度上泄露了有关其训练数据的信息？之前通过成员推断攻击来衡量传销泄漏的尝试尚未得出结论，这意味着传销对隐私攻击的潜在鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们假设之前的尝试没有结果，因为他们的攻击仅基于传销的模型得分。我们基于似然比假设检验设计了一种更强的成员推理攻击，其中涉及额外的参考传销，以更准确地量化传销中记忆的隐私风险。我们表明，掩码语言模型极易受到似然比隶属推断攻击的影响：我们在医学笔记上训练的模型上的实证结果表明，我们的攻击将之前的隶属推断攻击的 AUC 从 0.66 提高到了惊人的 0.90 水平，并且在低错误区域有显着改善：在 1% 的误报率下，我们的攻击比之前的工作强大 51 倍。 本文提出一种基于似然比假设检验的更强会员推理攻击方法，以量化掩码语言模型（MLM）的隐私风险。 Fatemehsadat Mireshghallah,Kartik Goyal,Archit Uniyal,Taylor Berg-Kirkpatrick,Reza Shokri cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Yanbo Chen,Zhengzhe Xu,Zhuozhu Jian,Gengpan Tang,Yunong Yangli,Anxing Xiao,Xueqian Wang,Bin Liang
title: Quadruped Guidance Robot for the Visually Impaired: A Comfort-Based Approach
title_zh: 针对视障人士的四足引导机器人：基于舒适度的方法
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Guidance robots that can guide people and avoid various obstacles, could potentially be owned by more visually impaired people at a fairly low cost. Most of the previous guidance robots for the visually impaired ignored the human response behavior and comfort, treating the human as an appendage dragged by the robot, which can lead to imprecise guidance of the human and sudden changes in the traction force experienced by the human. In this paper, we propose a novel quadruped guidance robot system with a comfort-based concept. We design a controllable traction device that can adjust the length and force between human and robot to ensure comfort. To allow the human to be guided safely and comfortably to the target position in complex environments, our proposed human motion planner can plan the traction force with the force-based human motion model. To track the planned force, we also propose a robot motion planner that can generate the specific robot motion command and design the force control device. Our system has been deployed on Unitree Laikago quadrupedal platform and validated in real-world scenarios.
summary: Guidance robots that can guide people and avoid various obstacles, could potentially be owned by more visually impaired people at a fairly low cost. Most of the previous guidance robots for the visually impaired ignored the human response behavior and comfort, treating the human as an appendage dragged by the robot, which can lead to imprecise guidance of the human and sudden changes in the traction force experienced by the human. In this paper, we propose a novel quadruped guidance robot system with a comfort-based concept. We design a controllable traction device that can adjust the length and force between human and robot to ensure comfort. To allow the human to be guided safely and comfortably to the target position in complex environments, our proposed human motion planner can plan the traction force with the force-based human motion model. To track the planned force, we also propose a robot motion planner that can generate the specific robot motion command and design the force control device. Our system has been deployed on Unitree Laikago quadrupedal platform and validated in real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 能够引导人们并避开各种障碍的导引机器人可能会以相当低的成本被更多的视障人士所拥有。以往的视障引导机器人大多忽视了人的反应行为和舒适度，将人视为机器人拖动的附肢，这会导致人的引导不精确以及人所经历的牵引力的突然变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有基于舒适度概念的新型四足引导机器人系统。我们设计了一种可控牵引装置，可以调节人与机器人之间的长度和力量，以保证舒适度。为了让人类在复杂的环境中被安全舒适地引导到目标位置，我们提出的人体运动规划器可以使用基于力的人体运动模型来规划牵引力。为了跟踪规划的力，我们还提出了一种机器人运动规划器，它可以生成特定的机器人运动命令并设计力控制装置。我们的系统已部署在 Unitree Laikago 四足平台上，并在现实场景中进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于舒适度的四足引导机器人系统，用于帮助视障人士在复杂环境中安全舒适地移动。
AI.motivation: 现有引导机器人忽视了人类对牵引力的响应行为和舒适度，导致指导不精确和牵引力突变，影响用户体验。
AI.method: 设计可调节牵引装置以调整人机间长度和力度，并结合基于力的人体运动模型规划牵引力，同时开发机器人运动规划器和力控装置。
AI.result: 系统部署于Unitree Laikago四足平台，并在真实场景中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过关注人体舒适度和动态响应，提升了视障人士在复杂环境中的引导安全性和舒适性。

authors_text: Bin Peng,Hongle Xie,Weidong Chen
title: ROLL: Long-Term Robust LiDAR-based Localization With Temporary Mapping in Changing Environments
title_zh: ROLL：基于 LiDAR 的长期稳健定位，在不断变化的环境中提供临时测绘
abstract: Long-term scene changes present challenges to localization systems using a pre-built map. This paper presents a LiDAR-based system that can provide robust localization against those challenges. Our method starts with activation of a mapping process temporarily when global matching towards the pre-built map is unreliable. The temporary map will be merged onto the pre-built map for later localization runs once reliable matching is obtained again. We further integrate a LiDAR inertial odometry (LIO) to provide motion-compensated LiDAR scans and a reliable initial pose guess for the global matching module. To generate a smooth real-time trajectory for navigation purposes, we fuse poses from odometry and global matching by solving a pose graph optimization problem. We evaluate our localization system with extensive experiments on the NCLT dataset including a variety of changing indoor and outdoor environments, and the results demonstrate a robust and accurate localization performance for over a year. The implementations are open sourced on GitHub.
summary: Long-term scene changes present challenges to localization systems using a pre-built map. This paper presents a LiDAR-based system that can provide robust localization against those challenges. Our method starts with activation of a mapping process temporarily when global matching towards the pre-built map is unreliable. The temporary map will be merged onto the pre-built map for later localization runs once reliable matching is obtained again. We further integrate a LiDAR inertial odometry (LIO) to provide motion-compensated LiDAR scans and a reliable initial pose guess for the global matching module. To generate a smooth real-time trajectory for navigation purposes, we fuse poses from odometry and global matching by solving a pose graph optimization problem. We evaluate our localization system with extensive experiments on the NCLT dataset including a variety of changing indoor and outdoor environments, and the results demonstrate a robust and accurate localization performance for over a year. The implementations are open sourced on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 长期的场景变化给使用预建地图的定位系统带来了挑战。本文提出了一种基于激光雷达的系统，可以提供强大的定位来应对这些挑战。当对预构建地图的全局匹配不可靠时，我们的方法首先暂时激活映射过程。一旦再次获得可靠的匹配，临时地图将合并到预构建的地图上，以便以后的本地化运行。我们进一步集成 LiDAR 惯性里程计 (LIO)，为全局匹配模块提供运动补偿 LiDAR 扫描和可靠的初始姿态猜测。为了生成用于导航目的的平滑实时轨迹，我们通过解决位姿图优化问题来融合里程计和全局匹配的位姿。我们在 NCLT 数据集（包括各种不断变化的室内和室外环境）上进行了大量实验来评估我们的定位系统，结果证明了一年多来稳健且准确的定位性能。这些实现在 GitHub 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的长期鲁棒定位系统，通过临时映射应对环境变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统预建地图定位方法在长期环境变化下易因全局匹配失效导致定位失败。
AI.method: 当全局匹配不可靠时启动临时映射，集成LiDAR惯性里程计补偿运动并提供初始姿态，通过位姿图优化融合局部与全局信息。
AI.result: 在NCLT数据集多场景测试中，系统实现超过一年的稳健高精度定位。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态地图更新与多源信息融合，有效解决了长期环境变化下的定位鲁棒性问题。

conclusion: 该方法通过动态地图更新与多源信息融合，有效解决了长期环境变化下的定位鲁棒性问题。
search_text: ROLL: Long-Term Robust LiDAR-based Localization With Temporary Mapping in Changing Environments ROLL：基于 LiDAR 的长期稳健定位，在不断变化的环境中提供临时测绘 Long-term scene changes present challenges to localization systems using a pre-built map. This paper presents a LiDAR-based system that can provide robust localization against those challenges. Our method starts with activation of a mapping process temporarily when global matching towards the pre-built map is unreliable. The temporary map will be merged onto the pre-built map for later localization runs once reliable matching is obtained again. We further integrate a LiDAR inertial odometry (LIO) to provide motion-compensated LiDAR scans and a reliable initial pose guess for the global matching module. To generate a smooth real-time trajectory for navigation purposes, we fuse poses from odometry and global matching by solving a pose graph optimization problem. We evaluate our localization system with extensive experiments on the NCLT dataset including a variety of changing indoor and outdoor environments, and the results demonstrate a robust and accurate localization performance for over a year. The implementations are open sourced on GitHub. 长期的场景变化给使用预建地图的定位系统带来了挑战。本文提出了一种基于激光雷达的系统，可以提供强大的定位来应对这些挑战。当对预构建地图的全局匹配不可靠时，我们的方法首先暂时激活映射过程。一旦再次获得可靠的匹配，临时地图将合并到预构建的地图上，以便以后的本地化运行。我们进一步集成 LiDAR 惯性里程计 (LIO)，为全局匹配模块提供运动补偿 LiDAR 扫描和可靠的初始姿态猜测。为了生成用于导航目的的平滑实时轨迹，我们通过解决位姿图优化问题来融合里程计和全局匹配的位姿。我们在 NCLT 数据集（包括各种不断变化的室内和室外环境）上进行了大量实验来评估我们的定位系统，结果证明了一年多来稳健且准确的定位性能。这些实现在 GitHub 上开源。 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的长期鲁棒定位系统，通过临时映射应对环境变化带来的挑战。 Bin Peng,Hongle Xie,Weidong Chen cs.RO

authors_text: Jascha Hellwig,Mark Baierl,Joao Carvalho,Julen Urain,Jan Peters
title: A Hierarchical Approach to Active Pose Estimation
title_zh: 主动姿势估计的分层方法
abstract: Creating mobile robots which are able to find and manipulate objects in large environments is an active topic of research. These robots not only need to be capable of searching for specific objects but also to estimate their poses often relying on environment observations, which is even more difficult in the presence of occlusions. Therefore, to tackle this problem we propose a simple hierarchical approach to estimate the pose of a desired object. An Active Visual Search module operating with RGB images first obtains a rough estimation of the object 2D pose, followed by a more computationally expensive Active Pose Estimation module using point cloud data. We empirically show that processing image features to obtain a richer observation speeds up the search and pose estimation computations, in comparison to a binary decision that indicates whether the object is or not in the current image.
summary: Creating mobile robots which are able to find and manipulate objects in large environments is an active topic of research. These robots not only need to be capable of searching for specific objects but also to estimate their poses often relying on environment observations, which is even more difficult in the presence of occlusions. Therefore, to tackle this problem we propose a simple hierarchical approach to estimate the pose of a desired object. An Active Visual Search module operating with RGB images first obtains a rough estimation of the object 2D pose, followed by a more computationally expensive Active Pose Estimation module using point cloud data. We empirically show that processing image features to obtain a richer observation speeds up the search and pose estimation computations, in comparison to a binary decision that indicates whether the object is or not in the current image.
abstract_zh: 创建能够在大型环境中寻找和操纵物体的移动机器人是一个活跃的研究主题。这些机器人不仅需要能够搜索特定物体，而且通常还要依赖于环境观察来估计它们的姿势，这在存在遮挡的情况下更加困难。因此，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单的分层方法来估计所需物体的姿态。使用 RGB 图像操作的主动视觉搜索模块首先获得对象 2D 姿态的粗略估计，然后是使用点云数据的计算成本更高的主动姿态估计模块。我们凭经验表明，与指示对象是否在当前图像中的二元决策相比，处理图像特征以获得更丰富的观察可以加快搜索和姿态估计计算的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层方法，通过结合RGB图像和点云数据来提升机器人在复杂环境中对目标物体的位姿估计能力。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人需要在存在遮挡的复杂环境中高效定位和操作物体，传统方法在准确性和计算效率上面临挑战。
AI.method: 采用两阶段分层架构：首先通过RGB图像进行粗略2D位姿估计，再利用点云数据进行精确位姿计算，通过图像特征处理替代二元决策以提升效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法相比传统二元决策机制显著提升了搜索和位姿估计的计算速度，同时保持较高精度。
AI.conclusion: 分层融合多模态传感器数据的方法能有效解决遮挡场景下的位姿估计问题，为机器人自主操作提供可靠方案。

authors_text: Joao Carvalho,Dorothea Koert,Marek Daniv,Jan Peters
title: Residual Robot Learning for Object-Centric Probabilistic Movement Primitives
title_zh: 以对象为中心的概率运动原语的残差机器人学习
abstract: It is desirable for future robots to quickly learn new tasks and adapt learned skills to constantly changing environments. To this end, Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs) have shown to be a promising framework to learn generalizable trajectory generators from distributions over demonstrated trajectories. However, in practical applications that require high precision in the manipulation of objects, the accuracy of ProMPs is often insufficient, in particular when they are learned in cartesian space from external observations and executed with limited controller gains. Therefore, we propose to combine ProMPs with recently introduced Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL), to account for both, corrections in position and orientation during task execution. In particular, we learn a residual on top of a nominal ProMP trajectory with Soft-Actor Critic and incorporate the variability in the demonstrations as a decision variable to reduce the search space for RRL. As a proof of concept, we evaluate our proposed method on a 3D block insertion task with a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot. Experimental results show that the robot successfully learns to complete the insertion which was not possible before with using basic ProMPs.
summary: It is desirable for future robots to quickly learn new tasks and adapt learned skills to constantly changing environments. To this end, Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs) have shown to be a promising framework to learn generalizable trajectory generators from distributions over demonstrated trajectories. However, in practical applications that require high precision in the manipulation of objects, the accuracy of ProMPs is often insufficient, in particular when they are learned in cartesian space from external observations and executed with limited controller gains. Therefore, we propose to combine ProMPs with recently introduced Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL), to account for both, corrections in position and orientation during task execution. In particular, we learn a residual on top of a nominal ProMP trajectory with Soft-Actor Critic and incorporate the variability in the demonstrations as a decision variable to reduce the search space for RRL. As a proof of concept, we evaluate our proposed method on a 3D block insertion task with a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot. Experimental results show that the robot successfully learns to complete the insertion which was not possible before with using basic ProMPs.
abstract_zh: 未来的机器人希望能够快速学习新任务并使学到的技能适应不断变化的环境。为此，概率运动原语（ProMP）已被证明是一个有前途的框架，可以从演示轨迹的分布中学习可概括的轨迹生成器。然而，在需要高精度地操纵对象的实际应用中，ProMP 的精度通常不足，特别是当它们在笛卡尔空间中从外部观察中学习并以有限的控制器增益执行时。因此，我们建议将 ProMP 与最近引入的残差强化学习（RRL）相结合，以考虑任务执行期间位置和方向的校正。特别是，我们使用 Soft-Actor Critic 学习标称 ProMP 轨迹之上的残差，并将演示中的可变性纳入决策变量，以减少 RRL 的搜索空间。作为概念证明，我们使用 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda 机器人在 3D 块插入任务上评估了我们提出的方法。实验结果表明，机器人成功地学会了完成插入，这在以前使用基本 ProMP 是不可能完成的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合残差强化学习（RRL）与概率运动原语（ProMPs）的方法，以提高机器人高精度操作任务的执行准确性。
AI.motivation: ProMPs在笛卡尔空间学习时精度不足，难以应对需要精确位置和方向调整的复杂操作任务。
AI.method: 在ProMPs轨迹基础上叠加残差修正，采用Soft-Actor Critic算法学习残差，并将演示数据的变异性作为决策变量优化搜索空间。
AI.result: 在7-DoF机械臂的3D积木插入实验中，该方法成功完成任务，而传统ProMPs无法实现。
AI.conclusion: 融合RRL与ProMPs的框架有效提升了机器人对高精度操作任务的适应能力，验证了方法的可行性。

To this end, Probabilistic Movement Primitives (ProMPs) have shown to be a promising framework to learn generalizable trajectory generators from distributions over demonstrated trajectories. However, in practical applications that require high precision in the manipulation of objects, the accuracy of ProMPs is often insufficient, in particular when they are learned in cartesian space from external observations and executed with limited controller gains. Therefore, we propose to combine ProMPs with recently introduced Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL), to account for both, corrections in position and orientation during task execution. In particular, we learn a residual on top of a nominal ProMP trajectory with Soft-Actor Critic and incorporate the variability in the demonstrations as a decision variable to reduce the search space for RRL. As a proof of concept, we evaluate our proposed method on a 3D block insertion task with a 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda robot. Experimental results show that the robot successfully learns to complete the insertion which was not possible before with using basic ProMPs. 未来的机器人希望能够快速学习新任务并使学到的技能适应不断变化的环境。为此，概率运动原语（ProMP）已被证明是一个有前途的框架，可以从演示轨迹的分布中学习可概括的轨迹生成器。然而，在需要高精度地操纵对象的实际应用中，ProMP 的精度通常不足，特别是当它们在笛卡尔空间中从外部观察中学习并以有限的控制器增益执行时。因此，我们建议将 ProMP 与最近引入的残差强化学习（RRL）相结合，以考虑任务执行期间位置和方向的校正。特别是，我们使用 Soft-Actor Critic 学习标称 ProMP 轨迹之上的残差，并将演示中的可变性纳入决策变量，以减少 RRL 的搜索空间。作为概念证明，我们使用 7-DoF Franka Emika Panda 机器人在 3D 块插入任务上评估了我们提出的方法。实验结果表明，机器人成功地学会了完成插入，这在以前使用基本 ProMP 是不可能完成的。 本文提出结合残差强化学习（RRL）与概率运动原语（ProMPs）的方法，以提高机器人高精度操作任务的执行准确性。 Joao Carvalho,Dorothea Koert,Marek Daniv,Jan Peters cs.RO

authors_text: Xin Peng,Yifu Wang,Ling Gao,Laurent Kneip
title: Globally-Optimal Event Camera Motion Estimation
title_zh: 全局最优事件相机运动估计
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that perform well in HDR conditions and have high temporal resolution. However, different from traditional frame-based cameras, event cameras measure asynchronous pixel-level brightness changes and return them in a highly discretised format, hence new algorithms are needed. The present paper looks at fronto-parallel motion estimation of an event camera. The flow of the events is modeled by a general homographic warping in a space-time volume, and the objective is formulated as a maximisation of contrast within the image of unwarped events. However, in stark contrast to prior art, we derive a globally optimal solution to this generally non-convex problem, and thus remove the dependency on a good initial guess. Our algorithm relies on branch-and-bound optimisation for which we derive novel, recursive upper and lower bounds for six different contrast estimation functions. The practical validity of our approach is supported by a highly successful application to AGV motion estimation with a downward facing event camera, a challenging scenario in which the sensor experiences fronto-parallel motion in front of noisy, fast moving textures.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that perform well in HDR conditions and have high temporal resolution. However, different from traditional frame-based cameras, event cameras measure asynchronous pixel-level brightness changes and return them in a highly discretised format, hence new algorithms are needed. The present paper looks at fronto-parallel motion estimation of an event camera. The flow of the events is modeled by a general homographic warping in a space-time volume, and the objective is formulated as a maximisation of contrast within the image of unwarped events. However, in stark contrast to prior art, we derive a globally optimal solution to this generally non-convex problem, and thus remove the dependency on a good initial guess. Our algorithm relies on branch-and-bound optimisation for which we derive novel, recursive upper and lower bounds for six different contrast estimation functions. The practical validity of our approach is supported by a highly successful application to AGV motion estimation with a downward facing event camera, a challenging scenario in which the sensor experiences fronto-parallel motion in front of noisy, fast moving textures.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是仿生传感器，在 HDR 条件下表现良好并具有高时间分辨率。然而，与传统的基于帧的相机不同，事件相机测量异步像素级亮度变化并以高度离散的格式返回它们，因此需要新的算法。本文着眼于事件相机的正面平行运动估计。事件的流动是通过时空体积中的一般单应性扭曲来建模的，并且目标被表述为未扭曲事件的图像内对比度的最大化。然而，与现有技术形成鲜明对比的是，我们针对这个一般非凸问题导出了全局最优解，从而消除了对良好初始猜测的依赖。我们的算法依赖于分支定界优化，为此我们为六种不同的对比度估计函数导出新颖的递归上限和下限。我们的方法的实际有效性得到了使用向下事件相机进行 AGV 运动估计的非常成功的应用的支持，这是一个具有挑战性的场景，其中传感器在嘈杂的、快速移动的纹理前面经历正面平行运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种事件相机运动估计的全局最优解法，通过建模事件流的单应性变换并最大化未变形事件图像的对比度，无需依赖初始猜测。
AI.motivation: 事件相机因异步像素级亮度变化的离散数据格式，导致传统运动估计方法失效，且现有算法依赖初始猜测，鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 基于分支定界优化框架，推导六种对比度估计函数的递归上下界，实现全局最优解，无需初始猜测。
AI.result: 成功应用于AGV运动估计，尤其在向下朝下事件相机面对噪声和快速移动纹理的挑战性场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过分支定界与新界函数设计，解决了事件相机运动估计的全局最优问题，验证了方法在复杂场景中的有效性。

search_text: Globally-Optimal Event Camera Motion Estimation 全局最优事件相机运动估计 Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that perform well in HDR conditions and have high temporal resolution. However, different from traditional frame-based cameras, event cameras measure asynchronous pixel-level brightness changes and return them in a highly discretised format, hence new algorithms are needed. The present paper looks at fronto-parallel motion estimation of an event camera. The flow of the events is modeled by a general homographic warping in a space-time volume, and the objective is formulated as a maximisation of contrast within the image of unwarped events. However, in stark contrast to prior art, we derive a globally optimal solution to this generally non-convex problem, and thus remove the dependency on a good initial guess. Our algorithm relies on branch-and-bound optimisation for which we derive novel, recursive upper and lower bounds for six different contrast estimation functions. The practical validity of our approach is supported by a highly successful application to AGV motion estimation with a downward facing event camera, a challenging scenario in which the sensor experiences fronto-parallel motion in front of noisy, fast moving textures. 事件摄像机是仿生传感器，在 HDR 条件下表现良好并具有高时间分辨率。然而，与传统的基于帧的相机不同，事件相机测量异步像素级亮度变化并以高度离散的格式返回它们，因此需要新的算法。本文着眼于事件相机的正面平行运动估计。事件的流动是通过时空体积中的一般单应性扭曲来建模的，并且目标被表述为未扭曲事件的图像内对比度的最大化。然而，与现有技术形成鲜明对比的是，我们针对这个一般非凸问题导出了全局最优解，从而消除了对良好初始猜测的依赖。我们的算法依赖于分支定界优化，为此我们为六种不同的对比度估计函数导出新颖的递归上限和下限。我们的方法的实际有效性得到了使用向下事件相机进行 AGV 运动估计的非常成功的应用的支持，这是一个具有挑战性的场景，其中传感器在嘈杂的、快速移动的纹理前面经历正面平行运动。 本文提出一种事件相机运动估计的全局最优解法，通过建模事件流的单应性变换并最大化未变形事件图像的对比度，无需依赖初始猜测。 Xin Peng,Yifu Wang,Ling Gao,Laurent Kneip cs.CV

authors_text: Chuhui Xue,Wenqing Zhang,Yu Hao,Shijian Lu,Philip Torr,Song Bai
title: Language Matters: A Weakly Supervised Vision-Language Pre-training Approach for Scene Text Detection and Spotting
title_zh: 语言很重要：用于场景文本检测和识别的弱监督视觉语言预训练方法
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022 for oral presentation
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022 for oral presentation
abstract: Recently, Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) techniques have greatly benefited various vision-language tasks by jointly learning visual and textual representations, which intuitively helps in Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tasks due to the rich visual and textual information in scene text images. However, these methods cannot well cope with OCR tasks because of the difficulty in both instance-level text encoding and image-text pair acquisition (i.e. images and captured texts in them). This paper presents a weakly supervised pre-training method, oCLIP, which can acquire effective scene text representations by jointly learning and aligning visual and textual information. Our network consists of an image encoder and a character-aware text encoder that extract visual and textual features, respectively, as well as a visual-textual decoder that models the interaction among textual and visual features for learning effective scene text representations. With the learning of textual features, the pre-trained model can attend texts in images well with character awareness. Besides, these designs enable the learning from weakly annotated texts (i.e. partial texts in images without text bounding boxes) which mitigates the data annotation constraint greatly. Experiments over the weakly annotated images in ICDAR2019-LSVT show that our pre-trained model improves F-score by +2.5\% and +4.8\% while transferring its weights to other text detection and spotting networks, respectively. In addition, the proposed method outperforms existing pre-training techniques consistently across multiple public datasets (e.g., +3.2\% and +1.3\% for Total-Text and CTW1500).
summary: Recently, Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) techniques have greatly benefited various vision-language tasks by jointly learning visual and textual representations, which intuitively helps in Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tasks due to the rich visual and textual information in scene text images. However, these methods cannot well cope with OCR tasks because of the difficulty in both instance-level text encoding and image-text pair acquisition (i.e. images and captured texts in them). This paper presents a weakly supervised pre-training method, oCLIP, which can acquire effective scene text representations by jointly learning and aligning visual and textual information. Our network consists of an image encoder and a character-aware text encoder that extract visual and textual features, respectively, as well as a visual-textual decoder that models the interaction among textual and visual features for learning effective scene text representations. With the learning of textual features, the pre-trained model can attend texts in images well with character awareness. Besides, these designs enable the learning from weakly annotated texts (i.e. partial texts in images without text bounding boxes) which mitigates the data annotation constraint greatly. Experiments over the weakly annotated images in ICDAR2019-LSVT show that our pre-trained model improves F-score by +2.5\% and +4.8\% while transferring its weights to other text detection and spotting networks, respectively. In addition, the proposed method outperforms existing pre-training techniques consistently across multiple public datasets (e.g., +3.2\% and +1.3\% for Total-Text and CTW1500).
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉语言预训练（VLP）技术通过联合学习视觉和文本表示，使各种视觉语言任务受益匪浅，由于场景文本图像中丰富的视觉和文本信息，这直观地有助于光学字符识别（OCR）任务。然而，这些方法不能很好地应对 OCR 任务，因为实例级文本编码和图像文本对获取（即图像和其中捕获的文本）都存在困难。本文提出了一种弱监督预训练方法oCLIP，该方法可以通过联合学习和对齐视觉和文本信息来获取有效的场景文本表示。我们的网络由图像编码器和字符感知文本编码器组成，分别提取视觉和文本特征，以及视觉文本解码器，对文本和视觉特征之间的交互进行建模，以学习有效的场景文本表示。通过学习文本特征，预训练模型可以很好地处理图像中的文本并具有字符意识。此外，这些设计使得能够从弱注释文本（即图像中没有文本边界框的部分文本）中学习，这极大地减轻了数据注释约束。对 ICDAR2019-LSVT 中弱注释图像的实验表明，我们的预训练模型将 F 分数提高了 +2.5\% 和 +4.8\%，同时将其权重转移到其他文本检测和发现网络。此外，所提出的方法在多个公共数据集上始终优于现有的预训练技术（例如，Total-Text 和 CTW1500 的 +3.2\% 和 +1.3\%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的视觉-语言预训练方法oCLIP，用于场景文本检测与识别。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法在OCR任务中表现不佳，因实例级文本编码困难且需大量标注的图像-文本对，而弱监督方法可缓解标注约束。
AI.method: 设计包含图像编码器、字符感知文本编码器和视觉-文本解码器的网络，通过弱标注文本（无文本框的图像）联合学习视觉与文本特征对齐。
AI.result: 在ICDAR2019-LSVT数据集上，模型权重迁移后F-score提升2.5%和4.8%；在Total-Text和CTW1500数据集上分别提升3.2%和1.3%。
AI.conclusion: oCLIP方法有效利用弱标注数据，显著优于现有预训练技术，推动了场景文本检测与识别的发展。

With the learning of textual features, the pre-trained model can attend texts in images well with character awareness. Besides, these designs enable the learning from weakly annotated texts (i.e. partial texts in images without text bounding boxes) which mitigates the data annotation constraint greatly. Experiments over the weakly annotated images in ICDAR2019-LSVT show that our pre-trained model improves F-score by +2.5\% and +4.8\% while transferring its weights to other text detection and spotting networks, respectively.
